name: Your America
subject: Biased Fact-Checker Is Targeting PragerU!
body:
NewsGuardone of the largest and most influential “fact-checkers” employed by Big Techis targeting PragerU! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7866%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=xga4oj44%2bpR%2b3HScSZRa0g&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92065%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ndLLV6e%2b6lnEMrnVdOBlw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92065%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ndLLV6e%2b6lnEMrnVdOBlw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear PragerU Supporter, NewsGuard--one of the largest and most influential “fact-checkers” employed by Big Tech--is targeting PragerU! After labeling PragerU as misinformation, encouraging tech platforms to cancel us, warning users to “proceed with caution” before viewing our content, damaging our reputation, and costing us hundreds of thousands--if not millions--of dollars, NewsGuard refuses to leave us alone.
---
[Support PragerU](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92066%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m335f2R4E5Ifjb5JamPBBA&sysid=1)
---
| | Political and corporate elites empower third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard to censor companies they don’t like--companies like PragerU. Meanwhile, leftist, legacy media companies like the **New York Times** and **NPR** get near-perfect “credibility” ratings. So, who is behind NewsGuard, and why are they controlling what you can and cannot see? NewsGuard is partnered with Big Tech companies (like **Microsoft**), Big Pharma (like the PR firm for **Pfizer** --the maker of the COVID vaccine), government agencies (like the **Department of Defense**), and even national teachers unions (like the **American Federation of Teachers**) “to combat disinformation, especially around COVID-19 and elections” according to the **World Economic Forum.** So, it’s no wonder NewsGuard doesn’t want open dialogue about COVID-19 and lockdowns.

[**They want to stop PragerU from exposing the truth.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92067%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CouO%2fJfP%2bKgpxH%2bv78ItvQ&sysid=1)
Advisors to NewsGuard include former Directors of the CIA and other government agencies. Their partners, advisors, and staff overwhelmingly support left-wing causes. So, how can NewsGuard claim to be “independent” and call itself “The Internet Trust Tool”? If you’ve seen any of our videos, you know that PragerU is fiercely committed to the truth. [**But NewsGuard slapped us with a misinformation label just because they don’t want the public to hear what we have to say.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92068%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8MdCN8LDgR4%2bBQNVbDuUHg&sysid=1) Here’s just one of many examples of how third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard are hurting organizations like **PragerU** , **Breitbart** , **The Daily Wire** , and **The Babylon Bee** : The company that used to host our videos, **JW Player** , informed us 18 months ago that they were not willing to work with us anymore. When we asked why, they said we had been blacklisted by NewsGuard and claimed our content was “misleading.” Suddenly, we had to devote considerable time and money to find a new video host. Now, NewsGuard is back, threatening to further harm us if we don’t comply with their long list of ridiculous demands.
---
[Expose NewsGuard](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92069%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W0cOHjayKm2xmqMXLLIzgA&sysid=1)
---
| | We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this. We’re not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while keeping you completely in the dark. There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against NewsGuard. But if we don’t do it, who will? [PragerU is taking a risk by fighting back against such powerful entities, and we need your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92060%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6bl%2fSXyNxCgKa3pd0K6GUw&sysid=1) Third-party fact-checkers and their “partners” have all the money and all the power. But we have you. [**Donate now to help us expose NewsGuard.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92061%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uqS4JJQ8YPr9x2j3vdeWtw&sysid=1) This is David vs. Goliath. We know that God and the truth are on our side and will prevail. But we can’t do this alone. We’re willing to take the risk. We’re putting everything on the line. But we need your help. Please join in the fight and help us. Sincerely, Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO
---
[Donate Now](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92062%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3O3DT4pY3eJ9b4aPOiNglg&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| | Copyright (C) 2023 PragerU All rights reserved.
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7866%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=xga4oj44%2bpR%2b3HScSZRa0g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7866%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=xga4oj44%2bpR%2b3HScSZRa0g&sysid=1)

name: Mike Garcia
subject: Our first week in the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Garcia for Congress
body:
We're just getting started.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217841:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---
Peter,
---
Last week was House conservatives' first week in the majority, and we used it to deliver several significant victories for the American people.
---
_ • We passed a new rules package.
• We voted to block 87,000 new IRS agents.
• We voted to stop Biden from sending our strategic petroleum reserves to China.
• We created a select committee on competition with China.
• We established a select subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government.
_
---
But Peter, this is only the beginning.
---
[**Please make a contribution to support House conservatives as we fight to get America back on track.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217841:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217841:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217842:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217843:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217844:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217845:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217846:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62217841:6Aa3-KG9N:m:1:3331421248:AB6E12AAF99A5E88F2059EBA26C08004:r)
---

Our new majority is about changing the priorities in Washington.
---
Balancing the budget doesn't begin with more IRS agents.
---
_It begins by cutting wasteful spending, encouraging taxpayers to work, incentivizing the growth of businesses, and allowing both to keep as much of their own money as legally possible._
---
Unlike Biden and radical progressive Democrats, House conservatives stand for freedom and less government intrusion in your daily life.
---
We also took action to counter the growing threat from China.
---
**Right now, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) is the ultimate threat to America, and we need to start taking that threat seriously.**
---
Every day, $1 billion in American intellectual property is stolen by the CPP so they can rip off American companies and build up their own military capabilities.
---
Establishing a committee with bipartisan support to investigate China is an important step in the right direction.
---
Our new majority also voted to stop Joe Biden from sending our strategic reserves of petroleum to China.

Under Biden's "leadership", America's strategic reserves of petroleum have declined to just 58% of what it was in January 2021.
---
_That 's the lowest level it's been at since 1984!_

It should go without saying that the needs of America come before the needs of the Chinese Communist Party.

This was only the first week. We still have a lot of work to do, Peter.

Congress needs to take action to secure the border. We've got to combat inflation and balance the budget. And we need to continue our efforts to hold Joe Biden accountable.

clean_body: We're just getting started. | Peter, Last week was House conservatives' first week in the majority, and we used it to deliver several significant victories for the American people. • We passed a new rules package. • We voted to block 87,000 new IRS agents. • We voted to stop Biden from sending our strategic petroleum reserves to China. • We created a select committee on competition with China. • We established a select subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government. But Peter, this is only the beginning. Our new majority is about changing the priorities in Washington. Balancing the budget doesn't begin with more IRS agents. It begins by cutting wasteful spending, encouraging taxpayers to work, incentivizing the growth of businesses, and allowing both to keep as much of their own money as legally possible. Unlike Biden and radical progressive Democrats, House conservatives stand for freedom and less government intrusion in your daily life. We also took action to counter the growing threat from China. Right now, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) is the ultimate threat to America, and we need to start taking that threat seriously. Every day, $1 billion in American intellectual property is stolen by the CPP so they can rip off American companies and build up their own military capabilities. name: American Update
subject: Do you know how it worked, and why it doesn’t?
body:
You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0474%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fUT8z0e5U4gegy%2bIm8L90w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656008%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ii4ocgGTgTpidzhKdFu%2bbg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. So, I have a question for you. Do you want to know how the Founders thought the United States Congress should work? Watching the news today, I’m sure you’ve asked yourself that. If you’ve ever wondered, then I encourage you to learn more with our free online course, **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t.” ** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656008%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ii4ocgGTgTpidzhKdFu%2bbg&sysid=1) This popular online course is available in a special DVD box set for viewing in your home or with a small group for a limited time. **You can order your copy at this secure link:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656009%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=btMoqFvSO%2bSem%2fvkmu3C7A&sysid=1) The 11-lecture course explores the Founders’ understanding of the legislative power and how Congress should work, the Progressive rejection of that understanding, and how it has affected American politics. On a personal note, this was one of my favorite courses to film. I really enjoyed it, and I know you will too. You can get your DVD box set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** right away with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. Your gift will support our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans nationwide. As you may know, these online courses, including **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** and Hillsdale’s other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, are only possible because of the **generous support **from donors like you. Your gift really matters because Hillsdale doesn’t take a dime--NOT EVEN ONE PENNY!--from the government. Even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. So, will you help us **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans with free online courses and other educational programs by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today? Your gift will really help so that we can maintain our independence and our critical educational outreach. Here is a secure link for you to get your DVD set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** :
[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656009%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=btMoqFvSO%2bSem%2fvkmu3C7A&sysid=1) In this critical time for America, know that we are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. On behalf of Hillsdale College, I hope you enjoy the course! Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | _625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0474%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fUT8z0e5U4gegy%2bIm8L90w&sysid=1)_

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0474%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fUT8z0e5U4gegy%2bIm8L90w&sysid=1)

body:

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DU5ZW6%2bJCQrAR3VjDnik3w&sysid=1) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DU5ZW6%2bJCQrAR3VjDnik3w&sysid=1) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DU5ZW6%2bJCQrAR3VjDnik3w&sysid=1) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6 ...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters. **

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92077%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IkUNeyYT99XR97ZBIhOjcA&sysid=1)

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znhol1uq9n40u31t9bpikkvk33c84jtieduf2020_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm6o76chh2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

| | Political and corporate elites empower third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard to censor companies they don’t like—companies like PragerU. Meanwhile, leftist, legacy media companies like the **New York Times** and **NPR** get near-perfect “credibility” ratings. So, who is behind NewsGuard, and why are they controlling what you can and cannot see? NewsGuard is partnered with Big Tech companies (like **Microsoft**), Big Pharma (like the PR firm for **Pfizer** —the maker of the COVID vaccine), government agencies (like the **Department of Defense**), and even national teachers unions (like the **American Federation of Teachers**) “to combat disinformation, especially around COVID-19 and elections” according to the **World Economic Forum.** So, it’s no wonder NewsGuard doesn’t want open dialogue about COVID-19 and lockdowns.

[**They want to stop PragerU from exposing the truth.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrah5rsrjs814bdj0859suhjvqhvr5i9ubqklmko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm6o72c3h2bs)

[**But NewsGuard slapped us with a misinformation label just because they don’t want the public to hear what we have to say.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5tq0ue4hanpcm8dh5qgcp11vbqqp03q7ic1ncn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm6o72c3h2bs) Here’s just one of many examples of how third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard are hurting organizations like **PragerU** , **Breitbart** , **The Daily Wire** , and **The Babylon Bee** : The company that used to host our videos, **JW Player** , informed us 18 months ago that they were not willing to work with us anymore. When we asked why, they said we had been blacklisted by NewsGuard and claimed our content was “misleading.” Suddenly, we had to devote considerable time and money to find a new video host. Now, NewsGuard is back, threatening to further harm us if we don’t comply with their long list of ridiculous demands.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our famili
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo10iej06fq1csddt2q01df1hn13rb61fjjo4qlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gmepr0c3h2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn2f3616teg7eslbrbbornekrgr4eqqtpdcsfph0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gmepr0c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ntnk5na932m62tccgk2r93gqs0prne2bf04p70_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gmepr0c3h2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3v84jpgfrjoa7lghhn7h6u8fhau8ogcvgh84a80_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gmepr0c3h2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo5qjagrukimko2gf0d4ev7h3i6ni57vpaeqlu68_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gmepr0c3h2bs) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlfrf7tf3g5f03joq4kpr9nh1t5p7f9p7e43v5ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gmepr0c3h2bs)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Both Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema are unfit for any office. Both remind us why we must elect Rep. Ruben Gallego as Arizona’s next Senator in 2024.
body:
Unfit for any office.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55276e88-7421-4fa7-b2fd-88499616e2fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The last few days Kari Lake has reminded us why she is too immoral to hold power and Kyrsten Sinema reminded us why her amorality led Democrats to stop supporting her as she sabotaged the our party. Both reminded us why we must elect Rep. Ruben Gallego Senator in 2024._** [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford, to keep Lake and Sinema from embarrassing the people of Arizona in the Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T468b2901-aa25-4187-a0a1-144cc4ffec6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Kari Lake went on television to proclaim her satisfaction with the fact that election deniers were elected Maricopa County Chairs and Vice Chairs. Meanwhile the top Maricopa County election official--a Republican who had the dignity to push back against Lake's false claims--is still iln hiding with police protection because she won't stop saying the election was stolen and that he was complicit, leading him to get "credible" death threats according to law enforcement. __It was also reported in multiple news outlets that Lake's seriously considering jumping in the Senate race. She is a ghoul unfit for any office. _ _Meahwhile, Sinema was in Davos, Swtizerland today on a panel at the World Economic Forum, hobnobbing with the only people she's willing to meet with, the very wealthy who donate to her campaigns. She attacked the Democratic Party and high-fived Joe Manchin (also on the panel) when she mentioned how they torpedoed the opportunity to eliminate the ruinous filibuster. Interestingly, she didn't mention the 3.7 million more children in poverty because of the expiration of the Child Tax Credit that Democrats would've re-authorized, but Republicans filibustered it. __She is also unfit for any office, including the one she currently holds._
---

| **_Meanwhile, Democratic firm Blueprint Polling released numbers showing a three-way race with Sinema as a spoiler._ _Lake leads Democrat, Ruben Gallego, 35.7-31.9%, with "independent" Sinema at 13.8%. Sinema can't win, but she can hand the election to the utterly awful authoritarian Lake._** **_We CAN'T let this happen. Ruben Gallego's a young, Latino veteran. He's personable, passionate and progressive. And he's so close to matching Lake--within less than four points, with 19% of voters undecided. They will reject Lake's immorality and Sinema's amorality if Gallego has the funds to tell his story, and theirs._** [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90f20cfa-5134-425c-9020-76c58f3b1a6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for supporting a true champion in Gallego, and rejecting the two frauds. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. But we can't do it alone. We need you on our team to make this happen.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our famili
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0luph7tpgshjataprfohdg6ia99cedmiajnp388_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm9pb4chh2bs)
|
---

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoc5lndj52h6jcmoid01d7kfl7ogumad5jjd4ruo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm9pb4chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4t62s2e7ddnuug9d1efelkuqqgmced83brt3qpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm9pb4chh2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqonekbn1r8c53eqqj9ru8eh1jef7cerb1k2m30_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm9pb4chh2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuei1o1qurc9he6l8mul9uijun9ac0upd0qai1e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm9pb4chh2bs) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeeh4nilcvhqjbt48tciotmhauugo8eo62anl2m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1gm9pb4chh2bs)
|

They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. **Privacy is gone.** They will know exactly how much money you have. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Jan. 18th: Hands off our stoves & more!
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to tell Congress to demand answers from the Consumer Product Safety Commission about why they’re trying to ban our gas stoves, ask Speaker McCarthy to allow C-SPAN more access to the House floor, and show your support for Harmeet Dhillon for RNC Chair!
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
The Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) recently announced intentions to ban gas stoves in kitchens, and when outrage ensued, they said that maybe they wouldn’t ban them, but they need more regulation. Regulators under Obama ruined our dishwashers, and now the bureaucrats want our gas stoves. This is an absurd level of intrusion into our lives. [**Please sign our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) urging Congress to demand answers from the CPSC and hold a hearing with CPSC Commissioner Richard Trumka, Jr.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._9jgh4qUwAWuQ)
---
|
---
| | Amid last year’s record-high gas prices, [President Biden ordered](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) the release of roughly 200 million barrels of oil from the nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR), a move his administration said would "address the pain Americans are feeling at the pump." Instead, the administration [sold](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) many of those barrels to the Chinese government and other foreign entities, inhibiting his ability to "lower record pump prices" in the United States, according to [Reuters](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-126vsFiIjFWyQ). At the time, the president pledged to refill SPR by February at a low price that would "turn a profit for the taxpayers.” To date, Biden’s Department of Energy has been unable to make good on the promise, and America’s SPR remains at its lowest level since 1983.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
[**Use our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._F0vNOO0sKyHYow) to urge Speaker McCarthy to allow C-SPAN more access to the House floor than they’ve had before. During the election for Speaker, there was a level of transparency never seen before that Americans loved. We want to keep that kind of transparency going!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-HG81Vw95MjTPFzQ)
---
| | |
---
| | After a high school in Fairfax County Virginia came under fire from parents alleging that the Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology intentionally delayed notifying students that they had received National Merit Awards until after the deadlines for early application at some universities, Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares [has opened an investigation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-fXqCr6JQ) to determine if the school violated the Virginia Human Rights Act. Earlier in the year, a federal judge ruled that the school board had discriminated against Asian students in changing the admissions process for the highly selective school. Parents complain that Asian students, who were disproportionately impacted by the notification delay, were again specifically targeted. The Fairfax County Public Schools woke board recently adopted a new strategy that aims to provide "Equal outcomes for every student, without exceptions.” Parents have called this a “war on merit.” While the county’s school superintendent characterized the issuing of awards as a "one-time human error," last week, the total now stands at _thirteen_ Virginia schools, three in Fairfax, who have admitted they did not inform parents that their children had earned merit awards. Just how widespread the scandal is in Virginia – or across the country – has yet to be determined. But it does serve as a reminder that parental involvement is key to making a difference.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMTgtNjYyNGQxOGIzZDU0NDgzZGFjMTM5Y2Q4ZGE4YWE1ZjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LmFsaWduYWN0LmNvbS9nby9ybmM_bWlkPTQ2MzM2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/k3xVbOGYHvNxXcbd5XH-wg)
---
A majority of our grassroots supporters have told us that they want Harmeet Dhillon to lead the RNC. [**Please use this Align Act campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMTgtNjYyNGQxOGIzZDU0NDgzZGFjMTM5Y2Q4ZGE4YWE1ZjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LmFsaWduYWN0LmNvbS9nby9ybmM_bWlkPTQ2MzM2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/4ETzO3HJdZuHj8U_G1s-uw) to show your support for new leadership at the RNC!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMTgtNjYyNGQxOGIzZDU0NDgzZGFjMTM5Y2Q4ZGE4YWE1ZjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LmFsaWduYWN0LmNvbS9nby9ybmM_bWlkPTQ2MzM2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/PnHHw6xa1t-7iwgKItOzBQ)
---
|
---
| | It’s no secret that the Left’s woke agenda is permeating the U.S. military, business sector and academia. Last week, a classic [example](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) of this nonsense came from the University of Southern California’s School of Social Work, which declared that the word “field” could no longer refer to a person’s professional area of expertise. Going forward, “practicum” would be the preferred term, in adherence with the leftist orthodoxy of "[anti-racist](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)" methodology. According to university administrators, “field,” evokes racist connotations potentially offensive to descendants of slavery and immigrants who once engaged in field work. "This change supports anti-racist social work practice by replacing language that could be considered anti-Black or anti-immigrant in favor of inclusive language,” administrators wrote. No evidence that the term is offensive to students, faculty or anyone else was offered.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._-xnZ8crU9eqBg)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMTgtNjYyNGQxOGIzZDU0NDgzZGFjMTM5Y2Q4ZGE4YWE1ZjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzM2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/qqWLzLTxuiLeLUY5RBHQig)

name: Shift WA
subject: Fact Check: Inslee’s top 3 biggest lies
body:
We asked readers like you to help fact check Jay Inslee's State of the State address. Many of you wrote in pointing out Inslee's biggest lies. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395965:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Last week, we asked readers like you to help fact check Jay Inslee's State of the State address. Many of you wrote in to point out Inslee's biggest lies. And we wanted to highlight the top three lies which concerned Washingtonians like you caught him telling.

So, without further ado, here are Inslee's top three most blatant lies during his recent State of the State address:

1. **CLAIM:** "Not only are [the climate policies we passed] driving down polluting emissions, they are also creating thousands of clean energy jobs across the state.
**
REALITY:** Year after year, [scientific data](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395966:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r) from the Washington Department of Ecology reveals that Inslee's environmental policies have failed to drive down greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions in the state. Rather, emissions continue to increase.

2. **CLAIM:** "There are multiple reasons [for growing homelessness]. Though some people face behavioral health challenges or chemical addiction issues, the fundamental, underlying challenge is that we don't have enough housing.
**
REALITY:** Housing shortages remain a serious problem for communities across our state. But Inslee concentrating his solution for growing homelessness on housing ignores the mental health crisis at the root of the problem. One has to look no further than the [millions of taxpayer dollars spent](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395967:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r) by King County and the City of Seattle on failed homeless housing projects. Far from providing solutions, homelessness rose across King County. Inslee's [poor record on addressing mental health](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395968:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r) is an embarrassment to our state. His refusal to concentrate solutions on addressing the growing mental health and substance abuse crisis will only make matters worse.

3. **CLAIM:** "If we continue building on the investments and policies we've started, we can continue building a Washington... where communities feel welcoming and safe to all."
**
REALITY:** Inslee pointed to public safety as an issue the 2023 legislature must address. But he concentrated his remarks on passing and enforcing stricter gun control measures. Not once did he mention the need to repeal the [failed police "reform" measures](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395969:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r) jammed through by Democrat lawmakers during the 2021 legislative session. These policies have tied the hands of law enforcement officers, and our communities are less safe because of them.

We here at Shift WA are hard at work tracking what is happening in Olympia during the 2023 legislative session. The last few years have proved that you cannot trust mainstream media outlets to keep you informed of the facts. That's why our efforts are so important.

[**With the 2023 legislative session launching last week, will you contribute $100, $50, or even $25 to help us report on the bills you need to know about?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395970:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61395971:WaVO_EDNF:m:1:2610672541:05D9E84B4BD15AC97B63CF3CEDC03F91:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14115613&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWaVO_EDNF).
---

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Socialism is experiencing a revival
body:
Hayek told us that, if old truths are to retain their hold on men's minds, they must be restated in the language and concepts of successive generations.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDE4LTUyNDBlZmNiNDJkNDQ2YjQ4OTVjZGNlNTg5NjhhMzY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2hwLXJldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhwX3Jldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8zNDU2OSZvbGM9NDE4NDYifQ/VUA_NR1Chd4mMV4or9-HTQ)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Noble Prize winning economist F.A. Hayek told us that if old truths are to retain their hold on men’s minds, they must be restated in the language and concepts of successive generations.

Scores of Americans weren’t alive to experience the many atrocities of the 20th century that were caused by socialist systems. Because of this, socialist ideas are experiencing a revival in the U.S. and around the world. Proponents claim a more compassionate and positive effect on human flourishing.

But what is the truth?

To answer this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a group of its scholars to study the revival of socialism and current policy debates between socialist factions and their free-market counterparts.

And the results are eye-opening.

From what I’m told, you are someone who would be interested in learning about this phenomenon, and that’s why I’m emailing you today.

Our team recently launched a new online course called Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism: The Revival of Socialism in Current Policy Debates, so you can learn directly from these scholars about their findings. And I want to invite you to take it for FREE as my guest.

Inside these 6 lessons you’ll learn about:

* Constitutional safeguards against socialism
* False promises of socialism
* The effects of overregulation and anti-poverty policies

You can activate your free online course right now by using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/hp-revival_socialism-signup/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDE4LTUyNDBlZmNiNDJkNDQ2YjQ4OTVjZGNlNTg5NjhhMzY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2hwLXJldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhwX3Jldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8zNDU2OSZvbGM9NDE4NDYifQ/A9cI-7n4j719SUiON3JLAA)**

When you do, you’ll receive Lesson 1 by email within minutes. Subsequent lessons will be emailed to you every 5 days until the course is completed.

With socialism experiencing a revival, it is vital that we revisit its record so we can restate its consequences “in the language and concepts of successive generations.”

I hope you’ll take me up on this offer to refresh your learning about the revival of socialism. **[Please use this link to get instant access to your free online course today!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDE4LTUyNDBlZmNiNDJkNDQ2YjQ4OTVjZGNlNTg5NjhhMzY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2hwLXJldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhwX3Jldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8zNDU2OSZvbGM9NDE4NDYifQ/Ryw9V8lFQYl1bLWktng2XQ)**
Thank you,
Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: One very important question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Hello,

Remember the emails my team sent you ahead of Election Day saying that our budget was tight?

In order to execute our plan for victory and stand up to the last-minute barrage of far-right attacks against us, we took a leap of faith and made investments not knowing exactly how much money would come in. We trusted that our most important supporters (folks like you!) would be willing to help us out in a pinch.

I’m emailing today to ask for your help closing the gap so that we can get our last bills of the year paid on time. **[_If enough of you split $5 right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s, we can retire this debt quickly, and I can focus on the future. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57462710/388052728/-376037004?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3872-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2ViYWJjMC00NTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QsfD_HKXKVfPFAdGE_uqlc3pfxQQGRKYlnSm6FZvlBw=)**

I’m so grateful for your support and it is truly the honor of my life to serve in the Senate. Thank you for anything you can give.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=VVlt2xznbn70GAL65iJTGwfjcr%2FWlolEN8vOMtpr%2BGfdVUHgMj5jM7NiZLr%2B1ghoegSRd4zMOIQMDbanf43SxfNxkYIzBH6%2FekC%2F3YmGc5zVcWDRV0D8fBdC%2FD93r7w%2BjSV%2FfxUDWfRPyM5klpNLV3Pejaq19NDxbhHbk3%2B9K7N3eiTEpqokna7hkFPDPaSBPq4%2BJ6oWkUGMRke8QaW36F%2BMXtL1thNty2TTCRCE0S21R6KQmdNDKcwOAt4XMX4Ea9cMysj714bjw0nBQzad6p3YOvBNKwWWigCoVEDzdCGyz9zhVfiZfxEWcqICc2EPgaFcdX3lriVU61Rn3W80iYl9DHeUpcxvKSCHj1AHiRRCQRleWn0VFHJKyKIF71mn3oubliaXOYxzJ7TibIaddP70X8Aj5yU7DflTyYr3YyA%3D).

| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65686dced5b44c688c912918e874e58&_e=dSgcc8ZjjO99tLsK-QfiiFgNoty4_ZrqxWJrLNA_u85pgUpbtbyMYJwWqdr3TCjHaOLKOHMdI_6ARTg0Oaj1skfTC4Xl3smsiHnRWYlscYCXrjPx6osGgEYgX9_c6sCRD9fA58DsTRH-Xe1575jFeIkaJfz0bvoZXQ9kqN9GzpTzdlNFh972EcwwioyKLrXR_iUfUKpsOhs1ZLVTeS4h2YQdVRxRy19Bc38P8YQq9E9XbdtWCNupOyXbmIO2ZxsCA6n_moZtOJvuM4cV-34rgIzcNtnFKXIKTx9OJvk9yhT_C7rqFL5QkX0747M38x4yX4CGvQ0rQG-6nwePMmx2dgt4P2YlNIkLJyfP2BlvTaBrF0Fh77U9Wb5y2TwikW57) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65686dced5b44c688c912918e874e58&_e=dSgcc8ZjjO99tLsK-QfiiFgNoty4_ZrqxWJrLNA_u85pgUpbtbyMYJwWqdr3TCjHaOLKOHMdI_6ARTg0Oaj1skfTC4Xl3smsiHnRWYlscYCXrjPx6osGgEYgX9_c6sCRD9fA58DsTRH-Xe1575jFeIkaJfz0bvoZXQ9kqN9GzpTzdlNFh972EcwwioyKLrXR_iUfUKpsOhs1ZLVTeS4h2YQdVRxRy19Bc38P8YQq9E9y2oKdSXpzH24j3vo9mF2VwHpiiU3YfRCHkWZiVbpJpuu-yqtNmjiRwoHlkK0tqA4mOs8tIQkUOZIOOHIb5mSzpy_Ah85JfMePxvx-jGKIz6UiAP1UVXY8bTnHpAYetBEhy3NVNYd1MWTLKeaZ5A45) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: You don’t hear this enough: thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
|
---
| | | Hey, this is Steve Scalise. I hope you had a great weekend, Friend.

It was a busy first week in the new Congress and I want to make sure you had the highlights about what we've accomplished together:

- We put **JIM JORDAN** in charge of investigating political corruption in the FBI/federal government
- We established a committee specifically for **STANDING UP TO CHINA**
- We voted to **DEFUND** Joe Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents
- We passed a strong **PRO-LIFE** bill to defend our most vulnerable
- We voted to **STOP JOE BIDEN** from selling American oil to Communist China

_And we 're just getting started._

You have a lot to be proud of. It was because of your hard work, willingness to answer our surveys, and generous contributions that Republicans took back control of the House. You don't hear this enough: **thank you, Friend!**

Because of everything you've done for our movement, I'm excited to personally offer you a coveted spot in my _**[Majority Leader's Founding Circle.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99281fb84d482e94622f0ebbf1b2c9&_e=X5dKyvEfwml58_KZIJzTcNcr15Ywq25AB26anFNMU-0S1uWK7ie_k3j7Z8RpXfWe5kp85cxz_1TUzLqg39ww8dPqANy0DG6q1Abbxm1vDyfHsZdHMCQHyafbkI8IPf3QV1dlgRKWzg4v9odDSD7hkQ0-yXPZUCY8RxUh8pbpc-jV6MCWsS_6nacbkXpgSmz94KcJb0lBb0O9MEW_SIg90HvCy1hygYlup6RkvwaL2RAulDBRQrUPliLCcLbsYwHl-3IppgM2FjKEbRou7LLWaVWMw7rgTnsPmeUloSGg8HodaTg0S26POn_X4W2m6nhCb37PO4iPXXTSdvjknSW46-LQgsUY7qWUxRoSIeVjtjeB7eBs3j8hI9m4-ApbRuXwmbIe9P2Pmu4sXjG-Lq-MAYn5jPFTlEBym_uFa_jZF1WZhGipkGavt8V5cMXQoYAvojB_JcMgmwZ8HWDoqKv9Rw%3D%3D "Majority Leader’s Founding Circle.")**_ You may have heard of it before since it's a big honor reserved for our most dedicated supporters. _And I 'm pleased to announce you made the cut. _

I'm giving you until the end of the day to claim your spot in this tight-knit group. After that, I'm afraid I'll have to give your spot to the next Conservative on my list.

Here's your secure link to claim your spot:

---
| | [MAJORITY LEADER'S FOUNDING CIRCLE:
CLAIM YOUR SPOT >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99281fb84d482e94622f0ebbf1b2c9&_e=X5dKyvEfwml58_KZIJzTcNcr15Ywq25AB26anFNMU-0S1uWK7ie_k3j7Z8RpXfWe5kp85cxz_1TUzLqg39ww8dPqANy0DG6q1Abbxm1vDyfHsZdHMCQHyafbkI8IPf3QV1dlgRKWzg4v9odDSD7hkQ0-yXPZUCY8RxUh8pbpc-jV6MCWsS_6nacbkXpgSmz94KcJb0lBb0O9MEW_SIg90HvCy1hygYlup6RkvwaL2RAulDBRQrUPliLCcLbsYwHl-3IppgM2FjKEbRou7LLWaVWMw7rgTnsPmeUloSGg8HodaTg0S26POn_X4W2m6nhCIKTtoR94fLjk9yNsoh53HWOM911Ej4bnL-JybwI7-KDeMfMMonm7gH1NtlPh5jRxJCX9AeLWjA1FREfQWCnXhVB70l7ZzmlBCpgkkbCIYr1PSjgo6wFLZgA-evp3izQ0hiSTZvMx36zx9optpmrCqw%3D%3D)

I appreciate all you've done for our movement and I hope we're making you proud. Don't forget that your invitation is active TODAY ONLY, so please don't hesitate to respond.

I look forward to seeing your name be added to my official roster. I get notified immediately!

Thanks for all you do.

Steve Scalise

name: SmartAsset
subject: 7 Mistakes People Make When Hiring a Financial Advisor
body:
# **7 Mistakes People Make When Choosing a Financial Advisor**
Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come.
A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1
The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who [**work with a financial advisor**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWPuTk3hCVeYpl99YzhCiw6tGH9pz8L7I-jmGg1rPqyl14UNQ3KrgnwoK--OnEtFzva2UbWOO6jQPwz6UU-iWAxVRReKv2559ZftwU_VveFAJVojN45_Vp0Hk7fOgi-WVQLEaGimO6hJx6C-M4prf0LVSikwSjFFz0WG9Q_ZEyy44g%3D%3D) feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2
Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3
[**SmartAsset 's no-cost tool**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWMRgGU2Qy1VQkIKmIShqWYsPrRmuhUUdinYJROfBx6eBZ-cuqIDDZizn7LziNI1GXpNtKEnoTEOvthTXEH2wkbTwMKfpBuwxcdzNdP9mkTSUSNVieXRnMwYPL0rdqNSvsslEF3bMlHwcJTetBXShlNXlWPOPJxw-BgcApJkws6ZoQ%3D%3D) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation.
Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process.
Being aware of these seven common blunders when [**choosing an advisor**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWPfytqRE98VsJXdGM8wOcuzKxyip-ty90RuhZKaytnR8mTtJbekiVfKe3ki5hhEiFZ-YscMFTlxeKNwyA09oA_SRHbyPnMyz25c-cuw2vQTbcrEv9E7oLI6Hv4S-U9vKq22dP7tFRwbwj1pyqvENg5bLlvu4FgmXrfbwmy-EuuQ9w%3D%3D) can help you find peace of mind, and potentially avoid years of stress.
**1\. Hiring an Advisor Who Is Not a Fiduciary**
By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person's best interest. Fiduciary financial advisors must avoid conflicts of interest and disclose any potential conflicts of interest to clients.
All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset's matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, [**use this no-cost tool to find an advisor**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWMrY6t4-niGU1UFRjcVc-pNc70C7Ko2KYOZ83XVFMOUO9KUXdqYltSqxuuRQaeNCYg9VO-_MX8sV6SnNXSjNEnpQWIIOHjZzbeiWtizANHsV5ng5iAwiAegRS86Quay1YkFJcQrUcKVx4BFuuDqHxhj8lLSCT_MVwXapwj96v4vig%3D%3D) who has your best interest in mind.
**2\. Hiring the First Advisor You Meet**
While it's tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you.
**3\. Choosing an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty**
Some financial advisors [**specialize in retirement planning**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWPC0VGfNILQtYqqs84OsnUIB0K5zRIoLWnp49-z0FfmVjkMjq_qz3mIYh-n_dfg_Y1UZl2CSXGPHzOOxDBiLacFwcG4ECmSuXBs3-n8o4AVlwE1PYCx70PLkXm7fubJP7dQISDcGMgayVly8Ql8reByUIhF7QNzP72TQrDKSrX-lw%3D%3D) , while others are best for business owners or those with a high net worth. Some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor's strengths and weaknesses - before signing the dotted line.
**4\. Picking an Advisor with an Incompatible Strategy**
Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style.
**5\. Not Asking about Credentials**
To give investment advice, [**financial advisors**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWOTFWdgnQbdX7YLrOgY_3ualCtPBFBCpCmBGuuXgwvDRGr2bOzdBKYU7eI3ilvz7TZ1SVbG3EgybbPTb_J6KQwvsTtdzFqp9oGBvteNVW4747WWpHGdyxHzAjOKUWZ8C8uEb52bfRUFV09EnzMfAQ30XGkkYILTIrsIUZ3smHlMOQ%3D%3D) are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests, and credentials. Financial advisors tests include the Series 7, and Series 66 or Series 65. Some advisors go a step further and become a Certified Financial Planner, or CFP.
**6\. Not Understanding How They are Paid**
Some advisors are "fee only" and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them.
**7\. Not Hiring a Vetted Advisor**
Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one.
Our no-cost tool makes it easy to [**find a qualified financial advisor**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24097ee49642a5a00443d60b421748&_e=JVwYeT3QmKgqHq18m5hi88PnfOfsHyG5qJG4IUoJ-9yUCN_k6fUyhYxV5Cyk29lCpES5hsBY-fp-7ffubOGoWDz8wpdkPEfiRP6zgGIMmmnN24zKTO7B2QtpNRxjjKHLjiaqHSBtenmp0yQ_5PDtQyOepmgCvIS6xR_UA_RzY6MQLOpho8Y_xDPCtpy8jQLcY_xfDuRkC__wiYJ-eW9A4pvP8oIGLypik4hPmeEgyhmoWWYb7NjlK-6_Mj_T01QzhyjFV-4cgtlLLhG14B4mQx_S_-45ji9azU8vgF7tUWNf32b0KQLNRyIRcCmsUggut-SsUdTSF2T_dYJ1WbysexJL3UJGvSTrcBU46hUG50pGT66m3d_imwBg_7ohGDRpNf_DxUWXl0Wa4ycKantEbnyfuTYH1UCuY3TJjLjOQhY4C14HctV_G4uzEHdKkaRUS5dvdbS6EEs-Wpni8tWdxg%3D%3D). clean_body: 7 Mistakes People Make When Choosing a Financial Advisor Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3 simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation. Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process. Being aware of these seven common blunders when can help you find peace of mind, and potentially avoid years of stress. 1\. Hiring an Advisor Who Is Not a Fiduciary By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person's best interest. Fiduciary financial advisors must avoid conflicts of interest and disclose any potential conflicts of interest to clients. All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset's matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, who has your best interest in mind. 2\. Hiring the First Advisor You Meet While it's tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you. 3\. Choosing an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty Some financial advisors , while others are best for business owners or those with a high net worth. Some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor's strengths and weaknesses - before signing the dotted line. 4\. Picking an Advisor with an Incompatible Strategy Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style. 5\. Not Asking about Credentials To give investment advice, are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests, and credentials. Financial advisors tests include the Series 7, and Series 66 or Series 65. Some advisors go a step further and become a Certified Financial Planner, or CFP. 6\. Not Understanding How They are Paid Some advisors are "fee only" and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them. 7\. Not Hiring a Vetted Advisor Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one. Our no-cost tool makes it easy to . The entire matching process takes just a few minutes. Sources: 1\. 2\. name: Candace Owens
subject: You’re a weird person… Want to know why?
body:
I refuse to let the fear of being a “weirdo” stop me from fighting for our country.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z48av4434bkfsp23jmpai0co4tpgh3nbndieofno_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slncpjm9otmc9r6fdtn6lpb9phmcqq6csj4m2qn5djieiq3ed5lmlp79d3mm3g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p78phkciqr8ptim1j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeob0clge4o33c8iv0)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeifras6psoetttjar2cdlcs7bl8enb9g3sskj5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
Friend,

You are not normal.

Some would call you strange.

In fact, the media, our deranged culture, and our government may even consider you dangerous...

Why?

**Because you love our country, FIGHT for Faith, Family, and Freedom, and see through the lies of victimhood culture and the media. **

This makes you a weirdo in today's society.

Well, it makes me a weirdo too. A proud one.

However, I've been called much nastier than weirdo. I've been called racist, an "Uncle Tom," evil, a Nazi, Hitler, the Devil, and every name in the book. The media and unhinged social media activists have even attacked my children with nasty messages.

Why?

Because as a young black woman, the media DOES NOT want me to believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. I'm not _" allowed"_ to speak out against what's happening in our public schools and how the media and the culture of victimhood are destroying the lives of minorities in our inner cities.

_Well, I refuse to let the fear of being a "weirdo" stop me from fighting for our country_.

**Which is why I am asking you to join me, and thousands of other "weirdos," to support the BLEXIT Foundation!**

The BLEXIT Foundation is my non-profit organization dedicated to uplifting and empowering minorities with our message of independence, entrepreneurship, and the importance of Faith, Family, and Freedom. The BLEXIT movement is fostering patriotism in Black America, and destroying the culture of victimhood the media is forcing upon young minorities.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation reach our fundraising goal of $10,000 by making a donation of any amount! **_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0afn3n02csham9njamp00fkv2nv33h8i0ejlmro_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
