[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8nlagee2cgdrs3ipta6p3u2f6v7cda883lbk8io_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfeeb414uthppu8vk6r3fgnq9b9o2p73uc7a8k8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbucecsm7n3kkvj1todftvp0ut97g0pbtprd55vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7siqgi2cht930seub0lg7pim2pk745mrb55pl38_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu989eroe6ebt1ksoomkebu30h2v892ejv7d5qp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj8j3e57p80pva8vrn0vjahn7pk1lnkdue8qagmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7d2vqg551iumd0bhvo1tos9si959bp6hn18d7e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)

I know this is a long email... Please keep reading so I can tell you more about the BLEXIT movement, our 14,000 members, and something **BIG** at the end of this message.

The BLEXIT movement, our family of proud 'weirdos', has over 14,000 members, and 60,000 grassroots supporters with chapters in 43 states and D.C.

**The BLEXIT family is dedicated to changing the direction of our country and culture. **

Here is how the BLEXIT Foundation fights for Faith, Family, and Freedom:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp4a6ja7gmr7pj87nbov19b154momd8rv7fk3pe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zieud1cd5ms654ib9cg86erq1p60tf42o2rmmd3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)

* **Fostering Black Patriotism:** Critical Race Theory does not solve race relations in our country. Nor does teaching young people in urban communities to distrust or even hate police officers.

This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes fostering patriotism in urban communities will heal communities. We also believe teaching REAL American history will cultivate better-educated and more predictive citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation foster patriotism in Black America by donating here >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z153o0v8veiugsf3lq0iubma3phf1kfflpf5gal0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1im1oj0cdh2bs)

* **Faith and Family:** Strong family bonds and a belief in our Savior, Jesus Christ, is our GREATEST defense against a sick culture, division, and the Woke agenda. We teach the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal urban communities.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Dismantling the COVID Cartel
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d131121fcd869fd2089f71ce6bf5222e8492d6c59efd633798df24c8dbb4cb21e1527c94ad799e18b4fc288bf5d4895348e7fad6432ea8f7526208b124630cf9f9a13906df33abd036366e472f33bc96

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=528a43608f9d002e0c3d365d9cf9249788f0e450cf1e08fc640f7a36f58894a6432d577f9527d50691bd65292c08b3be3f88d797064a6fce6138b34a47121a09

Peter,
Yesterday, Governor Ron DeSantis sent a message to the COVID Cartel in Washington: your tyrannical policies are dead on arrival in the Sunshine State.

The Governor unveiled proposed legislation to ensure Floridians are permanently protected from the biomedical security state, so that Florida will always remain freedom’s linchpin.

The proposal will:

❌ Make Florida’s first-in-the-nation ban on vaccine passports permanent

❌ Ensure that students in Florida can never be required to get COVID shots or wear masks to go to school

❌ Permanently ban employers from hiring, firing, or discriminating against employees based on mRNA jabs

✅ Protect medical professionals’ freedom of speech – the opposite of California’s new law, which censors doctors who dissent from the COVID cartel

When it wasn’t easy, Governor DeSantis stood against the most powerful institutions within our society – the bureaucracy, the medical establishment, and the legacy media – to protect individual freedom.

“When the world lost its mind, Florida was a refuge of sanity, serving strongly as freedom’s linchpin. These measures will ensure Florida remains this way and will provide landmark protections for free speech for medical practitioners.” — Governor DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=528a43608f9d002e0c3d365d9cf9249788f0e450cf1e08fc640f7a36f58894a6432d577f9527d50691bd65292c08b3be3f88d797064a6fce6138b34a47121a09

No Floridian will lose their job, or be denied a job, based on the COVID jab.

No Floridian will be forced to sit at a different lunch table, or work in a special ward, because of their personal medical decisions about COVID shots.

Florida is the ONLY state making these protections of individual rights PERMANENT. Governor DeSantis doesn’t just talk the talk; he walks the walk and delivers for the people he serves.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=528a43608f9d002e0c3d365d9cf9249788f0e450cf1e08fc640f7a36f58894a6432d577f9527d50691bd65292c08b3be3f88d797064a6fce6138b34a47121a09
>>">Add your name if you stand with Governor DeSantis and his Freedom Agenda >>>

For freedom,

Team DeSantis

name: David McIntosh, Club for Growth Action
subject: Why we need HIM in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | Hey Peter, I have someone I want to introduce you to: **Congressman Jim Banks.**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | Jim's a devoted husband, a proud father of three, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and **he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana.**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN $25 or MORE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom's Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | **But his fight didn 't stop there. ** In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. Jim knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, and**that is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee 's Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation's fiscal house in order. **
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | **Jim is a proven fiscal conservative leader who will fight for a pro-growth agenda, and that 's exactly why Club for Growth Action is backing his fight for the U.S. Senate. ** **[_Peter, will you send Jim Banks to the U.S. Senate to restore fiscal sanity to our government?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220682:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r)
---
| | Thank you, David McIntosh Club for Growth Action
---
| | Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at [www.clubforgrowth.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62220683:JHIcHKGCN:m:1:3331421248:A6E24A349D792BF387DB28E20C0AD689:r) or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. name: Great America Update
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7548%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=pcmVAeRfI%2bwhsvyy7pkiDQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78628%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SEhvvCOpY5fitQB%2bot7d7g&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78629%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=63JvY0P1GsEOB0w1rWsaSw&sysid=1)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78620%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mN%2bIJNHSNLzUPxawUD0X3g&sysid=1)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7548%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=pcmVAeRfI%2bwhsvyy7pkiDQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7548%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=pcmVAeRfI%2bwhsvyy7pkiDQ&sysid=1)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our famili
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkr2415s3ijbajc43labcqsr0aro7r0757o812g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm8oj4cdh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpufj93o1hqb9sssvj5u1jg7qa94p5ga6c44tlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm8oj4cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohomt3eld1gvsrco1u9ieairddhsee3u7fq5ji0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm8oj4cdh2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4p5mtlpo3ud83or6dp8ks0mgd5d8v3qgc9qeq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm8oj4cdh2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z051ohk9ncfqcuqp9kbsdv4edlc6m194d9vomhoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm8oj4cdh2bs) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs8bibsjqvdme23bpg24linptkrie5ps527fus20_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm8oj4cdh2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5jemebdc1q19eo3snf367h7u98plj47q3tbasm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm4p36c5h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlqaligiujre70rlunnk4befu1t8mvg69tcmkobg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm4p36c5h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd9c5om2hmj96ifgrrmvsl7juuq2hfkc39m4bb98_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm4p36c5h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. body:

Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfke0vbqmeba1jj3k62dqu2skl39c6097efbn0jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hmco34chh2bs)

---

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1nore7v8oomc9jopf8frtrahc19g46k178q5qug_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hmco34chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9ss98tgdja4d5qunv92ptjg9jtnui9sef55tb20_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hmco34chh2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztmanajono8ai2nikbjcb83cun3iml082ee4hnmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hmco34chh2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpe1idssm5gck47but6ne60igcmq8kgpvj5mfgao_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hmco34chh2bs) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z17pbvbt26ptkbicb7erj9gnfq0labhtch1ih8d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hmco34chh2bs)

This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured. That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were”
isn’t good enough.

It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits
while more and more families can’t afford necessities.

It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at
school after a shooting in a nearby church.

It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion
nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans
funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families,
making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to
Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must
prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running
for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18866?t=1001&akid=2903%2E346206%2EEDxucs ]Can you make a donation
today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s
progressive movement?

CHIP IN →

I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the
House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the
House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to
fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional
stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings
is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional
hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass
bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are
driving inflation.

Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I
worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five
biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the
banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks,
forcing them to pay California families billions.

I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and
more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth
Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and
expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18866?t=1002&akid=2903%2E346206%2EEDxucs ]Can you
make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate
campaign?

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230118-2903-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2903_346206_EDxucs&akid=2903%2E346206%2EEDxucs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2903%2E346206%2EEDxucs

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac45cbd9688b45edb021aab8d2bdb9ea&_e=mwl3iYYUxI3PRlBGPoR3QPTTX8NctVEy9Op1Ko-V41_g8y0M_xunJ1Uy4hgRP8gapmSGfJnGx3kZDqi0MlYOo4nJgai5ZasZ53FGWrLqyuWlJUANmZA4_JId-UCw3MxNFA22k0_b78-RAP58G50MGZN2oJm31bZrbsnSZR1WFAw81g42wTx6xm2pqye26cgS72GJWhx0TBoA02zB36Okw8ISP3YZ36tRQiIKNGmNGKxPcz_K6ml2mOoJGK4c313SFTyDdcWPguXInESyI5lzx5bhVsjS_3lUeANnDYFiazGBWqE3u-fkybogio5i4qyt5PiRdgkCxc6aAh4EsU2UhimQO3ebSddAUUIhPZwGygQ%3D) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

"House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public. "_

**Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they're trying to bury that evidence until everyone they've falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!

** And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac45cbd9688b45edb021aab8d2bdb9ea&_e=mwl3iYYUxI3PRlBGPoR3QPTTX8NctVEy9Op1Ko-V41_g8y0M_xunJ1Uy4hgRP8gapmSGfJnGx3kZDqi0MlYOo4nJgai5ZasZ53FGWrLqyuWlJUANmZA4_JId-UCw3MxNFA22k0_b78-RAP58G50MGZN2oJm31bZrbsnSZR1WFAw81g42wTx6xm2pqye26cgS72GJWhx0TBoA02zB36Okw-YVsy9IYGlQUxIMwxv-Xwx4iNq_liUf321NHGUdOkh1gYGd8hixXA_5v1P1M8qrzL_KMTfb9MukjmLBiGxc-EzHbSwFW_d6_nKPg6igeULQUfaaigTbPF5daJNlKZ0Lxscwq-R_WllO2-x__j1E_BI%3D) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it 's been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters. **

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac45cbd9688b45edb021aab8d2bdb9ea&_e=mwl3iYYUxI3PRlBGPoR3QPTTX8NctVEy9Op1Ko-V41_g8y0M_xunJ1Uy4hgRP8gapmSGfJnGx3kZDqi0MlYOo4nJgai5ZasZ53FGWrLqyuWlJUANmZA4_JId-UCw3MxNFA22k0_b78-RAP58G50MGZN2oJm31bZrbsnSZR1WFAw81g42wTx6xm2pqye26cgS72GJWhx0TBoA02zB36Okw1icBuCxagDZbPN0yscLo-GO0kvhoVWcoo3mLgnGEbKCYgGfjJ6lEveSW__hNfFMur9iDMPbauWL4bplav2_PRGF4K2ltwAb-IymAEEyv52Ca8qeyeO7n0a3KPwxQS2YonfwBNh3-h-QrC3Wp4Rz3zE%3D)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sherrod Brown has defied the odds time and again, so Republicans are going to try and drown him in a pile of cash in 2024. Help him fight back?
body:
Keep this Senate seat!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3bbb597a-1635-4be0-91b3-7f09bbe55552/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Sherrod Brown is not just a bright light in Ohio, he's our sun (and much the same nationally for working people and progressives)._** _Because the Ohio GOP controls nearly everything, defies our courts and uses gerrymandering and now an egregious voter suppression law just passed to be handed what they can't win, they have a lock on most positions of power._ **_Sherrod's defied them, winning time and again._** He's a Senator because he beat then Senator Mike DeWine in '06. **_So, here comes wealthy Republican, state Sen Matt Dolan, to try to drown him in campaign cash._** Dolan won't have Peter Thiel's money (that we know of) like J.D. Vance, which upended a 50-50 race for Tim Ryan. But Dolan's loaded, as he proved by spending ~$11 Million outta pocket to lose to Vance in the GOP Senate primaries in '22. [_WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta31493fd-c86d-4170-8817-acb2a2cf2a76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you're from NYC you're likely familiar with the Dolan family's ineptitude. Matt's cousin, James, CEO of Madison Square Garden sports, has presided over a tenure of total failure and sexual harassment. Matt wants the seat because he's rich. That's it. He's using the right-wing playbook of blabbing about inflation (Note: it's coming down) and calling Sherrod a partisan. LOL.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2c85140-9f39-427f-beb0-4527c766382d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Sherrod's been outstanding on every issue we care about from abortion rights to gun safety, a living wage to climate. But, on issues like trade, he breaks with the party to fight for Ohio's working class. He ain't partisan._** **_What he is, to be honest, is a national treasure. _**_We can keep him in the Senate, or allow a spoiled brat resembling Donald Trump, Rick Scott & Vance take the seat and have its progressive values do a total 180 towards autocracy._ [_So WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a18df0d-0363-4ecc-8e4d-3f91f39fc4d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks so much for continuing to fight. Cliff

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf97188bf-23cd-45dd-9b51-e373ac515788/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj6rh7cm78e1dqaacp32eh70i09j8vpq92eojla0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm2o74cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv1jqehaks3acer4sa8fvkk03np2n1hggc7a2djg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm2o74cth2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb4b9pee4923bgsg1d8te00hb5hcolpbo2np64r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm2o74cth2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zn39jce955leufc8631md2f8f5u98t30relaobbo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlmlabj7r165p2qoltbt2t7v1gct8hesjl6gbsr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm2o74cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Never stop fighting to put America FIRST
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HWjdhPP288y_HyU-LuiY-f8AwB87ul8JE41mB1RvE5yevPoRNc_ekeIq0gzjOgLMI00njC4QRrlNP44bHaDVqHhHOZvnX6LbjWan7Gaprj-eK2e5cGsBZKMkcUJ5BBa3y3a2uqnQVHDsDb0pMiMhkoobdx5wDR8IqQLj7DKS1em3fg3SObivveGOpqV1sRp9O77B57Mb0S6_r-lm0BzMIFCFa7ujjJ-Oy5_WDhOdjCIdgPsbTPatcQ==&c=Y1CzIX9Yc5_SgXs_J0nD83iucmeArEHHkP2Qgk8EGcPMntmphHUMmQ==&ch=GFT1RuyUdFNClX1JeMViII-roT9fv6jc1J7-jP-KTWkUG9op2cavcg==)

| Friend
I won't stop fighting to put America First.
Friend I know you need solutions, which is why it's our top priority to put you, your families, your community, and our entire country FIRST!
We're already bringing you the policies you need, like defunding Biden's IRS army from targeting our finances. [We have even more America First votes to come, but to ensure we end Biden's crises, I need your support every step of the way.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HWjdhPP288y_HyU-LuiY-f8AwB87ul8JE41mB1RvE5yevPoRNc_ekeIq0gzjOgLMI00njC4QRrlNP44bHaDVqHhHOZvnX6LbjWan7Gaprj-eK2e5cGsBZKMkcUJ5BBa3y3a2uqnQVHDsDb0pMiMhkoobdx5wDR8IqQLj7DKS1em3fg3SObivveGOpqV1sRp9O77B57Mb0S6_r-lm0BzMIFCFa7ujjJ-Oy5_WDhOdjCIdgPsbTPatcQ==&c=Y1CzIX9Yc5_SgXs_J0nD83iucmeArEHHkP2Qgk8EGcPMntmphHUMmQ==&ch=GFT1RuyUdFNClX1JeMViII-roT9fv6jc1J7-jP-KTWkUG9op2cavcg==)

| Our nation deserves affordable prices, a secure border, and safe streets. There is simply no excuse for how the Left has run our nation into the ground.
We've fought so hard to take back the House, but now that we have, it's up to us to make the most of it these next two years. Help will be here before we know it, and while we get ready to pick up the fight, [you can support Republicans fighting to put YOU first.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HWjdhPP288y_HyU-LuiY-f8AwB87ul8JE41mB1RvE5yevPoRNc_ekeIq0gzjOgLMI00njC4QRrlNP44bHaDVqHhHOZvnX6LbjWan7Gaprj-eK2e5cGsBZKMkcUJ5BBa3y3a2uqnQVHDsDb0pMiMhkoobdx5wDR8IqQLj7DKS1em3fg3SObivveGOpqV1sRp9O77B57Mb0S6_r-lm0BzMIFCFa7ujjJ-Oy5_WDhOdjCIdgPsbTPatcQ==&c=Y1CzIX9Yc5_SgXs_J0nD83iucmeArEHHkP2Qgk8EGcPMntmphHUMmQ==&ch=GFT1RuyUdFNClX1JeMViII-roT9fv6jc1J7-jP-KTWkUG9op2cavcg==)

name: American Briefing
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkosd176hkhcl0q3k9hh3713fj2771ssvggvh1ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm6or4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf1dig81o6lhq7qqc1j652p5s56ci7shv1ph3bv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm6or4chh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ecosmqqonogd3obf8ftqt0p9tcti38hrbbha20_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm6or4chh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2z9ng6pj9e1s7hil4f0jfb6d8b4k0jvt0i7adr9ko).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9knh7fekfooe8bbgtmsgv6c4e0c4u51hdeat76g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1hm6or4chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Halfway There…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www

We need your help to put us over the edge

Derek, **This is a critical month in Virginia politics.** With the General Assembly session in full swing, it’s more important than ever that we do what we can to hit our fundraising targets as our legislators undertake the important business of the Commonwealth. When session ends, Democrats head back to their districts and prepare to roll up their sleeves and work to make gains in the legislature before reconvening next year. Sister Andr lived in France throughout her 118 years of life, having been born in Alès, France, on February 11, 1904, and died at Sainte-Catherine-Laboure nursing home in Toulon, France, on January 17, 2023.

| | Facing 'impossible' odds, why is a Democrat fighting so hard to take back a rural district?
---
| | Good morning. Why spend so much time, money, and energy on a race that a Democrat hasn't won in over a decade?
---
| | [](https://www.boblorinser.com/so/d0ON5Acki/c?w=KfHa_Tl3L7kjBouKI47tRT7yMOwbFyiwWWgvb-tUlu0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ltcG9zc2libGUiLCJyIjoiMDVhODY1ZGMtY2VmMS00NTBkLWE1MjQtYWQ5NTc3MDZkOTljIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2ZjZGZiM2EtYTRmOC00MTNhLTk0OTUtOTZhNWJlZGQ4MjhlIn0)

| | President Obama said, "In the face of impossible odds, people who love this country can change it." Nothing is impossible. Some things just take a little longer.
---
| | | [**JOIN OUR RURAL MOVEMENT**](https://www.boblorinser.com/so/d0ON5Acki/c?w=W72x_kLyBm_MAilT-zmIwntvCIo7orsqEDHwWJpus_U.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ltcG9zc2libGUiLCJyIjoiMDY3NWFjN2EtMzc3YS00ZDE5LWY4NTQtMGUxNDhjNDNjZWRkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2ZjZGZiM2EtYTRmOC00MTNhLTk0OTUtOTZhNWJlZGQ4MjhlIn0)

| | [](https://www.boblorinser.com/so/d0ON5Acki/c?w=Mg_9zJe_PmSFSAthKbBMhs0T0GbtzCZkl5zz5myVetQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ltcG9zc2libGUiLCJyIjoiYzBmZmRkNjktYTQ4OC00NTIwLTQwZTUtZGM0ZTExNWFmZWExIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2ZjZGZiM2EtYTRmOC00MTNhLTk0OTUtOTZhNWJlZGQ4MjhlIn0)
---
| | Can a 'blue dot in a red sea' help change the tide? With my second run for Congress in a Republican stronghold, I hope to inspire voters to see what's possible with Democratic representation in rural districts like Michigan's 1st. "Why spend so much time, money, and energy on a race that a Democrat hasn't won in over a decade?" "Are you in an 'impossible' race? — running despite the odds?" As a blue dot in a red sea, these are questions Democrats get all the time, and Michigan's First Congressional District is no exception. So why am I running again? Because I believe in the same fundamental American principles as the constituency of MI01. We have an important message to share that will spark a movement to change hearts and minds, no matter the odds against us.
* We believe in a government of, by, and for the people.
* We cannot give up in our fight for policies promoting hard-working Americans' general well-being.
* We support small businesses, families, and education and desire affordable and accessible healthcare.
* We want rural America and rural Michigan to thrive, and we will advocate for infrastructure improvements to get us there.
* We will improve our school systems to retain and support families.
* We will recruit workers who desire to live somewhere safe, with clean air and water to drink and swim in.
* We take care of our neighbors, and they, us.
* We say 'thank you,' 'I'm sorry,' and 'I can help.'
* We will energize and inspire voters by challenging policies that have failed us.
* We will put pressure on so-called establishment candidates and career politicians to address issues that have been neglected.

Equally important as the message are the messengers. Win or lose, the Democratic Party needs to support quality candidates to manifest future podium finishes. This is a beginning, not an end. Believe in Democrats because we believe in you. Don't be afraid. Have courage. Be part of the solution. Big waves begin with tiny ripples of hope.
---
| | [](https://www.boblorinser.com/so/d0ON5Acki/c?w=NMRDlZa2WGO2hzY21HUjVXLYYoNbyuqOQOwQqmUQ0D8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ltcG9zc2libGUiLCJyIjoiYjM4M2NhMTctOTI0Yy00Njk4LWJlNjMtOTk3OWEyZTA0NDMxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2ZjZGZiM2EtYTRmOC00MTNhLTk0OTUtOTZhNWJlZGQ4MjhlIn0)
---
| | Then, just maybe, this impossible candidate, despite the odds, can win. The effort is never in vain. We didn't give up; we stood up. We didn't stay silent; we spoke out clearly and loudly. Change doesn't usually start with winners but with those who get up after being knocked down. Contribute. Join our rural movement. Help us turn the sea blue again.
---
| | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://www.boblorinser.com/so/d0ON5Acki/c?w=Ei_f3x--htbADN4iDnwWnAmQuEIMtI0x55L7V8wU5xg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ltcG9zc2libGUiLCJyIjoiNjIxYmY4NDAtZWIwZC00ZTY5LTdkY2ItOWMwM2NjNDgzMTAzIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2ZjZGZiM2EtYTRmOC00MTNhLTk0OTUtOTZhNWJlZGQ4MjhlIn0)
---

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Fwd: Announcing: OCN’s Priorities For a Healthy Oregon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Congress
body:
Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure that you saw my email from last week announcing the Oregon Conservation Network's 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon. The 2023 Legislative Session began yesterday, so now is the time for all of us to get to work advocating for Oregon's people, places, climate, and environment. **[Will you join us by emailing your state lawmakers today and urging them to pass our Priorities for a Healthy Oregon?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57479936/388092337/1745971919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwOTU5MGEzLTY1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p3MKn-o7M5XcuWwEsrO6jR-WVGizc1zBIfJlCM2XpM4=&emci=7a5d3b2f-0097-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=409590a3-6597-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** We can't do our work without you. With gratitude,
Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57479937/388092338/-937858190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwOTU5MGEzLTY1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p3MKn-o7M5XcuWwEsrO6jR-WVGizc1zBIfJlCM2XpM4=&emci=7a5d3b2f-0097-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=409590a3-6597-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, With the Oregon Legislature starting the 2023 session next week, it’s time for all of us to get to work passing strong climate and environmental bills! We must continue to build on the victories of the most recent legislative sessions. The way we do that is with the next set of Priorities for a Healthy Oregon––these are bills the 40 organizations in the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN) collectively choose to prioritize to make the biggest impacts on climate change, and making Oregon a healthier place for everyone. [**I hope you’ll join me in asking your state lawmakers to support these bills in the 2023 legislative session.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57479938/388092339/-937858190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwOTU5MGEzLTY1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p3MKn-o7M5XcuWwEsrO6jR-WVGizc1zBIfJlCM2XpM4=&emci=7a5d3b2f-0097-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=409590a3-6597-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **Here are the 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon:** 1) **Resilient Buildings Package** includes bills to make the buildings we live, work, and learn in more energy efficient, and lower energy bills with the use of electric heating and cooling systems. Oregon’s buildings are the second largest source of greenhouse gas pollution in the state behind transportation––it is crucial that the state take action on this! 2) **Natural Climate Solutions Bill** \- would create a program to help our state sequester as much carbon as possible on our forested and agricultural lands. 3) **The Factory Farm Moratorium** \- Factory farms wreak havoc on groundwater systems, produce high levels of air pollution, produce methane (a nasty greenhouse gas), and create an inhumane environment for livestock. This bill puts a stop to new or expanded factory farms in Oregon until they are adequately regulated to address water and air quality, and animal welfare issues. 4) **Toxic Free Package** \- We also need to protect people, especially our children, from toxics. This package includes:
* **Toxic Free Kids Act Modernization** \- Oregon is overdue in updating this historic act to allow more chemicals to be added to it to better protect our children from harmful toxins.
* **Toxic Free Cosmetics** \- this bill would require that personal care product companies publish all the ingredients of their products on their websites, and would require the phasing out of the most toxic chemicals.
* **Toxic Free Schools** \- would fund the creation of a pesticide tracking system on school grounds and requires transitioning to less or non-toxic alternatives.

5) **Zero Waste Package** aims to reduce Oregon’s waste and includes these five bills:
* **Right to Repair** \- will reduce electronic waste and save people hundreds of dollars a year by allowing them to repair their own electronics.
* **Styrofoam Phase Out** \- phases out the use of styrofoam in food to-go containers, as well as bans the use of highly carcinogenic PFAS chemicals in food packaging.
* A bill that will require a **25% Reduction of Single Use Packaging in 10 Years**.
* **Reusable Containers** \- Updating Oregon law to allow for reusable containers to be used in the bulk section of the supermarket and for eating out.
* **No New Permits for Chemical Recycling Plants** \- while the name might sound nice, chemical recycling leads to localized air pollution and is not healthy for people or the environment.

6) **Budget!** We will fight as we always do for a strong climate budget and for strong Natural Resources agency budgets to make sure our progress is funded. It’s an ambitious environmental and climate agenda for 2023, but the historic moment we are in calls for bold action on every front. Each of these priorities moves the dial on environmental justice. Our priorities will help protect people from toxic chemicals and the worst effects of climate change, and help improve people’s lives while also better protecting Oregon’s environment. [**I hope you will join us in asking your state lawmakers to support the OCN Priorities in the 2023 Session.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57479939/388092340/-937858190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwOTU5MGEzLTY1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p3MKn-o7M5XcuWwEsrO6jR-WVGizc1zBIfJlCM2XpM4=&emci=7a5d3b2f-0097-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=409590a3-6597-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Sincerely, Julia DeGraw

clean_body: Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure that you saw my email from last week announcing the Oregon Conservation Network's 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon. The 2023 Legislative Session began yesterday, so now is the time for all of us to get to work advocating for Oregon's people, places, climate, and environment. We can't do our work without you. With gratitude, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | | Dear Peter, With the Oregon Legislature starting the 2023 session next week, it’s time for all of us to get to work passing strong climate and environmental bills! We must continue to build on the victories of the most recent legislative sessions. The way we do that is with the next set of Priorities for a Healthy Oregon––these are bills the 40 organizations in the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN) collectively choose to prioritize to make the biggest impacts on climate change, and making Oregon a healthier place for everyone. Here are the 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon: 1) Resilient Buildings Package includes bills to make the buildings we live, work, and learn in more energy efficient, and lower energy bills with the use of electric heating and cooling systems. Oregon’s buildings are the second largest source of greenhouse gas pollution in the state behind transportation––it is crucial that the state take action on this! 2) Natural Climate Solutions Bill \- would create a program to help our state sequester as much carbon as possible on our forested and agricultural lands. 3) The Factory Farm Moratorium \- Factory farms wreak havoc on groundwater systems, produce high levels of air pollution, produce methane (a nasty greenhouse gas), and create an inhumane environment for livestock. This bill puts a stop to new or expanded factory farms in Oregon until they are adequately regulated to address water and air quality, and animal welfare issues. 4) Toxic Free Package \- We also need to protect people, especially our children, from toxics. This package includes: Toxic Free Kids Act Modernization \- Oregon is overdue in updating this historic act to allow more chemicals to be added to it to better protect our children from harmful toxins. Toxic Free Cosmetics \- this bill would require that personal care product companies publish all the ingredients of their products on their websites, and would require the phasing out of the most toxic chemicals. Toxic Free Schools \- would fund the creation of a pesticide tracking system on school grounds and requires transitioning to less or non-toxic alternatives. 5) Zero Waste Package aims to reduce Oregon’s waste and includes these five bills: Right to Repair \- will reduce electronic waste and save people hundreds of dollars a year by allowing them to repair their own electronics. Styrofoam Phase Out \- phases out the use of styrofoam in food to-go containers, as well as bans the use of highly carcinogenic PFAS chemicals in food packaging. A bill that will require a 25% Reduction of Single Use Packaging in 10 Years. Reusable Containers \- Updating Oregon law to allow for reusable containers to be used in the bulk section of the supermarket and for eating out. No New Permits for Chemical Recycling Plants \- while the name might sound nice, chemical recycling leads to localized air pollution and is not healthy for people or the environment. 6) Budget! We will fight as we always do for a strong climate budget and for strong Natural Resources agency budgets to make sure our progress is funded. It’s an ambitious environmental and climate agenda for 2023, but the historic moment we are in calls for bold action on every front. Each of these priorities moves the dial on environmental justice. Our priorities will help protect people from toxic chemicals and the worst effects of climate change, and help improve people’s lives while also better protecting Oregon’s environment. name: James H. Harvey III, American Veterans Center
subject: I was a Tuskegee Airman
body:
In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force’s first Fighter Gunnery Meet.
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqfeu08ensldahcc2jo42pa0e3bvrs0ehkddkb38_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
Fellow American, I was one of the first "Top Guns" of the U.S. Air Force. In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force's first Fighter Gunnery Meet. Over multiple days, we competed against other squadrons in dive bombing, skip bombing, rocket firing, panel strafing, and aerial gunnery at 20,000 and 12,000 feet - _and we won_. But the Air Force listed the 1949 competition winner as "Unknown" for 46 years because our team was composed of Tuskegee Airmen ... and they didn't want people to know we were so good.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zagtjc3jdikhapia0t9s3tf469mgg51b98ss96og_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center recorded a special video documentary about my military service in World War II and the Korean War._
---
**I** '**m a proud 22-year military veteran who served in World War II and the Korean War with the 33rd Fighter Group, better known as the Tuskegee Airmen.** In addition to being one of the Air Force's first "Top Guns," I was the first African-American combat pilot to fly in Korea, and I went on to fly more than 125 missions there. I'm proud to share my story of patriotism, service, and hard work with the next generation and to see the Tuskegee Airmen I served with recognized for their skill and bravery - after so many years of stonewalling and silence. **I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans** ' **stories so we can honor the men and women who served and inspire young Americans.** That's why, when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they needed to raise more funds to record veterans' stories - from World War II to today's Special Forces - I knew that I had to take action. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help support the American Veterans Center** '**s critical work to honor veterans** ' **legacies? As a non-profit organization, AVC depends on support from patriotic Americans like you.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33p9g8eek8v01qddocqlhn56ldt9rhu8l2057i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf9m0qvvb9o079bmvlcgkhrirada07uaftshgf6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4al23c0pjjj5ra3aq52p93vcluct3vcuiia7090_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
_Above: I was honored to join AVC_ '_s Annual Conference - alongside my fellow Tuskegee Airmen and in the company of hundreds more veterans, students, and military cadets - in Washington, D.C. this year._
---
I was proud to partner with the American Veterans Center for a 37-minute video documentary about my service in World War II and Korea - and also about the Tuskegee Airmen's long journey to rightful recognition for our skill and service. **No other group does as much as the American Veterans Center to safeguard our veterans** ' **legacies and to let our veterans tell their own stories in their own words.** [**That** '**s why I** '**m writing to you today to ask for your support of the American Veterans Center** '**s critical work. Will you make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj228cr3oje2girlkb253pbl71q2agupkj8lhms0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znqi0bo2hbs3h251cf1spq1up5b8fmrmud9src2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
As a young man, I stood outside in my yard and looked up as a formation of P-40 Warhawks flew overhead. In that moment, I knew I wanted to become a pilot. **Today, I hope that my story of serving America - in World War II, in the Korean War, and as one of the first **"**Top Guns " in the Air Force - will similarly inspire the next generation of young people.** Every year, the American Veterans Center reaches _millions_ of Americans through their video documentaries ... their National Memorial Day Parade ... and their Annual Conference for veterans, students, and military cadets. [**Will you join me in supporting the American Veterans Center - and helping them reach even more veterans and young people with their powerful programs - and make a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z616tj4fsace6h00gmvuj9npd66okn71jeik05q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlv9nul539732rqluv0hptkk6eg93517holilt88_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
Friend, your support will help the American Veterans Center pass on the lessons of veterans like me - lessons of service, sacrifice, patriotism, duty, and courage. Thank you for helping the American Veterans Center preserve the stories of American heroes so together we can inspire the next generation.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmco261fm55p73rq07797bnthlu5h40p7fmldpfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
Lt. Col. James H. Harvey III U.S. Air Force (Ret.) For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z75ndqeohjrccjcqffq0d6e7drui3gbujbhr5c98_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm0oj6cth2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

| | Peter,
---
_I hope the new year has been treating you well._

As we begin to shift our attention to the new election cycle, I have an important ask for you.

I am working 24/7 to help ensure we can elect as many conservatives from school boards to Congress as possible. In order to continue this work, we have to raise money. It’s an unfortunate reality, but after having over $100M spent against me in my own race, I know how paramount it is to ensure each and every campaign is well-funded to defend against any radical attacks.

**_To put it plainly, if we want to have any chance at winning in 2024, we’ve got to start making investments NOW._** If that means a $5 donation, that puts us $5 closer to Republican victories up and down the ballot.
---
[**DONATE TODAY >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=422cb65ae58b40169a928462c4f05c6d&_e=asRBZeOT8grwINLW7BjUoco-xHyfN_A261cB1c0cKqjSFljfXQPWxCEx-_3LA9tc9Sbkf9SolfoyJn7_v53_tXyZH1l_XNl0b1rYDrJ3HZbNy4iRiL14P2jsko6eNDqQ7Adi7RpJ-5f9m0XRgXcfNp-S-eZz_e4JpFe50v_2Ka8_Ds-LLudWAdFcy67iif2s1-ZrcAviAUdBqjQ1HpGCdn8kZiLdif2bwcFOi6Cye3kotM5gjgLqlFb6OFAFUKOMDgn_KQFwbsQ-5nmIpUncOlS0xxUJ-EQ6tAqCKIRcs7s19Z_y1tk5G58_OdeGJVqVo2grVz7hAuATl0Qcr3Jxlblo9OjbCRVqrWMy8RZL6UcacRp-6WMqoBCJSSZqlDIdo1v3tN9oPRL5_yR7oy9p72zUhIhAmGg5s_FoA5o7HHVzcj9sexp3DnZSm6FAmbZd)

clean_body: Now is the time, Peter. I hope the new year has been treating you well.| | | | | Peter, I hope the new year has been treating you well. As we begin to shift our attention to the new election cycle, I have an important ask for you. I am working 24/7 to help ensure we can elect as many conservatives from school boards to Congress as possible. In order to continue this work, we have to raise money. It’s an unfortunate reality, but after having over $100M spent against me in my own race, I know how paramount it is to ensure each and every campaign is well-funded to defend against any radical attacks. To put it plainly, if we want to have any chance at winning in 2024, we’ve got to start making investments NOW. If that means a $5 donation, that puts us $5 closer to Republican victories up and down the ballot. I hate having to ask for money, Peter, but I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. Onward to victory, Ron Johnson Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | | | Paid for by the NRSC. subject: Biased Fact-Checker Is Targeting PragerU!
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYM3i_Nkya2UKuMgZ2TQReUURPYs5QbGmvkhFxtiqfDXXe5ByPq4iwC4Oo9KedCHLQHqOfzkCcoMhkXWzvmwCd_1ki-Qt8Lu6yH_x6o_3Rud80oLqgpX8mW1yHJv0b1pQbzTRhfGkoQ9cGOlC4ZpO7SQ%3D%3D)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYvUy7OAH2-RBCXFtm_uJJmtNl-oYapyjj6ZS8BYRsqbTMnt9iMn682VIdO6yYa23GUXU7Qwvng6bnthbCgyQAHYJTCMx1cDwPIPRbBmn_YoCwLpTNymUcnD3e7-9GrZDKY2TQpJJp5mo03Z0McPXPwQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear PragerU Supporter, NewsGuard--one of the largest and most influential "fact-checkers" employed by Big Tech--is targeting PragerU! After labeling PragerU as misinformation, encouraging tech platforms to cancel us, warning users to "proceed with caution" before viewing our content, damaging our reputation, and costing us hundreds of thousands--if not millions--of dollars, NewsGuard refuses to leave us alone.
---
[Support PragerU](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lY2u2tfXce5TJVPDlZT-56avRx4Zwa_1A3nilFc4_qT16KLnu8pmPlrHbvjSTNq-dRWESAFVH95Zj6_m0NRfYjmp0OrArxUDSB9tKkGDdZ0HpmBg8TJbcu6xB6NpoDh0QmUlqhpcpCY7bN8NtWrbNvMg%3D%3D)
---
| | Political and corporate elites empower third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard to censor companies they don't like--companies like PragerU. Meanwhile, leftist, legacy media companies like the **New York Times** and **NPR** get near-perfect "credibility" ratings. So, who is behind NewsGuard, and why are they controlling what you can and cannot see? NewsGuard is partnered with Big Tech companies (like **Microsoft**), Big Pharma (like the PR firm for **Pfizer** --the maker of the COVID vaccine), government agencies (like the **Department of Defense**), and even national teachers unions (like the **American Federation of Teachers**) "to combat disinformation, especially around COVID-19 and elections" according to the **World Economic Forum.** So, it's no wonder NewsGuard doesn't want open dialogue about COVID-19 and lockdowns.

[**They want to stop PragerU from exposing the truth.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYtugp7zHAyvs8RZFyMbMF85B2Trjrfq8B2FNjBQdosZWB5cKO1qOYKEolLXOgaPu_dPvKI0PSYAHzzfOlkCWzG9FXtp_8yeqE5vhRgxqH64ukCWruROkiOyEvTvO-uxI7Qw1MWtLUaT2esxarE1_0Wg%3D%3D)
Advisors to NewsGuard include former Directors of the CIA and other government agencies. Their partners, advisors, and staff overwhelmingly support left-wing causes. So, how can NewsGuard claim to be "independent" and call itself "The Internet Trust Tool"? If you've seen any of our videos, you know that PragerU is fiercely committed to the truth. [**But NewsGuard slapped us with a misinformation label just because they don 't want the public to hear what we have to say.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYfwYVbdj3IaWN6L2-sv_NYmpz6smO8uc7U3BQ7fR_Rp8Pk2ouKGy9Y15OVNThAuPPlwM18JKJFf18bE_lkjRwQOacOJlpodKZz9kvnAjs9AbdQSAjuXgyytAijVvSHu6a3gcF6F-l031eDA96NLIPOA%3D%3D) Here's just one of many examples of how third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard are hurting organizations like **PragerU** , **Breitbart** , **The Daily Wire** , and **The Babylon Bee** : The company that used to host our videos, **JW Player** , informed us 18 months ago that they were not willing to work with us anymore. When we asked why, they said we had been blacklisted by NewsGuard and claimed our content was "misleading." Suddenly, we had to devote considerable time and money to find a new video host. Now, NewsGuard is back, threatening to further harm us if we don't comply with their long list of ridiculous demands.
---
[Expose NewsGuard](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYmtN34WRMEZ6yfQ0fgIOloak_s-w8d4BD6P1vxNBELMJbkfSizpKIO4kfGAteAu77WUor1Tdk9F3EcMYfdeaRL0-KampcPOco0ItEGM_xfWv8bgP43Be6JB0a3o0zDyvZIPGanwWqPzrH1b9bp9sB0A%3D%3D)
---
| | We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this. We're not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while keeping you completely in the dark. There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against NewsGuard. But if we don't do it, who will? [PragerU is taking a risk by fighting back against such powerful entities, and we need your help.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYMEPp0cmzprDGzinYRBCEhjONVqO0XZ1rVVgzoxJSl-jTk3MF2b7OJhXVbtKbLNz6DWlmRh0Hi4VhZECHoOM4es4vdytbaDi-Q1RpXW_uNlkillU8L0alXQsoh3dgtcNFMUWtfxmOZ7cwloLzi5Vj5A%3D%3D) Third-party fact-checkers and their "partners" have all the money and all the power. But we have you. [**Donate now to help us expose NewsGuard.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYdCG93lMofzaf0DX1nUi-DXzfVIYcuPsKvL8oDpCLj5ByvJMQdq5rwtjnJJoGAcExBTzf-G9U31SQL_buePz_eqP0JUkwIOLsxGch9aoafpmphNvTwu_l3FIlBSR-ceEj_Fh1rCsPc81I40EBa4oryQ%3D%3D) This is David vs. Goliath. We know that God and the truth are on our side and will prevail. But we can't do this alone. We're willing to take the risk. We're putting everything on the line. But we need your help. Please join in the fight and help us. Sincerely, Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO
---
[Donate Now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57d5687aa5a3437ea16f3e6f124e3fe5&_e=_YlCtHVJnFCscx0M1gygxu2mB3CYZvWNIuc6167FST0dR50aKm3OqMBtpM8_QvTHVhxRBRx_fa-DPlhHGswt7Lhu8lisigqYTNVSLuJ7nMlajZeOuh_u10Da4Tcix6lYHg0aH_Dl5Sk0GOLY1LaZ2YCcST46F6Ax0Lm4u6C_SwIpYPrbgEQ6wwIx2yPslOYwFZKgHpXYmE-K6hS-HaoQd-aOwGqKLOX-5fAzhHTQxwQwRzVAB3A5GWbL0d5fGCv6J6H5jeNW2mXtsmmDTmrAMA%3D%3D)
