name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znupbotqeqjq8fnvecjba6nb6ab18so1i5i3qmb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjtubddsu641im4691h1qks4341b83b7p9hq3e68_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zth604scm0joo8j93e50u6opjj8ea88ba73qu6b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2hhl7h3h72badj1l30ehh6rg370gqpc18prh52o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm5f2ufbalenjp9107vvmvnr7f2dkm64kcj0g8j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqjv732db2h5s1hhhjgc02unjrgrn9oblfh85d6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61r5t1f0d0975e6b6sujugeosotaoc9u8n70fh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z34rvo35j0q4cb7gg451db4p4293t40d28m1mlsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm4pj4sth2bs)
---

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656165%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pgicP9AD%2fzss46ILGTFqhw&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656154%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jkd9Ft2uHxEhDi5e5OimnA&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656166%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g3poY4qZwWLat4cDtlBnaw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656154%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jkd9Ft2uHxEhDi5e5OimnA&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656167%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IX1Of0ZRTm6Y6dmVbRc4Dw&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656168%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BbA%2bTFClneUyR8dHC8MjOg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656169%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CVUBWjMDuKjnk%2bkKoxUuOA&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92010%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tkahU7krJn4IyNTKjXEN1w&sysid=1)

All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92011%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oKpJfI07I9W7YhtOW774fw&sysid=1)

name: PA Democrats
subject: Congratulations, Governor Shapiro!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
From County Commissioner to State Representative to Attorney General, Governor Josh Shapiro has officially taken on his biggest role yet!
Yesterday in Harrisburg, Shapiro was sworn-in as the 48th Governor of Pennsylvania and Austin Davis became Pennsylvania’s first Black lieutenant governor. If you have a second, sign this congratulations card [https://go.padems.com/a/send-shapiro-your-congrats] to send them your well-wishes!
https://go.padems.com/a/send-shapiro-your-congrats [https://go.padems.com/a/send-shapiro-your-congrats]
As the 2023 legislative session kicks off, the leadership of Governor Shapiro, Lieutenant Governor Davis, and General Assembly Democrats stands in stark contrast to the far-right factions of the Pennsylvania GOP who have vowed to obstruct any and all attempts at bipartisanship.
While the GOP refuses to invest in our communities, Governor Shapiro, Lieutenant Governor Davis, and PA Democrats are committed to funding our public schools, making healthcare more accessible, protecting the right to choose, and growing Pennsylvania’s economy.
Since November, three vacancies in the Pennsylvania House of Representatives leave Democrats at a three-vote disadvantage to Republicans. In order for Governor Shapiro and Democratic leadership to be successful, it’s crucial that Democrats win those seats in the special election on February 7th! Please chip in $10 or $15 to help elect Democrats who will invest in Pennsylvania’s families and our future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723&express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $100 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723&express_lane=true&amount=250]
Other [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email11723&express_lane=true]
Thank you,
Pennsylvania Democrats
PA Democratic Party
229 State Street
Harrisburg, PA 17101
United States
https://www.padems.com [https://www.padems.com]

Peter, As if schmoozing with corporate CEO’s in the Swiss Alps isn’t enough, Kyrsten Sinema shared a special moment yesterday with Joe Manchin on stage at the Davos World Economic Forum, high-fiving over their shared history of protecting the filibuster. Watch below: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhs3kvU_pxf5IGtet3wEyPWKeSE3xg-NAXoM5pOQ1UNjOae1vaR9ZYFh5_0LdAoD6sTrURXaJKWnChLXXP-rdJLI769vVrXOLSaTIQ3LWGJrCN3pTOc_SKpui7xakvZACV6IKmDk2Vdiyzvti0krYXWhbdwJ-IhLOHt2quVRYXFCRVpnwoKgdsj_0RwQCNCDn4CoLKoJiCzsvvsP7K3U53XtOAa350IV3ZyH4jC5Eneg18axH1CDHPDl2RJ5uQM2a3CDgk_QA_RiaPZbuie-uvMXHazC1heggwtrFDk6jmuAeEwsSWsjucOu5_kbVz6rd3A/3sy/qukFvsYyTG-gSRhXz-FR3Q/h0/7JgXRcXhnAE_NWZfD2LDsEw45DoTLphMtNptXSYIx0w) High Fives for blocking voting rights and abortion rights. Disgusting. **[Chip in now to help us lay the groundwork for ousting Sinema in 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcg-YqUdqKDgybCh-wk4tCVmbzUBy6Uf3NJksoRtfFH9kGynYJ32pvYk33yvZYI5V-XJk49VpGF-WESoyncSvBQlLewK50jdwOIV0y8VN3oIqQjlwv3-OGdaGwV6B8g3gvtlFGt-LpvYtTR8c5v83KbTDEK2Oy0HUIpTSx5J_maJw6Uxa_ip9jGBDTxys4HDI17YkxOF3zL0QXXkiTO_2-5xC77GB_TT_FKh4AkIxlp6oXb591QZ8J1k6QAxsX3n6ppphvOKGAHrrHtgo-tgcx9w/3sy/qukFvsYyTG-gSRhXz-FR3Q/h1/bNRJhYJSVK2XtZqoDehm7Pou4TCoKeaZRQ3Ilg3zmyU)** As a reminder, because of the filibuster that Sinema championed, the Senate was blocked from:
* passing voting rights legislation, including John Lewis’s namesake bill and restoring the Voting Rights Act
* codifying Roe v. Wade and protecting abortion rights
* passing immigration reform
* banning assault weapons and passing universal background checks
* many other priorities that couldn’t be accomplished outside the reconciliation process

Sinema has always been and will always be all about Sinema. She doesn’t care who her policies hurt. She doesn’t care that she stood in the way of voting rights and abortion rights, as long as she gets the headlines she wanted. Now, she’s on stage in Switzerland, in front of an audience of billionaires and Wall Street CEOs, bragging about her obstruction and giving high fives. It’s no wonder she’s so unpopular among Arizonans of every political stripe. That’s why we’re going to do everything in our power to ensure a Democrat defeats her in a three-way race next year.**** [**Let’s give a high five for ending Sinema’s political career. this is deeply personal to me, friend.| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c0f6aa38dbf342bba39c54de74710674&_e=I5twDDEHw_PLK7p2WNZMwSFCkVmzxWIC3e-I_31WvMSd__Cp_ZNTx3jbDHyk0LhQfgUESa0ZPaS-1Ygqv-92KmJmwD7sTnAEkcefSw6hGZhcP-X2ZvQP1aKkaQFP4d3d_oijk2zrBC7zYCT-n0pmNV1ds-RHr7v9QZ1mrgzUVzu4xmIDqmALq9qbgxx0Y-q544oTMPfqS8m5k3Yf6U_LQEEihQTdCns_6yh_-cljbvlci7Es2tt_M6HyiEbU__5ZZDJAOteZlZFASXo_QX-rkEb15rVFMkxFkK0eZGO8VsUAKKnEcPtjsefLx5ipuVGU-Hr3mCLekfJn0QtOLxi2FXXumYe_9iSpmKmv7LcIoMHSouZdGDFsdP9AxtJegFzU)
---
Friend, Last week, my office launched an investigation into Thomas Jefferson High School over allegations that school officials failed to notify students who qualified for the National Merit Award before upcoming college application deadlines simply because of the color of their skin.
These allegations come _after_ the prestigious high school dropped its admission rates for Asian American students – _ its largest population_ – by 15%. Parents say their kids are being punished for their nationality... **__and all of this is done in the name of “equality.”__** Now,**** we have expanded our probe to more than a **_dozen_** high schools, as 25% of the high schools in Fairfax County have now come forward in withholding merit notifications to these students.
---
[**HOLD THESE SCHOOLS ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c0f6aa38dbf342bba39c54de74710674&_e=I5twDDEHw_PLK7p2WNZMwSFCkVmzxWIC3e-I_31WvMSd__Cp_ZNTx3jbDHyk0LhQfgUESa0ZPaS-1Ygqv-92KmJmwD7sTnAEkcefSw6hGZhcP-X2ZvQP1aKkaQFP4d3d_oijk2zrBC7zYCT-n0pmNV1ds-RHr7v9QZ1mrgzUVzu4xmIDqmALq9qbgxx0Y-q544oTMPfqS8m5k3Yf6U_LQEEihQTdCns_6yh_-cljbvndGaTUTFK8ZlxKIkzo6cAijlRY8nddd59YgGHU3Jzerw_NWgffh6VQbg91MBUQtoFsV8iqc63eY_p8w1s1tHaWNRzJh-1g2ajeN3iS70d9njMByZdxCWnk-cuyk-64JotQqPLiIGUJH-EjcVDLwVMl)
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c0f6aa38dbf342bba39c54de74710674&_e=I5twDDEHw_PLK7p2WNZMwSFCkVmzxWIC3e-I_31WvMSd__Cp_ZNTx3jbDHyk0LhQfgUESa0ZPaS-1Ygqv-92KmJmwD7sTnAEkcefSw6hGZhcP-X2ZvQP1aKkaQFP4d3d_oijk2zrBC7zYCT-n0pmNV1ds-RHr7v9QZ1mrgzUVzu4xmIDqmALq9qbgxx0Y-q544oTMPfqS8m5k3Yf6U_LQEEihQTdCns_6yh_-cljbvlEbRvwhDIFRdKRIuGcDufeKq8N1LOIHpPXHbMQkDUNkUQPgXsV7WG0BkHZv0S_l3gwyotPs475dMHVAIgIfqCrIyGkOodXWYSJxtXMNjLWM9FxljEgKJdgHIy6fBsdKupxpYpw_mqAQKad7q4fsqtz)
---
| | **Friend, as I’ve said before, education is the doorway to American success, especially for children of immigrants like me. And it’s important every child has the same opportunity, regardless of their race or background.**
---
[**WATCH THE SEGMENT**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c0f6aa38dbf342bba39c54de74710674&_e=I5twDDEHw_PLK7p2WNZMwSFCkVmzxWIC3e-I_31WvMSd__Cp_ZNTx3jbDHyk0LhQfgUESa0ZPaS-1Ygqv-92KmJmwD7sTnAEkcefSw6hGZhcP-X2ZvQP1aKkaQFP4d3d_oijk2zrBC7zYCT-n0pmNV1ds-RHr7v9QZ1mrgzUVzu4xmIDqmALq9qbgxx0Y-q544oTMPfqS8m5k3Yf6U_LQEEihQTdCns_6yh_-cljbvmfhxqhugPEraGDYyqqsszX1PvjU8J4-n6WvaO8bSggrXJ61ZVB5Oi-mvkC8mfnnRHcn4IM9nJc6-vAJT4mHGI-i-qbkhj939vtEnfPadDfDSEGl1O0_JO1oJaW5td3ddNPowvwOie6bR7wUSX3QJ2h)
---
Children of immigrants that came to the United States are living out the dreams that were denied to their parents – and education is the pathway to achieving the American Dream.
What’s heartbreaking, friend, is parents feel their children’s opportunity at achieving the American Dream is being ripped away. _And that’s_ _deeply personal_ _to me._
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME >> FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c0f6aa38dbf342bba39c54de74710674&_e=I5twDDEHw_PLK7p2WNZMwSFCkVmzxWIC3e-I_31WvMSd__Cp_ZNTx3jbDHyk0LhQfgUESa0ZPaS-1Ygqv-92KmJmwD7sTnAEkcefSw6hGZhcP-X2ZvQP1aKkaQFP4d3d_oijk2zrBC7zYCT-n0pmNV1ds-RHr7v9QZ1mrgzUVzu4xmIDqmALq9qbgxx0Y-q544oTMPfqS8m5k3Yf6U_LQEEihQTdCns_6yh_-cljbvkfMWmYbxN2JEKXFiW06WOfX0TjLukoY8_vDw79_vVt5Lyr4KbTKYsnEKnFzPbu6bYtlRMp7guz6BGHAet-wknBEd62orQur9neHSRmydc65iAarbngZ020XzjnjyWrqrfW4AiklaU4f9YTaNzU8Shn)
---
Friend, we’re taking these allegations made against these **THIRTEEN** schools seriously and are working to determine if students were kept from receiving National Merit Award because of race, national origin or any other protected status under the Virginia Human Rights Act – **_because_** **_equity without excellence is emptiness. _** **_[Will you join me in upholding the rule of law and ensuring the American Dream is obtainable for generations to come?](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c0f6aa38dbf342bba39c54de74710674&_e=I5twDDEHw_PLK7p2WNZMwSFCkVmzxWIC3e-I_31WvMSd__Cp_ZNTx3jbDHyk0LhQfgUESa0ZPaS-1Ygqv-92KmJmwD7sTnAEkcefSw6hGZhcP-X2ZvQP1aKkaQFP4d3d_oijk2zrBC7zYCT-n0pmNV1ds-RHr7v9QZ1mrgzUVzu4xmIDqmALq9qbgxx0Y-q544oTMPfqS8m5k3Yf6U_LQEEihQTdCns_6yh_-cljbvkffho_XLuqSq5QWDG4Y-FNCBKfjACgeZ3GYHSTT1h0rt7u98G4hMoZHjWAxQ6RT5f8g8MQ1yusicdBSouGPCZCufvFGBd1DbYlk1dmHlMqZJq_cLC_202Lg1kMylDMupAlTRqzdvoaDubjywpiGxbz)_ ** Virginia Attorney GeneralJason Miyares

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Don't Let MAGA Republicans Crash the World Economy
body:
MAGA Republicans are planning a US government shutdown that would cause a Depression. Tell Congress: No MAGA Shutdown! | | |
---
[](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkEo6BOB3zSgj7XvcGTLcA_dNM9d2OKTCr2MVNJS1PBzPovWMH4z8UXi_-Ak_Om8Q-YenBfEYaBlvDPcLuN9Bskceq5jfXTPG59LVjeTnRQuJfr8uOolGQvL9rL45b1hTxhmAjDFiPbKwpoUowlSN-78ytHDITSHPKLmb9Hh0J_kxISa2ZblRR-WhBBorJ2CBpI4jnVWsUm7zfaBui4e3TrlvLoA2j_lRaTNjamkTWs6dH96ysM47WZLHl0unsLX9TQH4Xlwt0zA63VZx7lE8O7A1o0VnGPa2QbeM60W5NNjTACcSum8r4rTLQVSUoPZxo/3sy/nCw2Bdm9QJerWFliSvO9DQ/h0/qX8nc3UHjY2M7PP_wiUG37OcDS48Q6DEH-NGUWuvvnk) Hi Friend, **MAGA Republicans in the U.S. House are planning a US government shutdown** to force President Biden to destroy essential programs like Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, Veterans benefits, public schools, college loans, and climate jobs. President Biden will not give in to these MAGA terrorist demands, so the **United States will default on its bonds, triggering an economic meltdown**.
* **Stock markets** will collapse, wiping out pension funds, 501ks, and IRAs.
* **Interest rates** will soar, canceling investments in construction and manufacturing.
* **The U.S. government will be unable to pay** the military, Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, etc.
* **State and local governments will be unable to pay** police, teachers, firefighters, hospitals, etc.

Before long, the U.S. will be in a **Depression**. **But we can stop a MAGA Shutdown if only 5 out of 223 House Republicans vote with Democrats to lift the debt ceiling**. [19 of them represent Democratic districts won by Joe Biden](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDA8z---HCo97bAwJ9BZJhPX_8-WP_o5ZOpOJiglMq9cUmfaD8s-iMaHPo72lbPNI-pI6MZmpJASNiOMkHOvoKg4IQYq94zwvSSe1Eio-Y1iGbRJE3vAkqWV8eWiRmLzj6avw-mOtcK6TLg56R6ywcNmX2U6ur86DCvkHu1fHyyPJku8ffjRxvvkLUTzsXBrvXgTcgOh9yA7AtXXwNasJYuyVxsycLVLYGDQigGQrQiJQbszQ3Ql_vuGs0K0u1sFQzxpsut3kfQpaRmYeSE2VtaVfXLCwtlEIxSmyHJkvpkL3OV5PczYHfhZpoy_PFbzNh9lwD0bHdIzePTdFnPAlY0ffeSOYKqpPfn_8AACbGaNUSDFXIhZw2rlsQpjOO84lg3dvcN9Zto6X6ifzzBIg8GE/3sy/nCw2Bdm9QJerWFliSvO9DQ/h1/C9a7iwd32leDx_EGyyWuTcp-rtymHzBPyApAREinMKw), so they are vulnerable to organized pressure from their own constituents. **We will organize voters in every Republican district to change their minds - or defeat as many as we can in 2024.** **** [**Send our powerful letter to your Representative and Senators opposing the MAGA Shutdown.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkEo6BOB3zSgj7XvcGTLcA_dNM9d2OKTCr2MVNJS1PBzPovWMH4z8UXi_-Ak_Om8Q-YenBfEYaBlvDPcLuN9Bskceq5jfXTPG59LVjeTnRQuAGu7wWr1p2VWaw6rTbBPxrXiKf_8Kp65g_LmBs1pH1aPIdw0xdQa7Md8CmVR8PF9cllmQRX-z9_FefqweFJgwlqJJVyg0n53FsulkDQlyCpip8IpZ5m1SSHyeH_PuutdhgGWNfznofjbvRMg-kYniJtkcPHaQjWM2ZNm_yOF_9wyW0WYYKd-3DGmWdvCqp_O14SR8gvR5SBodZPf_VhWEg/3sy/nCw2Bdm9QJerWFliSvO9DQ/h2/wez62PVlFKcCCuCIwtG3uA99lcMjSIR5ISbLu8ZNcL8) [](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkEo6BOB3zSgj7XvcGTLcA_dNM9d2OKTCr2MVNJS1PBzPovWMH4z8UXi_-Ak_Om8Q-YenBfEYaBlvDPcLuN9Bskceq5jfXTPG59LVjeTnRQuLSPQLCuCPa22c29XydyzM2vxn88_D_8FoYckkZT8oxZn3z-k8mu938e01Otcysbj7JqCGdYG7HRKClPiZ7S7-lEMA1EnnH1bt4CdQkVVDzecc6nVXeqw4ZITc9uZdAeLZpv7vtLfRuiQRZ-7pc8K4WXQll6xrNFcZqQ2_rV464yOTbcjjs0sQf3ny4rBvnfsrpccSEWsvAL1S7dcXeMMjs/3sy/nCw2Bdm9QJerWFliSvO9DQ/h3/n1aveft1g5BOVHBEw-swbVnJokw---nV8qJ-I37d1Vc) Thanks for all you do!

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpl9ljmm168h8u5hlrfftqfjq9c75jti5ukndta8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2ob1cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9uer63h1bnf5lap2soka5bkd4b4khq5855c0im8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2ob1cjh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeh0rg55gpah1usl7hk9is75d7g0i2r920mhojn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2ob1cjh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zj7f7096nlcc6dcot9onk5pvc220vqd76vq9ei98).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvi2v90c49jtodud23of0cc4kl9vbffps53hh4u8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5g6eob1c5ie49fg)

Last year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. **That’s why we’re reaching out to you today.**
Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the _best_ step you can take to help build a better future in the states.

That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, The College Scam.
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjgfgsqfeksm6gk9085jkpc449sst9a25pkos7mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2oj5c3h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd8objhqi65pg63s49rjfr4om518h6mq2lo0ffug_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2oj5c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5s773pa76tn5pbboa2lqg3265rlukeu3j0v5710_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2oj5c3h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00uvpkpbdmjm7qbm3a3ikma4bg0eo8tmihqqdd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm2oj5c3h2bs)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132760?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**We are almost three full weeks into the 2023 Legislative Session, and it has been nothing short of eventful.

While many believed this year's session would have very little action due to 2023 being an election year, many of our lawmakers prove that they are ready to fight for change in Mississippi. **
---
|
---
| **Gov. Tate Reeves will see some competition as he vies for reelection for the highest-ranking position of the Magnolia State.**

**Democrat Brandon Presley** , the Northern District Public Service Commissioner, announced Thursday he is running for Mississippi Governor because he knows "Mississippi can do better." Presley is the state's highest elected Democrat state official, serving the Public Service Commission for the past 15 years. Presley will face **Gregory Wash** , the only other candidate for Governor, in the Democratic primary.

Due to Presley not seeking reelection to his current position, the state will surely see a new Public Service Commissioner for the Northern District. **Republican Mandy Gunasekara** , a former chief of staff for the Environmental Protection Agency, is the only candidate to have qualified so far.
---
|
---
| With the legislature's first committee deadline, Jan. 31, rapidly approaching, committee chairpersons are briskly calling hearings in order to ensure general bills and constitutional amendments can make it to their chamber floors.

**THE GOOD**
**\- HB 370 from Rep. Shanda Yates was debated on the House floor last week.** The bill, which allows for a municipal recall, has been tabled until further notice.
**\- HB 240 introduced by Rep. Joel Bomgar ****grants the Commissioner of Agriculture and Commerce the authority to grant exceptions for the use of certain weighing devices which dispense agricultural commodities. **This would help cut the red tape and deregulate agricultural businesses.
**\- HB 302 introduced by Rep. Stacey Hobgood-Wilkes establishes the ****Forming Open and Robust University Minds (FORUM) Act.** This act would eliminate "free-speech zones" and instead allow students on college campuses to express themselves freely without limitations.

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=54713f8f23&e=5703353baa)
---
Rep. Shanda Yates discusses HB 370 which would allow for a municipal recall.
| **THE BAD**
**\- HB 401 revises certain provisions relating to a manufacturer's ownership of a motor vehicle dealership.** This bill, which has already passed in the House, would prevent electric vehicle manufacturers from locating dealerships in the state. This goes against free-market principles and discourages competition.
**\- Dozens of bills have been introduced in favor of Medicaid expansion.** MCPP does not support expansion and believes spending more taxpayer dollars on Medicaid would harm, not help Mississippi's healthcare system.

**THE INTERESTING**
**\- HB 373 from Rep. Randy Rushing and Rep. Jeffery Hulum allows hunters to wear fluorescent pink as an alternative to fluorescent orange during open gun season.** As a fan of the color pink myself, I personally am in favor of this one.
**\- SB 2138 from Sen. Lydia Chassaniol designates the Mississippi Opal as the state gemstone. **The opal is the only gemstone found in the state to be considered a precious gem, and since the opal just so happens to be my birthstone, I also find myself in favor of this bill.
**\- 2247 by Sen. Hillman Frazier prohibits the resale of mattresses without first notifying the customer. **
---
|
---
| We have been working hard to push our conservative plans through the legislature. Several lawmakers have been a great help in ensuring that conservative ideas are being carried out. **A full list of MCPP's goals for the legislative session can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=eca6237aea&e=5703353baa). **

**So far a few bills have already been introduced that support our agenda, with more to come:
\- HB 509 from Rep. Jill Ford creates the "Families' Rights and Responsibilities Act." **This would ensure parents have a fundamental right to raise their children how they best see fit.
**\- SB 2049 by Sen. Angela Hill limits the salary of the State Superintendent to not exceed 105% of the national average for school superintendents. **
**\- SB 2053 from Sen. John Polk requires state agencies to notify certain officials when a likelihood of a deficit exists. **This helps to prevent taxpayer dollars from being misspent.

Have a great rest of your week!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f9958af19c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=07fd9f635b&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=38bf47472d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=38bf47472d).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ide

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zomcpebbj9b2p7td26biolk8qb8ejbhv600upu10_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jmaor2cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z921fsics5obv6afgkj4vnoddhd8svc1lds42d9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jmaor2cdh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv8q0hf720p70b258jqei4ghih1glmvd1krnd2t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jmaor2cdh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: The State of the State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR Gretchen Whitmer for Governor
body:
Tune in next week on January 25 to hear from me. | |
---
I’m excited to tell you on Wednesday, January 25th, I will be delivering my fifth State of the State Address.

I know times feel hard with costs on the rise due to global inflation, and the day-to-day stresses of raising a family. I get it. That’s why I’m eager to speak to you next week.

The State of the State Address is an opportunity to reflect on where we are and where we are going. I can't wait to share my vision for our state as we move towards our bright future, and lay out my plans to lower costs, bring supply chains and manufacturing home to Michigan, and ensure Michiganders have unparalleled economic opportunity and personal freedom.

Because you’re a dedicated supporter, I’ll have more to share with you before the speech, and I’ll give you some sneak peeks into what I have in mind for the road ahead.

Stay tuned for more, and I hope you watch it **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57482647/388106752/-219746258?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzZmMwMi03NDk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOgKIct7wWXdiBuC7BVXGdzQStxDrhWzyi4SbulG8Ik=&emci=3135d953-6997-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5723fc02-7497-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7753671)** next week.

Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer
---

name: VoteVets
subject: $5 to help us elevate Veteran voices impacted by a far-right debt ceiling default.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Here’s what a default would mean for Veterans and Military Families:
#
Derek -
According to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, at some point tomorrow the United States will reach its debt limit.
We’ll have a few months to raise that limit, but Republicans have all but pledged to hold those negotiations hostage for whatever far-right cause their base craves.
Here’s what a default would mean for Veterans and Military Families:
According to Defense Secretary Austin, he would have “no authority or ability to ensure that our service members, civilians, or contractors would be paid in full or on time.”
But there’s more...
Gold Star Family benefits would be at risk.
Retiree benefits would be at risk.
And our national security, very much built upon our economic strength, would be at risk.
Veterans served their country. We did our job. Far-right lawmakers need to do theirs.
Those voices of Veterans and Military Families will be crucial in this fight. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to help VoteVets elevate the voices of Veterans and Military Family Members in the coming debt ceiling fight? There is so much at stake here.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230118-1-15&t=1&akid=7290%2E3013755%2E_u_EU6)

subject: Santos swindled a disabled vet out of money to save the vet's dying dog?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Tell Congress to Expel George Santos >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40375676-86b8-4422-984e-e6f4dd2e6c5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | **Representative George Santos won't resign, so it's time for Congress to expel him. The House can do it with a 2/3 vote. [Tell them to do it NOW.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T973eff3f-fce6-4875-9407-643414bdc1e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Santos may well be the biggest liar ever to to be a member of Congress, and that's saying a lot. He lied about his work experience. He lied about his education. He lied about being Jewish. He lied about his grandparents being Holocaust survivors. Bizarrely, he even lied about being on a championship volleyball team -- at a school he never attended. **And somehow, it gets worse. Now it appears that [Santos swindled a disabled veteran out of thousands of dollars raised to save the veteran's dying dog.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fef3150-b4db-451e-b4f1-c5608df42562/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** God only knows what else will come out about Santos. But there is already more than enough reason to kick him out of Congress. And if Republicans won't do it, they should be forced to vote on it -- and go on record in defense of Santos -- every single day. [**Tell Congress to Expel George Santos NOW >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T210f9349-3171-4aa4-854d-fac70cc70497/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:

[_**RSVP right now for the live virtual event with Senator Tina Smith, Dr. Leah Stokes, Manish Bapna, and Lissa Lynch on Tuesday, January 24 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=3&akid=13236%2E53494%2EX-39An) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=4&akid=13236%2E53494%2EX-39An) | [RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=5&akid=13236%2E53494%2EX-39An)

President Biden made a pledge to the American people to achieve 100% clean electricity by 2035, and together with NRDC (Natural Resources Defense Council), we're revealing the roadmap Biden can use to get us there.
**Want to learn about the roadmap and hear how you can help get the U.S. to 100% clean power?**
[_**Join me and our line-up of climate champions for "Evergreen Action and NRDC Present: Roadmap to 100% Clean Power", airing live next Tuesday, January 24 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=6&akid=13236%2E53494%2EX-39An)
Onward,
Sam Ricketts

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: We need to build up our party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, The 2024 Indiana political landscape is coming into clear view. We’re seeing the national trends of the Republican Party happening right here in Indiana: Republicans are divided and fighting amongst themselves. As extreme Republicans like Mike Braun jockey for position, **Democrats have an opportunity to capitalize on their arrogance and extremism.** We know that the key to success in politics is a long-term commitment to organizing at the local level. That’s why we’re committed to investing in municipal elections in 2023, flipping as many mayoral seats as we can, and setting ourselves up for success in 2024. [**If you’re with us, chip in $10 to our cause and help us build a safer, stronger Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57465768/388064735/1643342139?refcode=230118-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmRjNzU5OS00Yzk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uV5GVkF0b9bxQCyCAv3E_UZy_2ypzR6Mnn_xfNflE4s=) As Republicans continue to look to the past, like the 2020 election, and invoke unnecessary culture wars, Democratic candidates and officials are focused on the future of our state and the issues that matter most to Hoosiers. Because when it comes down to it, no matter the voting history, we all want a strong economy and a safe place for our families to live, work, and thrive. We know that the key to success in politics is a long-term commitment to organizing at the local level. name: Full Mag News
subject: Are American schools getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=449a258df7054c1a982287af8a1e3f09&_e=Kio7FPUume_9iULm9kEadqZkmnnVgOVo1wMZWMV3lr_yMOETKMF0IP2D0njGga7xibcZFVnhCgurk3SGtav9xe6UCpqYGB81VO_czWytoRVgV0hXB_-rx-TbR7el8o_Qvf_vUpQXeRyzcute6lhwWojMs9xUDaEeH3uaZCxrm0Ary8wP3BSZ3GrVxUylmweoc-5hyAckNU3eVKMNTAellYe7Jd8p0dkj8kNQiWrEgXGShKaEpzYgDY0-9NXibYw4gWfiMT3qBgx4xqwTZEVfRUvZAsXIMYwNRpOsp3K2dIV2hZnlTOJzPrGncT2cSdhPG7I3tHSQGDqr6Ty7lJs-V_vRSqGfF6uS1hj6KHOZnul_Lhv3IoP8XGFrI6lDeVk0)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=449a258df7054c1a982287af8a1e3f09&_e=Kio7FPUume_9iULm9kEadqZkmnnVgOVo1wMZWMV3lr_yMOETKMF0IP2D0njGga7xibcZFVnhCgurk3SGtav9xe6UCpqYGB81VO_czWytoRVgV0hXB_-rx-TbR7el8o_Qvf_vUpQXeRyzcute6lhwWojMs9xUDaEeH3uaZCxrm0Ary8wP3BSZ3GrVxUylmweoc-5hyAckNU3eVKMNTAellYe7Jd8p0dkj8kNQiWrEgXEYKeg6TXZWXWUuXLAQF0Iih2xXB_v0-9SngMNJYPglf01TVWb91G9qiHcAW0PaRPjamBTyIr3VjUfpfca2Bs9q5pcFi7YN9ybvrctp2ggQBFhmqZWpxCoaKe8hczn-YoQzTL4ey55xWsHed0y19bdI) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=449a258df7054c1a982287af8a1e3f09&_e=Kio7FPUume_9iULm9kEadqZkmnnVgOVo1wMZWMV3lr_yMOETKMF0IP2D0njGga7xibcZFVnhCgurk3SGtav9xe6UCpqYGB81VO_czWytoRVgV0hXB_-rx-TbR7el8o_Qvf_vUpQXeRyzcute6lhwWojMs9xUDaEeH3uaZCxrm0Ary8wP3BSZ3GrVxUylmweoc-5hyAckNU3eVKMNTAellYe7Jd8p0dkj8kNQiWrEgXEFlqIOGBwD_ClaiMUiHK1l-mBOdMmkR1JnaOM587Lig0Egjt01jqyuuYVQT2bQMledOneU1OhqQ22LNwt9M8bRnn2BYj4y3oFsHmiBeAkFBggh2zsTZolFAvargCgz-eqtnnkVud9bprOmHgwZplwq) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

clean_body: Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government | | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: DEVELOPING... GOP preparing plan to drill public lands. We need your help.
body:
__Your impact goes three times as far when you join today. |
---

|
DEVELOPING -- we just got news that House Republicans are working on a proposal to _devastate_ America's public lands. A draft bill would _require_ the Biden Administration to open more public lands to dirty oil and gas drilling.

**This is likely going to be one of the first bills from the new Republican-led House.** It would be a shameless giveaway to oil companies that profit off of pillaging the country's natural resources and pristine wild areas._****_

**Peter -- we can't let this bill pass without a fight. If the environmental movement stays quiet now, our response will set the stage for every environmental fight this year.**

We just kicked off our Membership Drive for 2023 -- and we're asking for your help. Can you fund our hard-hitting environmental campaigns by [becoming an LCV member today for just $5? For a limited time, every gift makes 3X the impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz9_)

| | **
** **League of Conservation Voters
2023 Membership Drive **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_A0~J-)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[Claim your LCV membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_A0~J-)**** |
---|---|---

Earlier this month, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy proved that he will do anything -- including empowering the worst, most anti-science, most anti-democracy, most anti-reality Members of Congress -- to help stay in power.

To keep this anti-climate House majority in check, we need to campaign like hell. We're gearing up to drive thousands of letters and calls into Congress. We're rallying environmentalists in key states. And we're pressuring pro-climate senators to hold the line against these extremist bills coming out of the House.

We're in for a tough fight over the next two years -- how big we can go and how hard we can fight will depend on your support.

So we're asking: [claim your LCV membership for just $5 today. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz9_)

With committed environmentalists like you in our corner, I know we'll be successful, Peter. Thank you for joining us in the fight for a cleaner, healthier, and more just future.

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---
**[**JOIN FOR JUST $5 TODAY**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

---

name: United Rural Democrats HQ
subject: Did you hear what happened in Belvidere, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
This isn't new for rural communities across the country | | | Hi Peter, **In case you didn't hear the**[**news**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbRqlpsbvu9lwzWPGGxibzz8XTjTZkeWeGyNeZbwRHZh_LenSxC4BCtM5fXJkm20yx_putKKiCCZkvUxguzPXY-UtgQM-Fvt86__m2Nd88rH_Zj61Ol4uBJX-989vb5vp3IfDWDs2qHmWUtkgfr162o-fQB-3eDEVlxD_DG_YcuKs-J78y8kpQbBkCIlTb9xwimbN1y2le9rmPscE_ZFyOXR8zzG29zuHwRdxIyERb1RuouXaGzQFFINCGQZSd_dgw0P741ennwQymQWt8DHLVRjt0DtcWPl9427mFICMGJEOEj7WVI_3DxiQIKJgirymblNdaHj4YQVdZqahKTVxHs0U3KJE4p2ramo9j-IAwYMHuD3CfKlBy6P461iLdmz5lOKNK0e30nOR83V0uUsnkJw/3sy/6ekFRWbUT_-glhyAgI_rGA/h0/V49TJXeRncL-Auo7qsWTgH9CIAmC81O4KjIIjdbHaOg)**, a Jeep plant closed in Belvidere, Illinois, putting 1,350 hard working Americans out of a job.** The town of Belvidere sits about an hour northwest of Chicago, and has relied on auto assembly plants for jobs since the 1960s. What was once a plant that produced 190,000 Jeep Cherokees a year, employing about 5,000 people, now produced just around 20,000 in 2022. Auto manufacturer Stellantis recently announced that the plant would be shutting down "indefinitely" in February 2023. The loss of a manufacturing plant is devastating, especially in rural areas. Those 1,350 workers have families, support small businesses, and can contribute to the community because of a steady job. **Without that security, their livelihoods, and the wellbeing of everyone in the town, is in danger.** This theme of shuttering manufacturing plants is a common thread across rural areas throughout the past few decades. It's also why we need political leaders who understand the enormous impact that these plants have on towns, and the need to make rural economies more resilient and ripe for job growth. That's why we support rural Democrats who understand the need for labor protection, investments in manufacturing competitiveness, skills training for the jobs of the future, affordable education, and support programs for those who are out of work. ****[**We need your help to save towns like Belvidere, Peter. Will you chip in $5 or more to make sure that we elect leaders who can protect rural communities and jobs?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc0zZXQuP5iaFLRM2K0eGWMqyroy4KtC_FpxEjWb5c0sO2eTRwnBRl96J-lv6zOSAjYfDk11Ds8I3NG0qaD_UxOoJJ8q_V5YrtsS4gnhwkxI2hbr5-gPxtqaMocu9OnpmGXvjIHVn1_dOx3GAJpOPEHpM-jnKM0MJ4kC74fJ-yy3nEe9K0EsgaVYya9Y5W3IJVy1gFbY5buxaGngeGrKJvkvo-qoQ_sJGfgtWJgL_25xGMCeEwl4_212znS1vdE54Ey6gLVEQqs1nxxg6XyXGkPhuwkzTYJ6w0-moh7jvXb6rnSCe6qcugiSG1pBT7HPM5jawqrJAYSEriXY7B0WoALheRSw2VCHrwtkv-i8FKX3CI-UKQlkhmZJnDT6K8PLOZNWt7vXad1WTDRNQS7DoA6Bq9-9oSVEXC1acdFyrxxLQ/3sy/6ekFRWbUT_-glhyAgI_rGA/h1/xQn3PzssTjcAFri_nQl_FxyvkNnC1gZH6ghk0Ui73m0) **[CHIP IN HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GccnSdMknf-GUz-REg9xYRq2y4aYS0OtLGsnCqu_nDM5Cv4Ay386iJC7xWK2MCHzMznHkob2gh2vLAxlHB9ZEBwk4gHKXi-XKqZHtMK_uK_8nvjvMsqHEWiEYgN1ATCfd1fxWuFK-2AfWZBOUOMWRdYNTOP3n-BA_jM8Kh0lvXF2s2FSkoCjjefPutbtIIse6lwn3hfuXdCTK84DG3hbSu9HHjSDMLsOR7LsoccI5viXcNdmQ2iAZPGp0CSw2Y5tKjpWaDafpxzcG3DljxX2s391oVkqWICOeL2tAeSvjxDjZZsob_Yu2TDZ1TQy47dlwbTgeClR5l5p14ChYlJF4frjyg3oalNU9s5gXaCjSvAh3i8BTtRODvJxK8ARLZAqBkBhUDRcQGgvKBfQJux8gP627twbMsE0Ssg2-eM9H6Qi8/3sy/6ekFRWbUT_-glhyAgI_rGA/h2/lCbnfTNRPDHD8gr6dkJDalkBBMumcBwNhLO91ECbaik)** Thank you for your support. – United Rural Democrats HQ

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0bb7cbed47147e380a0045424e452e0&_e=HoTpH3pPNrdipzvMhIbo-8WqNzZZfsDVFy-KCelsAjopNOdUC6xUsJJB0JwuPdYiBNdiy1cMtEw-LhpGO70WHAZE9ljYPtDQ9Q0WglZWKknKSxbyB5hXtJSSk_OeMO7avrJp08mvXw1MZ9vYIYW33YWvvphllOaDen1T_0uehVKfDBYnhmKCEBFK2pGsvs-cgl6K7CYF0mrDU-IOtillUCG3YVGRjmqhXkH8MuGYQ1Zau6jy9xp2odH5Aio7FVP_k5IGQHtFLU5ysEaPIGoeVqIUnGA0hcgUhBhGp_csPvb21NeIBTqNxVjq_d2v4___gf6IGHSJqiip8h_yv_Jvdt6aBWQXV7PlIFnsQhDG646p4qHqi-3TNEBnk6mt56vsuHHSNP9IWq9ke4ACwPBX2g%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0bb7cbed47147e380a0045424e452e0&_e=HoTpH3pPNrdipzvMhIbo-8WqNzZZfsDVFy-KCelsAjopNOdUC6xUsJJB0JwuPdYiBNdiy1cMtEw-LhpGO70WHAZE9ljYPtDQ9Q0WglZWKknKSxbyB5hXtJSSk_OeMO7avrJp08mvXw1MZ9vYIYW33YWvvphllOaDen1T_0uehVKfDBYnhmKCEBFK2pGsvs-cgl6K7CYF0mrDU-IOtillUCG3YVGRjmqhXkH8MuGYQ1Zau6jy9xp2odH5Aio7FVP_WJcaNZKGpIXIrARKycMCHJizYrhkaXSbhnNQ6N8if172YNGmHAJX1xn5LAdJsrm1oVKf5ncnVnzuwChsHmg2CnWeApRRND90JARRdGQ9vmBAGF2kiLVb-Oadzv0XzljCojU3W5QS-toHq-Lz6JjqWg%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0bb7cbed47147e380a0045424e452e0&_e=HoTpH3pPNrdipzvMhIbo-8WqNzZZfsDVFy-KCelsAjopNOdUC6xUsJJB0JwuPdYiBNdiy1cMtEw-LhpGO70WHAZE9ljYPtDQ9Q0WglZWKknKSxbyB5hXtJSSk_OeMO7avrJp08mvXw1MZ9vYIYW33YWvvphllOaDen1T_0uehVKfDBYnhmKCEBFK2pGsvs-cgl6K7CYF0mrDU-IOtillUCG3YVGRjmqhXkH8MuGYQ1Zau6jy9xp2odH5Aio7FVP_DbP4ETrpCPebU2XUFwjKMvoScydgIRZVIs-Q9lY10oM6FoTb96tLrTE6ezyCYsqGmUHko3wtg7aiPhIS5Hy3OSACYoNKHJWY5-oSOPEuxUp8WUIDso0w603vNG-nymYitX6APSr2hzQo20NBZ2qTxw%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z27rtfog3hiom3ihgb1ejk81oi4n6ar8h1o6qv48_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztv53frq20dhcccds0jkv4nm5o1jptodvn0mrhvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvcg7oe2jhj7jkphr9m9t2aq7b300g2um830falg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs4t7c8c41jj8cebsm3j36ai727h29hmmqo752bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu0ilh8qanousf1s4fcd4ap9mf8oti536duk3tbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z87nddl60olgbj8rcctj9avqo3bntdfukrhsei18_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z26l217tpblhsr3tj4kkqna6v0t7fvus1br4n0ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkrrs3djqs7dod23grh4vf2amnpbgjhfvjnb9c1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjeraa9326cq3tlda6ufbe1j23gmrj32j5runa10_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zev730qdb23trfehbdi28rmurh09c0valhph3dg8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zenfgn5h15u69km040j2l2jv0cs5qjm6oktcpoqo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5g6eo76chj649fg)

body:
This is NOT what Pennsylvanians voted for.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57483648/388111333/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230118Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNGIyMTI4LTdhOTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l4cCOyD8H7t1SJffcF7gnJ05owXgRFRpN-RwJPjryF8=)
| This is truly unbelievable, fellow activist: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57483649/388111334/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230118Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_A_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNGIyMTI4LTdhOTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l4cCOyD8H7t1SJffcF7gnJ05owXgRFRpN-RwJPjryF8=) **Senate Republicans in Pennsylvania are trying to hold justice for abuse victims hostage to enact partisan, divisive policies.**

A package of constitutional amendments was passed last week through Senate Bill 1 including the two-year window to justice for abuse victims, voter ID, and the legislative regulatory override.

Republican leaders argue that their partisan agenda is "equally as important" as helping victims of horrific abuse be allowed to hold abusers and their enablers accountable.

These Harrisburg partisans are trying to leverage survivors’ trauma and urgent need for justice for the political gain of their party. Their policies are unnecessary and purely political changes to our election and regulatory systems.

**[Fellow activist, the right to the ballot box and the right to justice should never be at odds. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us stand up for both of these rights and put the will of the people over the will of the extremist politicians?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57483650/388111335/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230118Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNGIyMTI4LTdhOTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l4cCOyD8H7t1SJffcF7gnJ05owXgRFRpN-RwJPjryF8=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57483651/388111336/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230118Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNGIyMTI4LTdhOTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l4cCOyD8H7t1SJffcF7gnJ05owXgRFRpN-RwJPjryF8=) This is precisely why voters dislike Harrisburg and kicked Republicans out of the majority in the PA State House. In 2022, voters resoundingly sent a message to Harrisburg and D.C. that our elections are secure. 3 out of 4 Pennsylvania voters said they are confident in the way our elections are run.

clean_body: This is NOT what Pennsylvanians voted for. = | This is truly unbelievable, fellow activist: = Senate Republicans in Pennsylvania are trying to hold justice for abuse victims hostage to enact partisan, divisive policies. A package of constitutional amendments was passed last week through Senate Bill 1 including the two-year window to justice for abuse victims, voter ID, and the legislative regulatory override. Republican leaders argue that their partisan agenda is "equally as important" as helping victims of horrific abuse be allowed to hold abusers and their enablers accountable. These Harrisburg partisans are trying to leverage survivors’ trauma and urgent need for justice for the political gain of their party. Their policies are unnecessary and purely political changes to our election and regulatory systems. = = This is precisely why voters dislike Harrisburg and kicked Republicans out of the majority in the PA State House. In 2022, voters resoundingly sent a message to Harrisburg and D.C. that our elections are secure. 3 out of 4 Pennsylvania voters said they are confident in the way our elections are run. Any policy that creates yet another barrier for Pennsylvanians to cast their vote is not in the best interest of our Commonwealth. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ro990vrple95dfj2m19lv0m27g9an2je7a5kuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl6ofb2qebdpvgj0rutnhul5oqpr6s2ils0g9hdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bui1e250r07hrebllq5mkc14j69lef174oo038_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvjfqsh3co1grg4hffoglue6iuo1qelha32atfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbk70vn5fi1a2er1honqle4c7l9uqmpsav7s9518_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c1jm1pj4cph2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zpfa1f3dm8elktue9ejl54glkesad3lktr521oh0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpdoabnn9qv0qig4hkjf0ecqsgql7a767f7td0ro_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5g6eo76chj649fg)

body:
Heading into November 2022, polls had our race within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
| | |
---
Hello – heading into November 2022, polls had our race within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. GOP spending against us was through the ROOF. In order to win, my (victorious!) campaign took on a bit of debt.

Now that Republicans are in control of the House, it is more important than ever that I’m laser-focused on serving Granite Staters in the Senate. I’d like to be done with this debt once and for all.

**The more money raised from emails like this one, the less time I have to spend thinking about fundraising. **

**[That’s why I’m hoping I can count on you to rush $3 or more – as much as you can, it all adds up – to my campaign right now so that we can retire this debt. Please, chip in what you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57467539/388071716/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2188-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTU5ZjZhNC01MTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2a88PpzvHzvC9vgNRB-0pkQPwcC65HZ7yqkQWah9CU=)**** **

body:
VERY IMPORTANT MEETING! DON'T MISS THIS! JAN 23RD • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA We are very excited to have
| |
---
|
---
## VERY IMPORTANT MEETING! DON'T MISS THIS! JAN 23RD • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
**We are very excited to have Dr. Douglas G Frank, Patriot Force, and Election Integrity Project ca will be with us. Don't miss this and make sure to bring your friends.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Dr. Douglas G Frank
---
|
---
Dr. Douglas G Frank is a world-renowned physicist with sixty peer-reviewed scientific publications, including cover and feature articles in the world’s leading scientific journals. His Ph.D. is in surface-electroanalytical chemistry, which combines chemistry and physics techniques for the manipulation and analysis of molecules on surfaces. He left academics in 1996, and has since done extensive consulting, inventing, and technical manufacturing, building electron microscopes, laser scanners, and precision manufacturing and control devices.
He is internationally known for his contributions to the bowing sport and manufacturing industry and helped to establish a special school for extraordinarily gifted youngsters near Cincinnati, Ohio, where he served as the Math & Science department chair for twenty-five years.
Recently, Dr. Frank was featured in two of Mike Lindell’s documentaries, (“Scientific Proof” and “Absolute Interference”) because he discovered several of the algorithms being employed to manipulate our elections.
Since December of 2020, Dr. Frank has been working incessantly for election reform with grassroots teams in about forty states. He’s met in person with Secretaries of State, Attorney Generals, dozens of legislators, and hundreds of local election officials, and is widely known for his informative and engaging presentations.
|
---
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=102822.177.1.cc37c5b1feedd58eb322648fb10c229c)
| |

---

Hey Peter, If you’re like us, you probably saw a lot of Republicans quoting Martin Luther King Jr. on Monday, committing themselves to his vision of equality for all. These are the same Republicans, BTW, who turned around and kept fighting to pass discriminatory voter suppression laws, undermine organized labor, and are banning lessons about race and the civil rights movement in our children’s schools. **They are hypocrites, plain and simple. And we need to vote them out. ** But those discriminatory voting laws that Republican-controlled state legislatures are passing all over the country are making it harder and harder to do that — so we need to work even harder to get folks to the polls this time around.
