clean_body: | = Hey Peter, If you’re like us, you probably saw a lot of Republicans quoting Martin Luther King Jr. on Monday, committing themselves to his vision of equality for all. These are the same Republicans, BTW, who turned around and kept fighting to pass discriminatory voter suppression laws, undermine organized labor, and are banning lessons about race and the civil rights movement in our children’s schools. They are hypocrites, plain and simple. And we need to vote them out. But those discriminatory voting laws that Republican-controlled state legislatures are passing all over the country are making it harder and harder to do that — so we need to work even harder to get folks to the polls this time around. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trailblazing Senator Debbie Stabenow of Michigan, in Leadership in the Democratic caucus, will be retiring. She was the first woman elected to the Senate from Michigan when she won her seat in 2000. One of the first names to be mentioned was Elissa Slotkin. Can you help Rep. Slotkin stand up to what’s going to be a very tough fight for this seat in 2024?
body:
It *was* a safe Senate seat ...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a77657a-1906-44d6-8908-659a51193760/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Have you heard that trailblazer Senator Debbie Stabenow of Michigan, in Leadership in the Democratic caucus, will be retiring? She was the first woman elected to the Senate from Michigan when she first won the seat in 2000._ **_Stabenow was a shoe-in for reelection. But, now that she's stepping aside, it'll be one of the most competitive races Republicans are guaranteed to target._** [**_To continue Stabenow's legacy, protect all we hold dear and elect a great progressive, we must start now. Republicans sure are. Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to send the talented, progressive & honest Rep. Slotkin to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40fb2804-ca16-409e-aa70-f7b6044da032/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_One of the first names to be mentioned was Elissa Slotkin. Rep. Slotkin's a terrific candidate_** , _one of a group of women with national security credentials elected to the House in swing seats in 2018 (also Reps Sherrill (NJ), Spanberger (VA) and Luria (VA)). As described aptly by the AP, Slotkin is perfect for this race because she is "a Congresswoman...coming off a decisive victory in November in one of the country's most competiitive House districtes." She. Will. Win._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0660c69-7862-4018-86c8-07039baced7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Slotkin is also a member of the House Pro-Choice Caucus, voted for an assault weapons ban, fought to keep ACA protections for pre-existing conditions and allow Medicare to bulk negotiate lower drug prices. She also has a background also as a CIA Analyst and in the Defense Department, a perfect, well-rounded resume for a U.S.Senator._ [**_To continue Stabenow's legacy, protect all we hold dear and elect a great progressive, we must start now. Republicans sure are. Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to send the talented, progressive & honest Rep. Slotkin to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T841dedf6-4058-47eb-9ae2-3f6b83a9e87e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting to keep the Senate! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T635ada8f-c15d-4782-b608-64382d1e9c23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: IMPORTANT MEETING JAN 23RD
body:
IMPORTANT MEETING JAN 23RD 6:30PM. El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA We are very excited to have Dr. Douglas G Frank, Patr
| | [](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=138859.852.1.9c2dd31745f8437fd6f070b7fe6d2ca6)
---
[](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=138859.853.1.8337865994498cb7a43da9129fc342a4) |
---
## IMPORTANT MEETING JAN 23RD 6:30PM. El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
|
---
We are very excited to have Dr. Douglas G Frank, Patriot Force, and Election Integrity Project ca will be with us. Don't miss this and make sure to bring your friends.
DERRICK GATES
BIO:
Dr. Douglas G Frank is a world-renowned physicist with sixty peer-reviewed scientific publications, including cover and feature articles in the world’s leading scientific journals. His Ph.D. is in surface-electroanalytical chemistry, which combines chemistry and physics techniques for the manipulation and analysis of molecules on surfaces. He left academics in 1996, and has since done extensive consulting, inventing, and technical manufacturing, building electron microscopes, laser scanners, and precision manufacturing and control devices.
He is internationally known for his contributions to the bowing sport and manufacturing industry and helped to establish a special school for extraordinarily gifted youngsters near Cincinnati, Ohio, where he served as the Math & Science department chair for twenty-five years.
Recently, Dr. Frank was featured in two of Mike Lindell’s documentaries, (“Scientific Proof” and “Absolute Interference”) because he discovered several of the algorithms being employed to manipulate our elections.
Since December of 2020, Dr. Frank has been working incessantly for election reform with grassroots teams in about forty states. He’s met in person with Secretaries of State, Attorney Generals, dozens of legislators, and hundreds of local election officials, and is widely known for his informative and engaging presentations.
IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO GIVE TO OUR EFFORTS TO SAVE CALIFORNIA AND THE NATION YOU CAN DO IT BELOW
Give to the
Paypal: [www.paypal.me/derrickgates](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=138859.854.1.a496e9981d2bce93e8f677bf6d8b2577)
Cashapp: $derrickgatesmin
Venmo: @Derrick-Gates-4
|

body:
Sign our card congratulating him now! >>

| [Congressman Hakeem Jeffries just made history as the first Black person to lead a major political party, so we’re sending a card tomorrow at 9 AM to congratulate him – _don’t miss your chance to sign now!_ »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57469238/388077204/-469111085?amount=3&amounts=1,3,5,10&refcode=UD_20230118_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YmMyOGQxLTU1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q4yqaIKUcCSOv2AGBQMmTE6DvK_oWr1PZmA5UweSm_w=) | **TO:** Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
**FROM:** Peter Willis
**SUBJECT:** CONGRATULATIONS!

To our new House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries,

Congratulations! I’m so excited for you and the next generation of Democratic leaders to take the reins.

We know you have big shoes to fill with succeeding Speaker Pelosi, but we know you’re ready for the challenge. _You’re going to do an incredible job!_

**And although House Republicans took back the House majority, I know that you and your leadership team are prepared to stop their hateful MAGA agenda – whatever it takes.**

[So to congratulate you, I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to UniteDemocrats to elect more leaders like you who will continue to fight for Democratic values in Congress »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57469239/388077205/-469111085?amount=3&amounts=1,3,5,10&refcode=UD_20230118_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YmMyOGQxLTU1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q4yqaIKUcCSOv2AGBQMmTE6DvK_oWr1PZmA5UweSm_w=)

Thank you for everything,

X Peter Willis | [CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER CONGRATULATING HAKEEM JEFFRIES »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57469240/388077206/-469111085?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230118_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YmMyOGQxLTU1OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q4yqaIKUcCSOv2AGBQMmTE6DvK_oWr1PZmA5UweSm_w=)

name: Josh Stein
subject: I'm humbled to announce my campaign for Governor of North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
and I hope you'll join me on the road ahead.
#
Hi there, Derek,
I'm Josh Stein, and I just announced my campaign for Governor of North Carolina.
Our country is at a crossroads -- and here in North Carolina, our future will be decided by the slimmest of margins in the next election. The stakes could not be higher.
Will women have access to the health care they need, when they need it? Or will extremist politicians make those decisions for them?
Will every eligible voter have an equal right to vote? Or will Republicans roll back voting rights and continue to gerrymander legislative districts to discriminate against certain voters? Will people have the power in our democracy -- or politicians?
Will we prioritize educating our kids and supporting our educators? Or will Republicans continue to undermine public education and pass tax giveaways to big corporations and their out-of-state shareholders?
Will we ensure everyone can get access to quality health care? Or will Republicans in North Carolina's legislature continue to refuse to expand Medicaid?
Will our government work for all of us -- or just the privileged and powerful?
**[I'm humbled to announce my campaign for Governor to build a better and brighter North Carolina. I'd be deeply grateful if you joined me. Please, split a contribution between John Fetterman and my campaign today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49659?refcode=em20230118-8214&t=1&akid=8214%2E434096%2E7u5ina)**
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49667?refcode=em20230118-8214&t=20&akid=8214%2E434096%2E7u5ina)**
My good friend John asked me to reach out to you directly because he knows the path forward won't be easy.
North Carolina is one of the most politically competitive states in the country -- and national Republicans will flood my state with millions of dollars in an attempt to stop us. They know that the outcome in North Carolina can have a major impact on who wins the next presidential election.
Derek, I am up for the challenge. I've run statewide in North Carolina when Donald Trump prevailed twice -- and won both times. I've taken on big pharma as Attorney General -- and won. I've gone up against corporate polluters -- and won. And I've taken e-cigarette manufacturer Juul to court for sparking a teen vaping epidemic -- and won.
**[Today, I'm asking you personally to join us in this fight and help us win. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and John Fetterman.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49659?refcode=em20230118-8214&t=21&akid=8214%2E434096%2E7u5ina)**
Let's get it done,
Josh Stein
North Carolina Attorney General and Democratic candidate for Governor

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230118-8214-footer&t=22&refcode2=8214_434096_7u5ina&akid=8214%2E434096%2E7u5ina)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=8214%2E434096%2E7u5ina)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=8214%2E434096%2E7u5ina)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: Join the ranks of the DNC’s top supporters by renewing your DNC membership. | | Derek, I'll be straight with you: A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure we need to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. So, I have to ask: Will you renew your DNC membership with a gift of $10 today? When you pitch in, you’ll also reserve your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card to show just how committed you are to electing Democrats nationwide. We need to make sure that Democratic candidates have the resources they need to compete everywhere. Thankfully, the DNC is making historic investments to organize, protect voters, and strengthen our party infrastructure in all 50 states, the territories, and D.C. But they’re relying on the year-round support from this grassroots team, Derek. Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Republicans in Disarray
subject: The Extremist Agenda of the House GOP Majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
body:
|
---
| | Peter — Ahead of their disastrous speaker vote, which showcased the full extent of the GOP’s dysfunction, the “turn back the clock” party of extremism released their priority agenda for the new Congress.

Here are some of their top action items:
* Pass two extreme anti-abortion measures — _which they’ve already done in their first weeks in power!_
* Roll back gains made by the Inflation Reduction Act and other Democratic measures, including key climate mitigation efforts! They even want to launch a giveaway to Big Oil.
* Expand their disingenuous fear mongering campaigns, including a new inquiry by Jim Jordan into the “weaponization” of government against MAGA conservatives (otherwise known as insurrectionists) including Trump. This is an unprecedented power grab that will attempt to stymie serious investigations by security agencies and our justice system.

clean_body: we need your help to keep it going | | | Peter, Our organizing program was the difference between winning and losing in 2022, but we need your help to keep it going. Let us explain: Between the 2022 general election and December runoff, Rev. Warnock increased his vote share in 103 out of Georgia’s 159 counties. In Stewart County in southwest Georgia, Rev. Warnock increased his vote share by 7.8%, the biggest increase of any county in the state! In such a close election, increases like that made all the difference. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = If we continue to invest in Georgia and continue to do the hard work reaching voters ALL across the state, we can keep Georgia blue in 2024 and for years to come. Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

MAGA Republicans have done NOTHING but try to tear President Biden down at every turn – _**and now, they’re threatening to IMPEACH him.**_

So we’re conducting an _urgent approval poll_ to keep Biden’s approval rating soaring and push back against MAGA Republicans in Congress:

[**DO YOU APPROVE OF PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Approval_v2/?source=VPP_20230118_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6040%2E878179%2Eu7TniH)

**That’s why we need 46,000 loyal Democrats to respond IMMEDIATELY:**

[**Answer before midnight -- Do you APPROVE of President Biden?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Approval_v2/?source=VPP_20230118_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=6040%2E878179%2Eu7TniH)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: We did it! First Place in Fundraising Dollars and Number of Donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Campaign Finance Reporting Numbers are in!
---
| | | | | | WITH YOUR GREAT HELP WE DID IT! FIRST PLACE IN FUNDRAISING
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
Dear Friend
Last Night at Midnight the Virginia State Board of Elections Released the Latest Fundraising Numbers for this Past Quarter. And here are the results for Senate District 12:
WE WON IN MOST DOLLARS RAISED Chase $147,543.99 Sturtevant $132,454.18 Ramirez $61,417.05
WE WON IN MOST NUMBER OF DONATIONS Chase 183 Sturtevant 159 Ramirez 128 .
And we did not solicit money from lobbyists or Political Action Committees.
While I'm in session for the next 46 days I cannot raise money. Please save your donations until after we gavel out on Saturday, February 25.
Meanwhile both of my opponents can continue to raise money while I'm busy working for you.
Please hold your future donations until after adjournment on SATURDAY FEBRUARY 25

Friend Know that I can't thank you enough and look forward to sending out personal thank you notes to each of you. Currently, I'm in session and focused on presenting bills and voting on bills. Our numbers came in and I wanted to let you know we finished in first place and had to let you know.
I know who gave. And I thank you. I checked my account several times a day to see how close we were to meeting our goal and I saw the names of those who gave. Please know that your personal handwritten note is coming, along with those who will receive a Chase Freedom hat.
Know that I see your name and that I am so thankful for every donation you made and know that I could not do this without you.
It will be 46 days before I can ask for donations again. So please don't send money right now. You will have to wait until Saturday, February 25 after we adjourn. I am in session from January 11 to February 25. Our next report will cover from January 1 to March 31, 2023.
We will have from February 25 until March 31, 2023 or 35 days to raise money before our next report. Here are the numbers. You can see them for yourself.
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: How Republicans are trying to help corporations cheat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The GOP defunded the IRS in 2010.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16111%2E3422442%2EtXs6Rv)
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_irs?source=EMAF18_1_IRS_20230118_V1_F&t=2&akid=16111%2E3422442%2EtXs6Rv)
* * *
In these first few weeks of a Republican controlled House, we’ve seen where Republican priorities lie: with their ultra-wealthy donors and multinational corporations.
A quick recap: Last year, Congress passed a bill into law that boosted IRS funding,**allowing the IRS to go after wealthy tax-cheats and enabling it to provide better customer service to taxpayers**.
Why this was necessary: **The IRS was defunded by Republicans in 2010** , allowing more wealthy tax cheats to go without audits, and empowering corporations to cheat. With 50,000 IRS workers set to retire soon, we need to get new personnel trained and ready to simply keep the IRS running.
Now, House Republicans passed a bill that would rescind this funding.**The only winners here would be big corporations who evade taxes.** When corporations avoid taxes, working people are left to pick up the slack, and this bill would add **$114 billion** to the deficit over ten years.
I was proud to oppose this bill. While it passed in the House, it won’t become law any time soon thanks to our Senate majority and President Biden. **But this is a clear example of who Republicans fight for when they have power.[Show your support for a fully funded IRS by signing our petition. Let’s show Republicans that people won’t be fooled by their fear-mongering.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_irs?source=EMAF18_1_IRS_20230118_V1_F&t=3&akid=16111%2E3422442%2EtXs6Rv)**
**[Sign the petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_irs?source=EMAF18_1_IRS_20230118_V1_F&t=4&akid=16111%2E3422442%2EtXs6Rv)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF18_1_IRS_20230118_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=16111_3422442_tXs6Rv&akid=16111%2E3422442%2EtXs6Rv)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: DeVore Argues Against Assault Weapons Ban, Judge to Rule by Friday
body:
This morning, in an emergency hearing over the unconstitutional assault weapons ban, Judge Joshua Morrison heard arguments and will rule by Friday.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3e63f6f6de03/breaking-devore-argues-against-assault-weapons-ban-judge-to-rule-by-friday?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Breaking: Effingham County Judge Hears Arguments During Emergency Assault Weapons Ban Hearing, Will Rule by Friday (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-effingham-county-judge-hears-arguments-during-emergency-assault-weapons-ban-hearing-will-rule-by-friday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Wednesday morning, in an emergency hearing to discuss, what many are calling, an “unconstitutional” assault weapons ban, Effingham County Judge Joshua Morrison heard arguments from representatives of Attorney General Kwame Raoul’s office, and from Tom DeVore, representing over 860 plaintiffs, saying he will issue a ruling by Friday.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-effingham-county-judge-hears-arguments-during-emergency-assault-weapons-ban-hearing-will-rule-by-friday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Sources confirmed to Illinois Review that late last night, Attorney General Kwame Raoul’s office attempted to delay the hearing by seeking substitution of assigned Judge Chad Miller. In response, Chief Judge Douglas Jarman reassigned the case to Judge Morrison, and the hearing proceeded as scheduled.

Earlier in the evening, sources also confirmed to Illinois Review that Raoul’s office asked for a one-week continuation, but that request was denied.

The hearing proceeded, ex parte (one side only), meaning a Judge can proceed without any representation from defendants. Ex parte is usually reserved for emergency purposes.

During the emergency hearing, representatives from the Attorney General’s office were present, attending on behalf of Gov. JB Pritzker, D, and Attorney General Raoul, D. However, the General Assembly and named defendants Speaker Chris Welch, D, and Senate President Don Harmon, D, were unrepresented at the hearing.

Former Republican nominee for Attorney General Thomas DeVore, who filed the lawsuit on behalf of over 860 plaintiffs, was also present at the hearing.

DeVore argued for roughly 25 minutes, while representatives from the Attorney General’s office spoke for more than 45 minutes.

The legislation “immediately prohibits the manufacturing, possession, delivery, sales, and purchase of assault weapons” with a few exceptions – if you are a police officer or you are in the military.

After the signing ceremony last week, Pritzker spoke to the press, where he had a stern warning for the conservative base across the state: there will be consequences for not following the law.

Days later, several law enforcement agencies said they would not enforce the gun ban, prompting Gov. Pritzker to issue another stern
** warning (https://wgntv.com/news/illinois/pritzker-threatens-to-fire-police-for-not-enforcing-illinois-gun-ban/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
: police will be fired for not enforcing the new law.

The Illinois State Rifle Association – an organization that Democratic legislators did not consult with when drafting the bill, didn’t mix words either, sending out a simple statement hours before Pritzker signed the new bill into law,
** saying (https://archive.aweber.com/newsletter/awlist4894361/MTczMTczMjQ=/anti-2a-bill-on-the-way-to-the-governor-s-desk.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“Challenge accepted. The Illinois State Rifle Association will see the State of Illinois in court.”

And on Wednesday morning, the ISRA followed through on accepting that challenge, and officially ** filed (https://news.yahoo.com/illinois-state-rifle-association-files-160100602.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
a federal lawsuit.

Please continue to follow
** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-il-ag-candidate-tom-devore-files-lawsuit-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-seeks-immediate-restraining-order.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for more updates as they become available.

** (https://youtu.be/mkUFRhvI42M?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas discuss Gov. Pritzker's motivation for signing the Assault Weapons Ban, on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer (Jan. 8, 2023).

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=913f6ae9a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_18_06_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-913f6ae9a2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Josh Stein
subject: I’m humbled to announce my campaign for Governor of North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
and I hope you’ll join me on the road ahead.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $200,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57480193/388093344/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2FlNWU1LTY2OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5LmPxeY8v0oxF0g8wUgke3_wGDyCx2XB-w1q7RSzF5c=&emci=f4696203-4997-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9cae5e5-6697-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=BfB0Dx0FnCbUkXHJZSRnRDR%2F%2FLHmYCxVWmBBf%2B72WQdn5GEL8CONDjhQ2tmAhCvalqO%2BrWIF0jKe0IZRbKAdiKdXAeSqPKTz7Tx%2B4tJDForwLsIpXhKbMmV7QEj7%2BpHfDh%2F3HBEsBqmiBb32%2ByPtPsFDBiA7exACzjeFdNsVL1izY7p5qNah%2BztbQGorzg%2BHNSwq68DiFZ8gKEDJr7e1mDCLWOUbC%2Fr3NHSkmE00moMW0j3pfbgFRNzWMu0hmNF8SH4sdjsjJRAKBAQNOC2yUkCFR5Uy2vexyVSotwntuzstlScgUeHvnWBPqATjiczzFAu2cERsFb0Rhgc4sWzYLLXuGTfR9%2Fqpfo0Xjqgo%2FbttK0LWGxSl50TyHhuKI%2BmcFPi9WHYyf5EZG35b7dXPFtXgvfZiNkDOS2umlwL6HIY%3D) at any time.
---
| Hi there Peter,

I’m Josh Stein, and I just announced my campaign for Governor of North Carolina.

Our country is at a crossroads – and here in North Carolina, our future will be decided by the slimmest of margins in the next election. The stakes could not be higher.

Will women have access to the health care they need, when they need it? Or will extremist politicians make those decisions for them?

Will every eligible voter have an equal right to vote? Or will Republicans roll back voting rights and continue to gerrymander legislative districts to discriminate against certain voters? Will people have the power in our democracy – or politicians?

Will we prioritize educating our kids and supporting our educators? Or will Republicans continue to undermine public education and pass tax giveaways to big corporations and their out-of-state shareholders?

Will we ensure everyone can get access to quality health care? Or will Republicans in North Carolina’s legislature continue to refuse to expand Medicaid?

Will our government work for all of us – or just the privileged and powerful? [_**I’m humbled to announce my campaign for Governor to build a better and brighter North Carolina. I’d be deeply grateful if you joined me. Please, split a contribution between Fight for Progress and my campaign today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57480194/388093345/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230118-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2FlNWU1LTY2OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5LmPxeY8v0oxF0g8wUgke3_wGDyCx2XB-w1q7RSzF5c=)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57480195/388093346/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230118-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2FlNWU1LTY2OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5LmPxeY8v0oxF0g8wUgke3_wGDyCx2XB-w1q7RSzF5c=)
---
My good friends at Fight for Progress asked me to reach out to you directly because they know the path forward won’t be easy.

North Carolina is one of the most politically competitive states in the country – and national Republicans will flood my state with millions of dollars in an attempt to stop us. They know that the outcome in North Carolina can have a major impact on who wins the next presidential election.

Peter, I am up for the challenge. I’ve run statewide in North Carolina when Donald Trump prevailed twice – and won both times. I’ve taken on big pharma as Attorney General – and won. I’ve gone up against corporate polluters – and won. And I’ve taken e-cigarette manufacturer Juul to court for sparking a teen vaping epidemic – and won.

[_**Today, I’m asking you personally to join us in this fight and help us win. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57480196/388093347/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230118-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2FlNWU1LTY2OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5LmPxeY8v0oxF0g8wUgke3_wGDyCx2XB-w1q7RSzF5c=)

Let’s get it done,

Josh Stein
North Carolina Attorney General and Democratic candidate for Governor

clean_body: and I hope you’ll join me on the road ahead. | Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $200,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so And of course, you can at any time. | Hi there Peter, I’m Josh Stein, and I just announced my campaign for Governor of North Carolina. Our country is at a crossroads – and here in North Carolina, our future will be decided by the slimmest of margins in the next election. The stakes could not be higher. Will women have access to the health care they need, when they need it? Or will extremist politicians make those decisions for them? Will every eligible voter have an equal right to vote? Or will Republicans roll back voting rights and continue to gerrymander legislative districts to discriminate against certain voters? Will people have the power in our democracy – or politicians? Will we prioritize educating our kids and supporting our educators? Or will Republicans continue to undermine public education and pass tax giveaways to big corporations and their out-of-state shareholders? Will we ensure everyone can get access to quality health care? Or will Republicans in North Carolina’s legislature continue to refuse to expand Medicaid? Will our government work for all of us – or just the privileged and powerful? = | = My good friends at Fight for Progress asked me to reach out to you directly because they know the path forward won’t be easy. North Carolina is one of the most politically competitive states in the country – and national Republicans will flood my state with millions of dollars in an attempt to stop us. They know that the outcome in North Carolina can have a major impact on who wins the next presidential election. Peter, I am up for the challenge. I’ve run statewide in North Carolina when Donald Trump prevailed twice – and won both times. I’ve taken on big pharma as Attorney General – and won. I’ve gone up against corporate polluters – and won. And I’ve taken e-cigarette manufacturer Juul to court for sparking a teen vaping epidemic – and won. = Let’s get it done, Josh Stein North Carolina Attorney General and Democratic candidate for Governor * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: This is the guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I have someone I want to introduce you to... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5ded455a06&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Hey friend, I have someone I want to introduce you to: **Congressman Jim Banks.**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=635684a1f7&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Jim’s a devoted husband, a proud father of three, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and **he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana.**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN $25 or MORE**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=34de88fae3&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom’s Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7dba0d7b80&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5ae0c9c3a0&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **But his fight didn’t stop there.** In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. Jim knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, and**that is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee’s Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation’s fiscal house in order.**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8977c66181&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **Jim is a proven fiscal conservative leader who will fight for a pro-growth agenda, and that’s exactly why Club for Growth Action is backing his fight for the U.S. Senate.** [**_Friend, will you send Jim Banks to the U.S. Senate to restore fiscal sanity to our government?_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9d19c2ea09&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7e03105793&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Thank you, David McIntosh Club for Growth Action
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Lauren Boebert, the QAnon supporter, thinks I’m a conspiracy theorist.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, fresh off of leading the national embarrassment that was
Kevin McCarthy’s first 14 failures to be elected House Speaker, far-right
election denier Lauren Boebert went on Fox News to attack me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]Lauren Boebert on Fox News with image of Adam Schiff

“They’re a bunch of Blue Anons, conspiracy theorists that have these witch hunts
and hoaxes that they chase after.” —Lauren Boebert to Fox News host Dan Bongino

Isn’t that rich? Lauren Boebert, the QAnon supporter who voted to overturn
the 2020 election for Trump just 3 days after being sworn into Congress,
thinks I’m a conspiracy theorist — and is vowing they will remove me from
the Intel Committee for this false charge.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]Derek, I’ll never stop working to defend our democracy from
extremists like Boebert who view their role in Congress as a kind of vile
performance art, but I can’t do it without your support. Will you pitch in
$10 to help my campaign respond to Boebert and Fox News’ latest attacks?

As Donald Trump’s presidential campaign kicks into full gear, his MAGA
cronies in the House Majority like Lauren Boebert pose a grave danger to
our country. Republicans nearly prevented the certification of the 2020
election from the minority. I fear now that with McCarthy fully dependent
on Boebert and others like her for support, the GOP could once again stand
in the way of a free and fair election if the result doesn’t go their way.

Derek, this is much bigger than just the committees I serve on.
The House GOP under Speaker McCarthy have the ability now, with their
majority, to undermine anyone who attempts to hold any MAGA Republican
accountable. There will be no checks on Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor
Greene, Jim Jordan, Matt Gaetz, or any other far-right conspiracy theorist
in Congress, or their endless fabrications, outrages, and attacks on our
democracy if we don’t push back.

No matter how unbelievable or ridiculous these attacks may seem, we can’t
give House Republicans a free pass to spread misinformation. As Trump’s
Big Lie has shown, if they repeat the lies often enough, their base of
MAGA supporters will come to accept them as truth.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]So I am asking you personally: Will you contribute $10 to my campaign
today to help us respond to Lauren Boebert’s attacks and the many more
that are sure to come in the next two years?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em.6K9j-B&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em.0DnwtB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Cm-_r3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em.cg_Pq_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jan2023_abs_em.tb8BsE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1012&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

One of the most dangerous things to our future is having elected officials
like Lauren Boebert who will say anything — and do anything — to get media
attention and further their own political self-interest.

There’s no doubt we will see more divisive rhetoric like this coming from
the GOP. So I’m counting on the support of this grassroots team to help
put a stop to it.

Thank you for your constant support,

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy ]Privacy Policy

http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1591%2E5257348%2EX03uwy

**Miriam Lira-Hickerson**
Miriam Lira-Hickerson is the Ombudsman of Consumer Affairs for Minorities at the Nevada Department of Business and Industry. She is responsible for implementing the Department's education and outreach activities within the State's minority communities. As the Ombudsman, Ms. Lira-Hickerson provides consumer education, helps resolve consumer issues involving fraud or deceptive trade practices, and assists with business outreach and development. She is also a senior certified mediator and has mediated numerous civil disputes; also, Hickerson has 15 years being a Producer and host of a weekly radio named " Consumer Protection." She was named the City of Las Vegas in April 2013 Citizen of the Month. Recently Ms.Hickerson was named by the National National organization (NAWBO) as an Iconic Distinction Woman in Corporate/Government Services 2022. Lira-Hickerson holds a bachelor's degree in Marketing and a master's degree in International Commerce from Instituto Politecnico Nacional in Mexico City. She graduated from the FBI Civil Academy and the Las Vegas Metro Police Department Hispanic Citizen Academy. She has been an FBI Ambassador since 2014.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: One failure after another
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
It’s time to hold this administration accountable
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=19c04e6e33b948f0bd6380c552f0c39d&_e=aOowSlYC8ETA1_jJ5VCcs2GkmEMMGsdoj6LpYJgFE31_w7kcavmEWz7ZzZ464XRK6Wx7zUKPl-z2nfQURKCGst5FmTUDI4BLH-iNwY9K6JAG2jr5lehqCiYJ-etWgJBSj8OoeEtV3qc9QSbKIjZkbw6VyVgER8LlSxmrjwlivrd5uEUfJyYkPZwe0CFOYLPCijPekueM3agUhQHI0OUV2_XCNv4LvZvwiT2ywwa2-dgFTqsNMpd5ySswzNhUoHOUuacW9bJB5KnynQq4eeIAeZsibtU5xjP2asSSSqZIjN9iIIfESWltO1NSsp-G1yRgiKvGXfdIzn9Gax1rFQuElOsnz501wA3Am91jHavjtgs%3D)
---
Peter,
---
One of the most important things to understand while being a member of Congress, is how to properly handle classified documents to ensure the safety of the information and our country.
---
**And yet, Biden is now under investigation for the mishandling of classified documents showing his neglect of basic security protocols after 50 years in political office.**
---
_These recent events, on top of the record high inflation, historic border crisis, and our energy crisis, proves that it’s been one failure after another for the Biden administration._
---
That’s why House Republicans are dedicated to ensuring that Joe Biden and his administration are held accountable for their many failures that have harmed the American people.
---
And with your continued support, I know that we can succeed.
---
[**Please watch my Fox Business interview and then make a contribution to help your new House majority hold the Biden administration accountable and fight against the radical Left to make a better America for YOU.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=19c04e6e33b948f0bd6380c552f0c39d&_e=aOowSlYC8ETA1_jJ5VCcs2GkmEMMGsdoj6LpYJgFE31_w7kcavmEWz7ZzZ464XRK6Wx7zUKPl-z2nfQURKCGst5FmTUDI4BLH-iNwY9K6JAG2jr5lehqCiYJ-etWgJBSj8OoeEtV3qc9QSbKIjZkbw6VyVgER8LlSxmrjwlivrd5uEUfJyYkPZwe0CFOYLPCijPekueM3agUhQHI0OUV225X1Uvx7KFbdJT7LIpi0pGbu3AlNgXpozK0MvFK5v9vXDXaWOjSkvBmthyvUG_55IBTlOrwazNZWYDUr9OPgEY1xZQn4KJwnTv8wUOSTDx41B69FrkAPj3r8zn6HcLA3Gg2DMZWCizOTMnEpbvIzdw%3D)

clean_body: It’s time to hold this administration accountable | Peter, One of the most important things to understand while being a member of Congress, is how to properly handle classified documents to ensure the safety of the information and our country. And yet, Biden is now under investigation for the mishandling of classified documents showing his neglect of basic security protocols after 50 years in political office. These recent events, on top of the record high inflation, historic border crisis, and our energy crisis, proves that it’s been one failure after another for the Biden administration. That’s why House Republicans are dedicated to ensuring that Joe Biden and his administration are held accountable for their many failures that have harmed the American people. And with your continued support, I know that we can succeed. This administration has shown they only care about maintaining power and control as their policies result in failure after failure. But our new House majority is dedicated and determined to build a better America for you by fighting against the Left’s disastrous agenda. We have our work cut out for us but you can count on us to never give up in this important fight for the country and for YOU. Because of your continued trust and support, a better America is in our future. Thank you, Rep. Scott Fitzgerald Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

name: Dan Goldman
subject: They knew.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Republicans didn’t just know about George Santos’ lies. They were complicit. |
#
---
**They knew.** **They knew all along.** In response to a letter I wrote to him, Speaker Kevin McCarthy has now admitted to knowing about Santos’s misrepresentations during the campaign. And House Republican Chair Elise Stefanik was even more deeply involved in Santos’s fraudulent scheme, including by endorsing him, fundraising for his campaign, and sending her top political aide to help Santos replace his campaign team who resigned after learning that he was a total fraud. **This is much bigger than George Santos. This goes right to the top of the Republican Party.** McCarthy’s confirmation that he “had questions about Santos” and Stefanik’s silence in the face of reporting that she was in on the scheme leads to only one conclusion: **McCarthy and Stefanik were complicit in the scheme to defraud the voters of NY-3.** _This appears to be nothing less than a widespread, coordinated conspiracy to defraud the electorate — and it must be aggressively investigated._ **The American people don’t just deserve answers — they deserve accountability. body:
The GOP isn't wasting any time
#
Peter,
We still need to raise $3,000 towards our mid-month goal today to stay on track this month. Here’s why:
The GOP isn't wasting any time. House Republicans are already attacking reproductive rights in the new session.
Not only do we need to regain our Democratic House majority, but we also need to expand our Senate majority with more allies who will fight for Democratic values and pass legislation on our key priorities, including protecting reproductive freedoms, voting rights, lowering prescription drug costs, and comprehensive immigration reform.
Senator Durbin is fighting to protect reproductive health care and all of the progress we’ve made, **but he can’t do it without the help of grassroots supporters like _you_.**

subject: FWD: We must stop the attacks on our election system!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
They want to get rid of the one security measure our elections have... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4c7900fc1a&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter --

**You urgently need to see Chairman Heimlich's email from last night.** We are[ fighting to maintain](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=57aa96c1cf&e=6a281f566d) the only safeguard our election system has to protect from fraud: our signature verification process.

This means that we are going up against three different liberal organizations and the _Democrat's_ _favorite_ law firm, Perkins Coie, who want to dismantle the security of our elections. We truly need all hands on deck if we are going to fight this until the end.

[Contribute directly to our efforts today so we can keep up the fight ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=007844e2f9&e=6a281f566d)[\- any amount helps:](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e501977b6c&e=6a281f566d) [$5](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d6dab2d4f3&e=6a281f566d), [$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7249e774ad&e=6a281f566d), [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8b5d34bcc2&e=6a281f566d),[ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7bf330315a&e=6a281f566d)[or](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0d34593bc0&e=6a281f566d) [any other amount](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c4f53831c2&e=6a281f566d)[ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e13024a0d9&e=6a281f566d)[you can. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c356840b30&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Contribute to our efforts today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f0de0889eb&e=6a281f566d "Contribute to our efforts today!")
---
| [Failure is not an option. If these groups succeed there would be nothing to prevent rampant fraud. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fac4f32f5d&e=6a281f566d)[The future of our elections are at stake!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a534c0e84e&e=6a281f566d)

Sincerely,

Brady Batt
Executive Director
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
From: caleb@wsrp.org
Subject: We must stop these attacks on our election system!
---
| Peter,

**Democrat allies****have filed a lawsuit attacking the only safeguard our state's election system has in place.** Washington's election system is one of, if not THE, easiest process of the 50 states to participate in. Our elections continue to have high voter-turnout and few safeguards. The ONE process that ensures voters are who they say they are, is our signature verification process - which is now under ATTACK by the radical left.

**They want to completely get rid of Washington's ONLY safeguard against election fraud: Our signature verification process.**

Left wing groups are partnering with the Democrat’s favorite law firm, Perkins Coie, and asking left wing judges to strike down Washington’s signature verification law. If this lawsuit is successful, there will be no verification of a voter’s identity and our elections will be even more vulnerable to fraud.

Today, We are fighting back! Our lawyers filed a motion to intervene to stand up for election integrity and protect our law.

**[We CANNOT let them win this battle. We are going on the offensive and we need your help to fight back! Lawsuits are costly. Please chip in today, to help us stand up for election integrity.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=40568d5234&e=6a281f566d)**

---

clean_body: They want to get rid of the one security measure our elections have... | | | | | | | | Peter -- You urgently need to see Chairman Heimlich's email from last night. We are the only safeguard our election system has to protect from fraud: our signature verification process. This means that we are going up against three different liberal organizations and the Democrat's favorite law firm, Perkins Coie, who want to dismantle the security of our elections. We truly need all hands on deck if we are going to fight this until the end. , , | "Contribute to our efforts today!" | Sincerely, Brady Batt Executive Director Washington State Republican Party | | BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com From: caleb@wsrp.org Subject: We must stop these attacks on our election system! | Peter, Democrat allieshave filed a lawsuit attacking the only safeguard our state's election system has in place. Washington's election system is one of, if not THE, easiest process of the 50 states to participate in. Our elections continue to have high voter-turnout and few safeguards. The ONE process that ensures voters are who they say they are, is our signature verification process - which is now under ATTACK by the radical left. They want to completely get rid of Washington's ONLY safeguard against election fraud: Our signature verification process. Left wing groups are partnering with the Democrat’s favorite law firm, Perkins Coie, and asking left wing judges to strike down Washington’s signature verification law. If this lawsuit is successful, there will be no verification of a voter’s identity and our elections will be even more vulnerable to fraud. Today, We are fighting back! Our lawyers filed a motion to intervene to stand up for election integrity and protect our law. | "Support our efforts to FIGHT BACK against this attack" | To victory, Caleb Heimlich Chairman | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. It’s genuinely embarrassing I now have to call him a colleague. And yesterday we learned how far Kevin McCarthy was willing to defend him too. Not only did McCarthy let him get sworn in, he also announced yesterday he is giving Santos TWO committees to sit on. That’s right - the con artist who lied about his business experience will now be overseeing small business and science and tech policy for our country. clean_body: We wish we had better news, folks: We crunched the numbers, and we didn’t meet our first mid-month goal of the year. We didn’t fall short by a lot — but it’s enough to make a difference if we don’t catch up soon. Our fundraising goals are designed to help us plan for the months ahead. If we fall even a little bit short, we risk not having the resources to reach voters and build support for our campaign ahead of Democrats’ battle to defend the Senate majority in 2024. That includes Martin’s seat in New Mexico. But the good news is that if 17 folks from your area chip in before midnight tonight, we can get back on track with our fundraising. So, will you pitch in $10 or any amount to power our campaign? name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Semmel?=
subject: 20 patriots stood up to the D.C. cartel
body:
And secured a transformational victory. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10336315?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Less than two weeks ago, twenty of our best in the House of Representatives stood up to the entire political establishment in Washington D.C. and _won a decisive victory_.

Their stand against McCarthy and the fifteen rounds of voting that followed resulted in historic concessions and a transformational agreement, paving the way for America First legislative priorities and an investigation by Congress into woke and weaponized agencies, such as the FBI.

Now, we’re able to tell you a bit more about the **indispensable work we were doing behind the scenes** and _continue to do_ to support the twenty stalwarts against the Washington Cartel.
---
|
---
| **The Nerve Center of the Revolt Against McCarthy**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=911ec8a0e5&e=17913c7d6d)
---
This week, _Real Clear Politics_ [reported](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=06922ff1b0&e=17913c7d6d) on much of the background machinations happening in Congress and the political world during the historic Speakership fight.

While other beltway groups shied away from the fight, “Vought's group [Citizens for Renewing America] was one of the few who welcomed the GOP civil war in miniature on the House floor.”

As reported, **we became the “nerve center” of the mutiny against McCarthy**. In closed-door meetings, phone calls, and strategy sessions, we offered tactics, guidance, and support to numerous of the twenty offices facing down the D.C. establishment.

We were honored to be recognized by Rep. Chip Roy, a leader in the fight, who called our efforts “critically important” to the overall effort, praising “the intellectual heft that comes along with Russ’ thinking and his experience as OMB director.”
|
---
| **WATCH: Standing by the Twenty Patriots Who Forced McCarthy’s Hand**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=f78379ef66&e=17913c7d6d)
---
Our [new video](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e156a747f8&e=17913c7d6d) explains how twenty patriots took a stand against the D.C. cartel during the McCarthy speakership revolt, risking **their political futures to fight for the American people**.

They were vilified in the press (even by some usually on our side), attacked by the empty suits of the establishment, and pressured by various political forces to give in. Without their stand, it would be business as usual for the cartel. Instead we’re pushing forward with one of the boldest Congressional agendas in a generation.

That’s why we’re continuing to support and aid these members and why _we just launched an_ _advertising campaign thanking them_ for fighting for the American people.
|
---
---
|
---
| **The Fight Against McCarthy and a New Church Committee**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=57991eec9b&e=17913c7d6d)
---
Following the transformational agreement in the House, our boss Russ Vought [joined](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2dbeecced9&e=17913c7d6d) host John Roberts on _Fox News_ to discuss the new rules package and how it could give true conservatives power in a coalition-style government.

**A Victory for the American People: You Helped Make This Possible**

The outcome of the speakership fight, which resulted in a new Church-style committee and a budget based on our [Woke and Weaponized Defund Budget](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=efe45879b3&e=17913c7d6d), as well as other America First legislative priorities is a victory we can be proud of. Thanks to your commitment, this is no longer a policy plan. It’s a real, tangible pathway forward to bust up the Washington cartel.

Their days are numbered. The D.C. cartel is cracking. When conservatives refuse to cave and fight on principle we can move mountains.
|
God bless,

Rachel Semmel
Communications Director
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=1fde5b288e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6ab705b445&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=87e4e499da&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=865ba8ee9a7846c89d9f803f8bcdddce&_e=SCkIjnxMK6pSXU4NQCnJ_KZHocooa6Tc40VAVP2LIqzoyLn4or6_ow2hiPY4wE7Cvq3YB_U9T-yoZ_E-KWWWJX11FoqFVNW_Sb793aF50hPDtqDsDHEtivXSLUGqdYur2gsT7PzgyJlJHO2nGRUDe-qF8A5x3fOHYZciu1WcVzJQ-lur1Rv1m72hvYmLwVFs-c2dXrJkp-SAQIaXBDfxvxKMsqg-PUBDQKWhgk0-Oj-wF_7RFN3bPTh-SxsVUSQhnpvjy47zUx6vFPshRTe1UgauOQ43qbXbgdq5n5lowc4%3D)

Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=865ba8ee9a7846c89d9f803f8bcdddce&_e=SCkIjnxMK6pSXU4NQCnJ_KZHocooa6Tc40VAVP2LIqzoyLn4or6_ow2hiPY4wE7Cvq3YB_U9T-yoZ_E-KWWWJX11FoqFVNW_Sb793aF50hPDtqDsDHEtivXSLUGqdYur2gsT7PzgyJlJHO2nGRUDe2XOk44hZxBE_wD7qItEbl3Kx6kgbttNw5cy9mLaXc1yZb5Ufn_S_PcStQsBZF6z84su4STueHblbezgVT53TF5B06ID2ZEqZi6NwTbf2AHgflnaeVA7_7ESYYIFhMmko-wuvYXD0Q-wp6EKDHJQpjk%3D)

subject: The most important election you’ve never heard about:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter, this is Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and in a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a donation between WisDems and Tammy Baldwin so we can reach our goal to win our next pivotal election in April,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57481511/388101652/170564638?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg1NWU2Ny02ZTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5LgcHvgqoZ8WCAA7sNuDPsZg_NTXPBcRZF7Ai1LXjk=)** but first I want to explain the stakes: **On April 4, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court** — in an election that will determine whether that body will have a conservative or a progressive majority until 2025. This race will shape voting rights, decisions on election subversion, legislative district lines, and so much more — and will likely have a larger effect on the 2024 presidential and Senate race than any other contest in the country in 2023. Over these last two presidential cycles, the state Supreme Court has played an outsized role in shaping the electoral playing field and the powers of government in ways that have usually systematically advantaged Republicans in Wisconsin. In 2020, Donald Trump asked SCOWIS to illegally throw out tens of thousands of votes in Wisconsin’s most Democratic-leaning areas. Thankfully, SCOWIS stopped him, but only by a slim 4-3 margin. If we can rebalance the Court, we are more likely to stop these brazen attacks on our democracy in their tracks. **With a conservative justice retiring, April 4 represents a chance to flip an open seat** — which could lead to a Wisconsin Supreme Court majority ready to adopt far less gerrymandered state legislative maps, defend voting rights, rule that Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban is invalid, and otherwise side with the law rather than Republican ideology. Fair maps, in turn, could open the door to contested legislative majorities in 2024 and the possibility of winning a blue trifecta in Wisconsin in 2024 or 2026. The Democratic Party of Wisconsin intends to fully support the more progressive candidate in this nonpartisan contest. In keeping with other recent high-stakes races here, **this is likely to be the most expensive Supreme Court race in Wisconsin history** , so we’ll need all the support we can get to win in November. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you for help now so my team can prepare, Peter. Will you split a donation of any amount to WisDems and Tammy Baldwin to score big wins in April and beyond?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57481512/388101653/170564638?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg1NWU2Ny02ZTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5LgcHvgqoZ8WCAA7sNuDPsZg_NTXPBcRZF7Ai1LXjk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Wisconsin Democrats and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57481514/388101655/170564638?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg1NWU2Ny02ZTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5LgcHvgqoZ8WCAA7sNuDPsZg_NTXPBcRZF7Ai1LXjk=)

clean_body: | Peter, this is Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and in a moment, = but first I want to explain the stakes: On April 4, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court — in an election that will determine whether that body will have a conservative or a progressive majority until 2025. This race will shape voting rights, decisions on election subversion, legislative district lines, and so much more — and will likely have a larger effect on the 2024 presidential and Senate race than any other contest in the country in 2023. Over these last two presidential cycles, the state Supreme Court has played an outsized role in shaping the electoral playing field and the powers of government in ways that have usually systematically advantaged Republicans in Wisconsin. In 2020, Donald Trump asked SCOWIS to illegally throw out tens of thousands of votes in Wisconsin’s most Democratic-leaning areas. Thankfully, SCOWIS stopped him, but only by a slim 4-3 margin. If we can rebalance the Court, we are more likely to stop these brazen attacks on our democracy in their tracks. With a conservative justice retiring, April 4 represents a chance to flip an open seat — which could lead to a Wisconsin Supreme Court majority ready to adopt far less gerrymandered state legislative maps, defend voting rights, rule that Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban is invalid, and otherwise side with the law rather than Republican ideology. Fair maps, in turn, could open the door to contested legislative majorities in 2024 and the possibility of winning a blue trifecta in Wisconsin in 2024 or 2026. The Democratic Party of Wisconsin intends to fully support the more progressive candidate in this nonpartisan contest. In keeping with other recent high-stakes races here, this is likely to be the most expensive Supreme Court race in Wisconsin history , so we’ll need all the support we can get to win in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Wisconsin Democrats and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Yours in the fight, Ben Wikler PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

name: James H. Harvey III, American Veterans Center
subject: I was a Tuskegee Airman
body:
I was one of the first “Top Guns” of the U.S. Air Force. | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9NFChg-MP5OxiB-haWyQII9WyXR9z9mmdt97X5KkjIQ2DWsQFf5qyXaekkIBeSorxHfuKCqV04bb2Dc_pJeK7KMOP0-oTjOfEejFN72bOrV9B0RVHalS7rw01HW_uKuutO-94wd6pcd69gI99hFERUE%3D)
---
Fellow American, I was one of the first "Top Guns" of the U.S. Air Force. In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force's first Fighter Gunnery Meet. Over multiple days, we competed against other squadrons in dive bombing, skip bombing, rocket firing, panel strafing, and aerial gunnery at 20,000 and 12,000 feet - _and we won_. But the Air Force listed the 1949 competition winner as "Unknown" for 46 years because our team was composed of Tuskegee Airmen ... and they didn't want people to know we were so good.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9IcEW6EkZSilscMZafVjLLVV-BPU0UlruvpGdnjZAJUWpQOTasGQIRnep8Kk6CrIUMCLKqFwRbjY6lf2uX6HWjn_PR3TSQvDL3IfDoMOIA-2jf0sLxtJkdc2WuT7GhAoLbjRf9nfOq2TnFw4U5bTpok%3D)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center recorded a special video documentary about my military service in World War II and the Korean War._
---
**I** '**m a proud 22-year military veteran who served in World War II and the Korean War with the 33rd Fighter Group, better known as the Tuskegee Airmen.** In addition to being one of the Air Force's first "Top Guns," I was the first African-American combat pilot to fly in Korea, and I went on to fly more than 125 missions there. I'm proud to share my story of patriotism, service, and hard work with the next generation and to see the Tuskegee Airmen I served with recognized for their skill and bravery - after so many years of stonewalling and silence. **I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans** ' **stories so we can honor the men and women who served and inspire young Americans.** That's why, when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they needed to raise more funds to record veterans' stories - from World War II to today's Special Forces - I knew that I had to take action. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help support the American Veterans Center** '**s critical work to honor veterans** ' **legacies? As a non-profit organization, AVC depends on support from patriotic Americans like you.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9LQSJQ1GIAPKg1WK_s_T8s5bT_XWtHDDxNYe9CHzhrbGkhaDNw5je7qc-aQAHXyghNi3GHs__3eOh5SEVEyfi6fuPIHn-HQaYvGd_TbIZOIIFtR4bTC-dhZKcznpaKl3aP43oDjYLVyWopeMI9RloqA%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9AnOABS9Ag2mn96wvbNLUM2vYIP0P4_bq7G5TW51-w3PU7tp1vRPUmutpvfGtZfjepcbOdEJuC9PscAB_4rJ0NC2LSSeIkHfZQGOlaGW1zlWzECCFKRqw1fAo-5vr3uS5sLxYQHmvitzc0bIT6O-VOE%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9H8LJ8q_lNE0MK4XNBmoltPP80b8726bX7VRmRM5OOHmbyTBTr14v5ukzoWVaVGynxRVMaYVHV-OlRJtyG43F0igilix0dmC693F-gHnBinKp7SQfuyPmhYIiqEEzEJmZGmbV4FclMUlTG--YD92IUw%3D)
---
_Above: I was honored to join AVC_ '_s Annual Conference - alongside my fellow Tuskegee Airmen and in the company of hundreds more veterans, students, and military cadets - in Washington, D.C. this year._
---
I was proud to partner with the American Veterans Center for a 37-minute video documentary about my service in World War II and Korea - and also about the Tuskegee Airmen's long journey to rightful recognition for our skill and service. **No other group does as much as the American Veterans Center to safeguard our veterans** ' **legacies and to let our veterans tell their own stories in their own words.** [**That** '**s why I** '**m writing to you today to ask for your support of the American Veterans Center** '**s critical work. Will you make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9HR2aJ2SVdlTj6daEQj7i2N4w4iU9CgdLTbjU7Rcokdhr3dy2Xf2IZCSAGz_2CR6WAvydvFD61Cuv9JOjeVWaiVuI1rYn7Xv8iAYloyodATvikIuSH_LZ0E0z3Il8ghuU2tHvKOk1TD4y1s6lT1YMc8%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9EHpdwWuGZAAodaNeylTextT3hgoSSYicOxfJFpvOvfcGBFtrIHVx5D2UQ0hF5URLhQsSdWZkeUUs1gwshuyqt3H_JqDM2yRgK-rqugcKHBiisA29XpKDwjsEg2icKKgYKIg-7dIdKLXJtA7Ia2J-9g%3D)
---
As a young man, I stood outside in my yard and looked up as a formation of P-40 Warhawks flew overhead. In that moment, I knew I wanted to become a pilot. **Today, I hope that my story of serving America - in World War II, in the Korean War, and as one of the first **"**Top Guns " in the Air Force - will similarly inspire the next generation of young people.** Every year, the American Veterans Center reaches _millions_ of Americans through their video documentaries ... their National Memorial Day Parade ... and their Annual Conference for veterans, students, and military cadets. [**Will you join me in supporting the American Veterans Center - and helping them reach even more veterans and young people with their powerful programs - and make a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9E_0O2Kuv0a8CevNOTyXfHrHsdaZ-2ALI-6ZjJlHAqeE15YYl7Rlq8M5IURCyFdSrVxp_E2osVkbHJiBfLSQyvMoM2en4U0qignOdwoOyJX3BOQ7LQeJVKdVdpva-FHTHSXFDnFudyU7MYjba9jD4Ao%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9H3c1h4rolqBmBKvgpjyEC_lgYdOhBC0WRSFk-8O9e3-s4kenoFO3A87MvRtyNSBeO1SvhzFQb7z53lTebl3lprHV5w37x4gnpSQ5Q0s1riFuwrR3SX0CQ7oW7RRaC7hEwl8rlXKopmt75Ga30P2vHk%3D)
---
Friend, your support will help the American Veterans Center pass on the lessons of veterans like me - lessons of service, sacrifice, patriotism, duty, and courage. Thank you for helping the American Veterans Center preserve the stories of American heroes so together we can inspire the next generation.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f5c15ea10de4889a2729dbda22c2280&_e=S5f8ZYnhumpB7I6MspNDq8V0nFEnCPVSyQ40ZirpcO9tZuIPkQKMv4BgK20ZUJ-_AKlt9m1YwUbbW4t_bsWl7PD_mVqAivtcaiiU_tfRZ-iAWueT6eN-dh_VUL0g2R5p_VNnw-OmBMPCYLLvSbt_9JoZbbWEB8URMTtJSPzZqtX-RJEzKG8g6ryX6wbYNo8J5YeaM3LsUV5focbS0toTrNjT4CeLkkqceUD8-tcL39F6H5ywOutOdX-G9Hilf9vAOY1YoAefyNs0LHaUVf1KR6fapxvFP2IeouG4iGdd6gM%3D)
---
Lt. Col. James H. Harvey III U.S. Air Force (Ret.) For the American Veterans Center
