name: Rep. Jim Banks
subject: I have some big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Join me >>

| [ ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7i4Pwew6d2viDaWaiWLy_LZk4W5FPMalqfMDaRSEI3PsLm4cTvULe863zdo6sXzV3_qJ-P97YxqeuDfS8kht1iqWnp-pK_TPSKYVt6g9_fO3aWwtolXV4xSsdkzLQIYkI_5-iFoangYG89qMWO-rUO70%3D)
---
Dear friend,

**_I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana._** In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story:

I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7i4rV5UTq8dTHU_IsYa4-S9V4RePfXMDSmpR1WIMm_yjwHWLIJ_2Bpu8j9eYCrybmieLa6vgkQL_QrEVW7PZD8qHmxLThH4fwq7GE9mxyPYGvac7C7dUMuDTdgQya421zSWCN33NHlI76dXQtFvfxhnw%3D)
Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class.

I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day.

Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7i9zreBPtz41VSpqmhs5iXx9fcCrlbdo5tvoqmmaJdI9pUr2-vxJyZLLTH9CpdL9K4U3k9936YKptDsBCQjtE5XMhm6fDK6zX2Gf8qKQ_jbtGAdytACc6Az8p28Uy9L0Ivmr4hlbGSspV46ow8h5fbC0%3D)
Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7i1HW52DnpNbbXPTtWb77YA2eFNR08ucSpRTO3cbRa7tTj1ZbpmfnJ_-YlBXSV8BGJXlP9-4-AOCsk47A4dT944Wjozh7eM-49GqrG5QGx6O2CkMYWigeKPBNaJaqnUoDA6VUrSSDx6wZglwAXwOYAxQ%3D)
During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people.

Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7i1JikWlt_BPOx9CgHwygmfcGqUfEsTObnDdbAp9OvUSgTii6_RGMccgyv9OAUFOBJMwzFr9Jc5zoG-BWLn6CoNoUNq4iloi9WPInE5uVfEpckFItPGmrbauU51sy-6M07Wwrbg_P-AlSxD9siv0qxh4%3D)
Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7iyvxUyyvd9AMsOYYLpgb9hGNFzdEvbZHkzbBsGIHW4IdAeL1T9mc-wYBILdtHM2q-s_bIbgwZRjHi77W7rDDFATkSR6PA9pf6lJc_a8UBoF0toqKx0vfKFGEz7JpjPLetJJk3HQh72AO1x5mwfZaULE%3D)
As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that.

As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. **But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington.** [**_Will you join us in preserving the American Dream?_**](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=9g4-wATN5J4Yv6GebgFtX_sdjP1e9UDxroEmz9fpR1XXwrDRkNKO19iMw1AgObnUpQCZRSXACwSOpnsgtS3kNsx_GaCq9_Gpwvec32cRHeCSWA80OUibkTpZh8snImkvupUJc09Fx4BXoprTZ3_jkjWY0VL4EiZYl1G6UnHXtFD6t9CftCzeNp9Tak8QiJGRyhgHSl8vpwxRxi8Qn9UZGfN1zq6WewW4A7E4FutJkGV40A6pBh8WGcappn7gJI60f_MCReElI_q6Gm0dyr4eIsS1eOLz9Si9YWgXWUyHcvRVbKTvxwldYCRXY5yhy2oIr3HdkvtlZ1CLl0wOJv8Q0VROWEmbuFa2uDeLLcH0I7dBlFaWnx9zb6Jm2Ivhva4vqBbTri9516EF85BNfyT7i0o-v6Lw3df6MYZsKMWuV57tE4tqnKa9eYuXVgKL39zddKNN_3r52Y4HKvoQfqMHVpeo3cm_YSY5juQC3c6AADjIqZQswJ37I3b2eSOwfja8sq4Wh8ZASKamJnZj2eMWJnityLOcqNSVS21_MVs18qM%3D)

[ ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=54175d8a4b9e42b8b61bdf2e2cc5f35d&_e=RXQ57J6CmvfVAWz7qzVGAsSKcL3GV7kzCOQkqJJbAHVBoFjf1NYL13UsSNNh_kV0K0XrKa6-MPBbfi_53Sk9xtQQr8hNTusUuKMaIgNy1Ss8zFdNfcxzLUy-2Ii4eBSurvLGRCv7XBUW_erBbBjgP2v6N3n0FFAm8r9WLKij6Hxzyjx7rIdl75giTR-hXPTDHst4kusXEWPfBdK-Dm6NrcKCwpcE0c9tr_7rUKmAx4E%3D)
clean_body: Join me >> | Dear friend, I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana. In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story: I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years. Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class. I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day. Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer. Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values. During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people. Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive. Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first. As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that. As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington. | Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: James H. Harvey III, American Veterans Center
subject: The first "Top Gun"
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlER59MuINthZjoO4mCmp-uerZ-gfKlwNjnk5gsBtX568b_8uBUO9a4RyPee7gwh-JbJpBmkMItzlJ7l7bOHnglpY3M-CZEFH9UZ7g-Qv_c_1Q2hoQLi3CZ-psRXJMhn440LuJOPro2HBJn77Z9M617HM%3D)
---

Fellow American,
I was one of the first “Top Guns” of the U.S. Air Force.
In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force’s first Fighter Gunnery Meet.
Over multiple days, we competed against other squadrons in dive bombing, skip bombing, rocket firing, panel strafing, and aerial gunnery at 20,000 and 12,000 feet – _and we won_.
But the Air Force listed the 1949 competition winner as “Unknown” for 46 years because our team was composed of Tuskegee Airmen ... and they didn’t want people to know we were so good.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlEUmAO80OZzIPGlEgxuYz49XOqgFUi1BTmbzdSGprsmsfeUJGZZJ4Hn9_8WzfE60yNyjh9e2Sxcol-CfkUwheruBF2ZZKS77LUQ4zRK5EzXi3S_I2jH53ctt1h1b-6zmnAAkPG45BmJ7p3xWoC0mlFVY%3D)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center recorded a special video documentary about my military service in World War II and the Korean War._
---

**I** ’**m a proud 22-year military veteran who served in World War II and the Korean War with the 33rd Fighter Group, better known as the Tuskegee Airmen.**
In addition to being one of the Air Force’s first “Top Guns,” I was the first African-American combat pilot to fly in Korea, and I went on to fly more than 125 missions there.
I’m proud to share my story of patriotism, service, and hard work with the next generation and to see the Tuskegee Airmen I served with recognized for their skill and bravery – after so many years of stonewalling and silence.
**I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans** ’ **stories so we can honor the men and women who served and inspire young Americans.**
That’s why, when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they needed to raise more funds to record veterans’ stories – from World War II to today’s Special Forces – I knew that I had to take action.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help support the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical work to honor veterans** ’ **legacies? As a non-profit organization, AVC depends on support from patriotic Americans like you.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlEVO30d4na_xKkHHwCSwbqi0-NJ0jkXCH8-U0vFPP-FJEFvKCSijP9zoz_H783u2i0jzKFZr5KTzgd-aOb7gSLZ7FNz68X1uuqIcJOyESVZeCpo70QngB4MzBWAm7W7-UmxbYAu8K3E_A0WxuBLQuClM%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlEXhc_zA1VUXCWHAGMyWrMabCoOAwhmeaCBAGMTekxLVL5wyz4nJ0hv6Fa99EewOOOHCuLvFS4az4Oyl_AEAiKbx3Rk0Hc9gJzogNDZ_E8p_mLb89OwZrXllvZ4KjQrac_we8vzPe1k1wkiDN8QjQW7E%3D)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlETQHiTS-rar9x8vvD40-ALLl7UHIE2mETWzclNI65oiuXBxMIdQAEEJB1zh-VMzV0qhhKPxxl0poRSt4HbS_paro_nnfv1otzN5LwBdwSf6LgEACJjZrsHv4bGWPq_cvcyLfpkR2nuBx0j4dB3bX30w%3D)
---
_Above: I was honored to join AVC_ ’ _s Annual Conference – alongside my fellow Tuskegee Airmen and in the company of hundreds more veterans, students, and military cadets – in Washington, D.C. this year._
---

I was proud to partner with the American Veterans Center for a 37-minute video documentary about my service in World War II and Korea – and also about the Tuskegee Airmen’s long journey to rightful recognition for our skill and service.
**No other group does as much as the American Veterans Center to safeguard our veterans** ’ **legacies and to let our veterans tell their own stories in their own words.**
[**That** ’**s why I** ’**m writing to you today to ask for your support of the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical work. Will you make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlEfneApLgydIphbsc_TDT1VAtoci3WC4f4NdY6fPylg_ej5kfko5NiM3biZ1Yn_Gb1jgsiumoWcVa98sydnlc4IvB8UG4Meo5tD7-3o6ulG7Z0S7TDgT4QEwoh1XlRhdyGWngIZzjquVVMzDxayTdyMM%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlETXRWVxo5UCb8Do3uG35Qet2W1ghAsnxoNgjCTk_LWFU0DWTVDKyg4E8VGsesUhtZfnQJnzFR7L8oS-I7tNlqPcbxEXu00EIXh7qfc-To-8MpZWdsuOOLkhEbJRujkdDF0U_0d33G2UD6YXhV30twA0%3D)
---

As a young man, I stood outside in my yard and looked up as a formation of P-40 Warhawks flew overhead. In that moment, I knew I wanted to become a pilot.
**Today, I hope that my story of serving America – in World War II, in the Korean War, and as one of the first** “**Top Guns” in the Air Force – will similarly inspire the next generation of young people.**
Every year, the American Veterans Center reaches _millions_ of Americans through their video documentaries ... their National Memorial Day Parade ... and their Annual Conference for veterans, students, and military cadets.
[**Will you join me in supporting the American Veterans Center – and helping them reach even more veterans and young people with their powerful programs – and make a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlEW9yyqKVPf0-WeckAiGUzrTnvaLQ0546P-OAsRBX9xFxzJYbGIgZfzOTjq7xs0G0thq2grokvYBz70OnBtj3p4VL48c0UUvtWTP80fG9O3BZXeqQnWRxQvBmdIoZKOObXtwlNXg96iH6Mmlz7xQbrbQ%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlETmpT4WdHjtL65zf0KThalDdy0wuSSrD1dsrNoMQyXecmc2sZasxJ0hAqtu4SqjVapEKvIW4csgo1Hx0jHNxzg_Z_RzlpT6f9LKi-okb53TechpvJcRNS9OWWdvyWXryCusAEvWwCmAxlNyZoA-P-IQ%3D)
---

Friend, your support will help the American Veterans Center pass on the lessons of veterans like me – lessons of service, sacrifice, patriotism, duty, and courage.
Thank you for helping the American Veterans Center preserve the stories of American heroes so together we can inspire the next generation.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlETMjTVM8kxSxdjpuLVGAXCbvxxWjiC5kmpf3ctUsmYv4k4422l0EZLDM9y9K-ZQVB5WTG2zfirw2F-EvuU6BB58TqwWgTTq2Gk-oYcJtO6r9Cw1A9bBFEsXLjF1qCDZn7X205kOYSpWFj9b7xgCdmHI%3D)
---

Lt. Col. James H. Harvey III U.S. Air Force (Ret.) For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27436072b3834c7abdec01152b90f502&_e=6DPO6JpYbZSVqhhUKc54zHDxO6DA-ybfIUsNuTjij0coGnoWMlm4t7xAnu2bMY9sj5CSEtUnZ9pPkiBmoO6wvz0izyvVhPY6f5J4Qs1Gep2tmWfhVUElGfsGym0RhpenH088UmehWUoM1W2GF1dlEQgoF5Blu_cl0nYbRJs-cfxod43LOKXUby46xcNxyArKGL_YVtpLdhBoSwJi7da6MKi1dfqnzYORftny4GAuEgpOVsBm5q9bQk-S4HxXulZRYgnLT86f9PB7ujSExDR1UY0kIqRoPTuxVmmYM2W-ayQ%3D)
---

name: Josh Stein
subject: I’m humbled to announce my campaign for Governor of North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
and I hope you’ll join me on the road ahead.

| Hi there Peter,

I’m Josh Stein, and I just announced my campaign for Governor of North Carolina.

Our country is at a crossroads – and here in North Carolina, our future will be decided by the slimmest of margins in the next election. The stakes could not be higher.

Will women have access to the health care they need, when they need it? Or will extremist politicians make those decisions for them?

Will every eligible voter have an equal right to vote? Or will Republicans roll back voting rights and continue to gerrymander legislative districts to discriminate against certain voters? Will people have the power in our democracy – or politicians?

Will we prioritize educating our kids and supporting our educators? Or will Republicans continue to undermine public education and pass tax giveaways to big corporations and their out-of-state shareholders?

Will we ensure everyone can get access to quality health care? Or will Republicans in North Carolina’s legislature continue to refuse to expand Medicaid?

Will our government work for all of us – or just the privileged and powerful? [_**I’m humbled to announce my campaign for Governor to build a better and brighter North Carolina. I’d be deeply grateful if you joined me. Please, split a contribution between Valerie Foushee and my campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57481673/388102303/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230118-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBlNmFhZS02Zjk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Un00-8uIUT_i-SNxF-9D0mu9U6NO1A3JWH1g3i-ieUg=)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57481674/388102304/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230118-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBlNmFhZS02Zjk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Un00-8uIUT_i-SNxF-9D0mu9U6NO1A3JWH1g3i-ieUg=)
---
My good friend Valerie asked me to reach out to you directly because she knows the path forward won’t be easy.

North Carolina is one of the most politically competitive states in the country – and national Republicans will flood my state with millions of dollars in an attempt to stop us. They know that the outcome in North Carolina can have a major impact on who wins the next presidential election.

Peter, I am up for the challenge. I’ve run statewide in North Carolina when Donald Trump prevailed twice – and won both times. I’ve taken on big pharma as Attorney General – and won. I’ve gone up against corporate polluters – and won. And I’ve taken e-cigarette manufacturer Juul to court for sparking a teen vaping epidemic – and won.

[_**Today, I’m asking you personally to join us in this fight and help us win. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and Valerie Foushee's campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57481675/388102305/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230118-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBlNmFhZS02Zjk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Un00-8uIUT_i-SNxF-9D0mu9U6NO1A3JWH1g3i-ieUg=)

Let’s get it done,

Josh Stein

clean_body: and I hope you’ll join me on the road ahead. | Hi there Peter, I’m Josh Stein, and I just announced my campaign for Governor of North Carolina. Our country is at a crossroads – and here in North Carolina, our future will be decided by the slimmest of margins in the next election. The stakes could not be higher. Will women have access to the health care they need, when they need it? Or will extremist politicians make those decisions for them? Will every eligible voter have an equal right to vote? Or will Republicans roll back voting rights and continue to gerrymander legislative districts to discriminate against certain voters? Will people have the power in our democracy – or politicians? Will we prioritize educating our kids and supporting our educators? Or will Republicans continue to undermine public education and pass tax giveaways to big corporations and their out-of-state shareholders? Will we ensure everyone can get access to quality health care? Or will Republicans in North Carolina’s legislature continue to refuse to expand Medicaid? Will our government work for all of us – or just the privileged and powerful? = | = My good friend Valerie asked me to reach out to you directly because she knows the path forward won’t be easy. North Carolina is one of the most politically competitive states in the country – and national Republicans will flood my state with millions of dollars in an attempt to stop us. They know that the outcome in North Carolina can have a major impact on who wins the next presidential election. Peter, I am up for the challenge. I’ve run statewide in North Carolina when Donald Trump prevailed twice – and won both times. I’ve taken on big pharma as Attorney General – and won. I’ve gone up against corporate polluters – and won. And I’ve taken e-cigarette manufacturer Juul to court for sparking a teen vaping epidemic – and won. = Let’s get it done, Josh Stein North Carolina Attorney General and Democratic candidate for Governor * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: Parents dread hearing these words
body:
| | |
---

Friend,

Imagine one day your 10-year-old daughter comes home and asks you, _“Mom, Dad, am I bad for being white?”_

Nothing like that ever came out of your kid’s mouth and then one day that comes out. Your innocent child is being weighed down by guilt that’s not hers to bear. Of course, these things don’t happen in a day...

They happen over weeks, months, and even years.

_**Or worse...**_ Imagine your child is secretly transitioning at school. For months you never knew, because rather than inform you, your child’s teachers were **encouraging** the confusion all along.

These scenarios aren’t made-up stories– this kind of radical indoctrination at schools is happening across the country. _(I frequently tell my readers on the_[ _TPN Daily blog_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hPNQflmHcQve0iI&b=KX.H5uwsTxvvT3OSEC9PpA) _to regularly check in with their kids about school for this very reason.)_

Man, how the school system has changed since I was a kid. It wasn’t perfect then, but it sure wasn’t the hell it's become now.

As parents, it's our job to protect our children and guide them to the best of our ability into adulthood. But as United States citizens, we should not expect our government to be indoctrinating our children with everything from BLM to LGBTQ.

**This is why I’m running in the Florida special election for House District 24.** In Florida, we have an amazing opportunity– one that most states do not– to pass long-lasting legislation that protects our children. We have a majority house and a Governor who’s going to bat for us.

[**I will fight for education reform in the truest sense, and will push my colleagues– whether Democrat, Republican, or RINOs– to do the same.**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hPNQflmHcQve0iI&b=1W_Tv0OaCxOuKcONhX7hOA)

It’s time Florida REJECT
* Critical Race theory, which seeks to divide society into oppressed and oppressors
* LGBTQ indoctrination– any teacher who wants to talk to kids about their sexual orientation or identity fetishes should NOT BE AROUND CHILDREN! It’s that simple.
* BLM and other highly political, social indoctrination movements

I am and will always be a father first. If you have kids of your own, I’m asking for your support going into this critical special election.

[**SUPPORT CHAMBERLIN!**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hPNQflmHcQve0iI&b=1W_Tv0OaCxOuKcONhX7hOA)

Sincerely,

Ryan Chamberlin
Candidate for Florida State House of Representatives
[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hPNQflmHcQve0iI&b=zsNtw0MA7rQhBtekVP5XEg)

[P.S. Help me make Education Reform a top priority in the Florida State House— every donation makes a difference in this race!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hPNQflmHcQve0iI&b=1W_Tv0OaCxOuKcONhX7hOA)

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsbGwMbMys) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsbGwMbMys)

Peter Willis,

Yesterday, in one of the most disgusting
scenes in recent memory, Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin high-fived each

celebrating their work to stop filibuster reform.

abortion rights was nothing short of sickening.

re-election campaign, and we can't let her get away with it.

name: Val Arkoosh
subject: Proud to serve Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Arkoosh for U
body:
I wanted to share this news personally. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57482948/388108144/2058529741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc0NTFmMy03NTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uePiqqgFOVi4SqZ9sFwdhIYiDGKeWbQu6M0zJt0fRM=&emci=2b326cd9-c791-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ea7451f3-7597-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5086640)
---
Peter,

For the last eight years, it has been my honor to serve the people of Montgomery County as your County Commissioner. Now, I am pleased to share that I have the honor of being appointed by Governor Josh Shapiro as his nominee for Secretary of the Pennsylvania Department of Human Services.

I look forward to serving alongside Governor Josh Shapiro and supporting his vision to create a government reflective of the Commonwealth. I thank Governor Shapiro for his support and trust in me to continue my track record of delivering equitable, efficient, and data-driven programs and services to the people of Pennsylvania.

I also look forward to working with fellow cabinet members, our legislature, and all of you to continue to ensure the health and well-being of all Pennsylvanians continue to be a top priority.

As a physician for over twenty years, I have seen firsthand the challenges my patients were facing. Caring for pregnant moms managing diabetes without access to a grocery store in their neighborhood. Parents worried about the air their kids breathe and the water they drink. People denied insurance for a pre-existing condition.

As a doctor, I could only do so much to help my patients. That’s why I took my fight for my patients outside the exam room and became a physician advocate for the Affordable Care Act. It is why I became the Chair of the Commonwealth’s third-largest county, and it’s why I am so pleased to join Governor Shapiro’s team to continue that work in this role.

As Secretary, I will continue the Department’s critical work to help Pennsylvanians lead safe, healthy, and productive lives through trauma-informed services. My experience as both a physician and public health professional continues to inform my work. It was front and center as I shepherded Montgomery County’s efforts to combat the COVID-19 pandemic through a data and science-driven response, focusing on clear communication and transparency.

Throughout my career, I have worked in partnership with communities, service providers, and other stakeholders to create policies to improve services for children, Veterans, and seniors; tackle the opioid epidemic; address maternal health disparities; and protect reproductive rights. As Secretary of DHS, I will continue to work in service to all Pennsylvanians.

I want to thank my friends, colleagues, and constituents in Montgomery County for the support and partnership you have given me these past many years. I want to thank my husband Jeff and our children Ian, Olivia, and Trevor for their constant love and support. And I want to thank Governor Shapiro for this honor.

I am committed to working with him, his administration, and all of you every day to ensure our Commonwealth is healthy, safe, and strong.

With gratitude,
Val
Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate
P.O. Box 627
Norristown, PA 19404
United States **[www.valarkoosh.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57482949/388108145/509241870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc0NTFmMy03NTk3LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uePiqqgFOVi4SqZ9sFwdhIYiDGKeWbQu6M0zJt0fRM=&emci=2b326cd9-c791-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ea7451f3-7597-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5086640) | [info@valarkoosh.com](mailto:info@valarkoosh.com)** | Paid for by Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate

I want to thank my husband Jeff and our children Ian, Olivia, and Trevor for their constant love and support. And I want to thank Governor Shapiro for this honor. I am committed to working with him, his administration, and all of you every day to ensure our Commonwealth is healthy, safe, and strong. With gratitude, Val Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. subject: Critical special elections are already on the books for February

| | **The clock is racing towards more special elections in 2023, with critical races already on the books for February.** Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why:
* Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a _handful_ of votes.
* And after state Democrats’ historic wins last year, state Republicans will be looking for _any_ power-building opportunities they can find.
* **We were outraised by Republicans every quarter last year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats _today._**

We need grassroots Democrats like you, to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. **Can we count on you today?** [Rush $7 right now to give state Democrats the support they need to secure victories in elections across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PM9au9og9R0ZTdDWUbZYJ8jI2KozMzDW1gBtstaTv0M60AMSt_TX59doH33I6COTZBz-7agR11IgeInEaZIDGG1aLiUAiZwJ0wYC2tCoUTejqZSf6K2ZiGb4F1XIgEUgcsOqtPWs88Q4qeC6zYmvNhWBV26C8t_Hvb5bAYg-AxDa-ob9Lk5jLju5q76Z9IuqUV7IMAWulTeSkm8znNE6Noaj19lZrBJqJ2scoosOR48t_0oKDVrS6csMwJZhsOcqeawfFLI30jRhxVh8ITgArdCmqK_VPV4MgnE-RYRZt7zpMjE6P8XdbJDE8X2qv7207RZeBd2CsuavuFp5gMBl_Ilw6lDNrhI5865BCXqlFdPIeY52xPRLI4jFEmxu__uGXmE1FCdH3KQFQQmgqrzGnAs/3sy/OPkoZulwQ2if4FeAJJW8YA/h0/x1742iv4TDbUEGk-MZN-cMXyt4Uy9RQz7qNwUC6UeBs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. **Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.**
That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today.

clean_body: It's a disgrace. | Patriot, No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election -- even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election. So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election. The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime. | Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that the Arizona election was RIGGED. Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth. Unfortunately -- the fact is we've got a tight timetable. At MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we're going to be dangerously close to running out of funds. If we lose our cash flow, we lose the ability to fight -- that's the sad reality. Best, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Team,

Governor Katie Hobbs just released her first budget to build an Arizona for everyone.

It finally invests in public education, makes an effort to solve our housing crisis, and tries to help all communities build a better Arizona.

In a matter of hours, the AZ GOP that barely controls the state legislature was already calling the budget “dead on arrival.” **They won’t even consider respecting the voters’ wishes to build a better Arizona for everyone.**

**[Team, after our big wins in 2022, we’re laser-focused on making sure we flip the Arizona legislature as soon as possible, and getting Governor Hobbs the support she needs. Despite Arizona voters selecting a Democratic trifecta (Governor, Secretary of State and Attorney General) for the first time in decades, the GOP still narrowly holds control of the state legislature – just one seat in each chamber.

**Despite this narrow majority, the AZ GOP has started the legislative session attacking Gov. Hobbs’ efforts to protect LGBTQ Arizonans, turned their backs on supporting reproductive rights, and now they are calling investments in schools, “dead on arrival.”**

We’re so close to getting Arizona to be completely blue by flipping the state legislature. We need to keep _pressure on every single Republican legislator to support Governor Hobbs’ agenda for a better Arizona_ – and if they don’t, we need to create pressure in their districts to change their minds.

The AZ GOP is already threatening recalls for Republican legislators who don’t stay in line — so we need to be ready if an opportunity to flip a seat comes up as well.

**[Team, we know the next election seems a long way off, but with narrow majorities, we can’t find ourselves behind if an opportunity arises. clean_body: | | | Help us flip the AZ legislature | | | Team, Governor Katie Hobbs just released her first budget to build an Arizona for everyone. It finally invests in public education, makes an effort to solve our housing crisis, and tries to help all communities build a better Arizona. In a matter of hours, the AZ GOP that barely controls the state legislature was already calling the budget “dead on arrival.” They won’t even consider respecting the voters’ wishes to build a better Arizona for everyone. Despite Arizona voters selecting a Democratic trifecta (Governor, Secretary of State and Attorney General) for the first time in decades, the GOP still narrowly holds control of the state legislature – just one seat in each chamber. Despite this narrow majority, the AZ GOP has started the legislative session attacking Gov. Hobbs’ efforts to protect LGBTQ Arizonans, turned their backs on supporting reproductive rights, and now they are calling investments in schools, “dead on arrival.” We’re so close to getting Arizona to be completely blue by flipping the state legislature. We need to keep pressure on every single Republican legislator to support Governor Hobbs’ agenda for a better Arizona – and if they don’t, we need to create pressure in their districts to change their minds. The AZ GOP is already threatening recalls for Republican legislators who don’t stay in line — so we need to be ready if an opportunity to flip a seat comes up as well. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We’ll always fight for what’s best for Arizona, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=32e96dbec1c143ae8bbd9c219c363e66&_e=N-dtsAwIX9hcH1AgIyD1yWQTlaYp2DVosLSZWyLK2zG-WOxzYMhq99f4Q8gTk_tABU_M0ENSNfLJ49V3czzbx5R-cuq6gonpYFk53vKvvD_JDTf_Q47PD5r-SIMePYJaV2eRqkwU6lDw8n6v990Wee1qyMQCQQV5D4Tv5-SkgBhvckQgQ5arxKkdXkZ3cjJollN_82nN30DrgBpsOfoO6lmEAH--oRDa3UZ26A_JW5k99NZyRNTlKzzITUoMyPkc5x4xoO8w1JSruIGWFIUzRCAQ4jFCFtLh7vDAXSXn2CjyQ0Dd82Pqw9f6-MUvMT9p)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=32e96dbec1c143ae8bbd9c219c363e66&_e=N-dtsAwIX9hcH1AgIyD1yWQTlaYp2DVosLSZWyLK2zG-WOxzYMhq99f4Q8gTk_tABU_M0ENSNfLJ49V3czzbx5R-cuq6gonpYFk53vKvvD_JDTf_Q47PD5r-SIMePYJaV2eRqkwU6lDw8n6v990WeUyyHirXikYCZzpanMbBddbOqRSVpW4SmFwRxQSTTkEXOhvrHbxpXyNR3Gcce6CVCFUcq6cm6B4F2vsu9pkNa30jnZsR6x7RWND0Vx6pu82I_1kR7i642HecmsMCnvTOmbp8pc4E8GjzVUenNrJi7-TqhfGkcaPRk4YVTSPO5MKB)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=32e96dbec1c143ae8bbd9c219c363e66&_e=N-dtsAwIX9hcH1AgIyD1yWQTlaYp2DVosLSZWyLK2zG-WOxzYMhq99f4Q8gTk_tABU_M0ENSNfLJ49V3czzbx5R-cuq6gonpYFk53vKvvD_JDTf_Q47PD5r-SIMePYJaV2eRqkwU6lDw8n6v990WeWPL09m3INHKAxxU197Hi8LUjP54QT9S6EMVOZXDrJTYWDLMawJpFymSdy-ZyqyKcAGcjwBGvyvpJ316TNEIFOG_5MXw3fOl-QZ1_wFX5NSHM_rbt38uXtpRd1BW1c5Fp0pszi4jMvhulQiiA1KXKneHp3UqRqouGLsXd1fypq1o)
---
[Get my book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=32e96dbec1c143ae8bbd9c219c363e66&_e=N-dtsAwIX9hcH1AgIyD1yWQTlaYp2DVosLSZWyLK2zG-WOxzYMhq99f4Q8gTk_tABU_M0ENSNfLJ49V3czzbx5R-cuq6gonpYFk53vKvvD_JDTf_Q47PD5r-SIMePYJaV2eRqkwU6lDw8n6v990WeZwyRkL3kVI_osi8KJXasuN0YnYCCVq2dEzsHktq2aVY2fmuQQ9NR76sEqfUVrsUJsEm0ZWsrWWK_BcAKSYqSH3vaIQ0MozJF31I83yrx0HtIET1g70LTxzlbUCuW9zPvB9rqfPhgbhVhb7m6x9Q-nn7iKYXuDI1n9AmupjEyODG)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=32e96dbec1c143ae8bbd9c219c363e66&_e=N-dtsAwIX9hcH1AgIyD1yWQTlaYp2DVosLSZWyLK2zG-WOxzYMhq99f4Q8gTk_tABU_M0ENSNfLJ49V3czzbx5R-cuq6gonpYFk53vKvvD_JDTf_Q47PD5r-SIMePYJaV2eRqkwU6lDw8n6v990WeV7GejyYJbDP4IdpIodOIQDW_YPHixWLQ2LKGOUAmA7lJT60f_r5Ci7Zbc5PKIeJqMu8WGpT1GQygrc4VFF1SI9UQJNFUxsA9g5_UiIsZ21p2j1_7ghauOplT9QVMvPgGMLd1NfnL0BxoLBPcgpca49APG7-1pQZ1sZqmd6edxMc) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! name: NRSC Fundraising Division
subject: Re: The 87,000 IRS agents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Winning back the Senate majority will take every one of us doing our part.
Friend,

The Republican-led House of Representatives made good on one of their signature campaign promises.

In a sign of solidary with the American taxpayer, House Republicans voted to reverse legislation Democrats passed last fall that provided the IRS with $80 billion to hire 87,000 new agents. _**Unfortunately, the version of the bill will die in the Democrat-led Senate.**_

Over the next two years, we will see more of the same song and dance we witnessed this week. The House will pass meaningful, fiscally responsible legislation; Senate Democrats will obstruct and nix it from becoming law.

**Rinse.
Wash.
Repeat.**
If you want to stop Biden and Senate Democrats from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then we need your help today. **The only way we're going to stop harmful legislation from taking effect, like hiring 87,000 new IRS agents, is by taking control of the Senate.**

**[If you're able, please consider helping us get our country back on track by donating $2.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e449cbc891149d3bf1abf757ee3c223&_e=kWUnEZ7kL3Bf6ELAm6Wxeri5KfgDgQx6JX2td7h_c6ypOSKZv_l4kLml-O2mSlYq5lDEDEMmTwAy4iBGTKkt1LSNLbsZ6KWDS1h39guSO6Br9Xrloyg1HQvmG86xGzjmUJcVm95KWDOc2h0ans28gdY493oU-0V1XeXDJAI8SOxEc80aeOGQA4YTKkpDmWURAkc6zhHFSExDzcEiuQU4HZP2iqpWz7o4puublCbG7_wabHj3Fm7gzFn787-ZyHRFUvdRZSmZE1BMm-l_I3CW1reYfKUQA_panj3Q-to1l6KUzTyBprr5wgpZZg-mFlXE1gjOGvif9qGlPL88SWFJEiq7LXRNdVN8asSinK5fsvZJfO9Qi7WiXFy9FyEJqhUQDC8bBQofmeSjltfGvKnxck0WJalHp92J7Kh9SUkQ_o4%3D)** Winning back the Senate majority will take every one of us doing our part. Quite literally, we have no time to waste.

| [** CHIP IN $2 >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e449cbc891149d3bf1abf757ee3c223&_e=kWUnEZ7kL3Bf6ELAm6Wxeri5KfgDgQx6JX2td7h_c6ypOSKZv_l4kLml-O2mSlYq5lDEDEMmTwAy4iBGTKkt1LSNLbsZ6KWDS1h39guSO6Br9Xrloyg1HQvmG86xGzjmUJcVm95KWDOc2h0ans28gdY493oU-0V1XeXDJAI8SOxEc80aeOGQA4YTKkpDmWURAkc6zhHFSExDzcEiuQU4HZP2iqpWz7o4puublCbG7_wabHj3Fm7gzFn787-ZyHRFUgCDlcmH7uQ6CZe5ZS5_Dsg5YzW2AOoGCxHv_hKYgXZIeSClkZow6s7QVvO3IJOiZjMI3zxAJLXdRmjB8BfJacV8n45tPns2ocf_78ylb0aWFyJigTc7fYHOYLWC7RUnHQlKC61jPKcC07JyrF8byVNXRRlWPiiaEPX9BxJ7mQ34Eg4VhmY8Ilxs1iRkTqnc)
---

While House Republicans will deliver on their campaign promises to the American people, Senate Democrats will stand in the way of conservative victories every single time. That alone should be enough of a reason **[to donate to our efforts right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e449cbc891149d3bf1abf757ee3c223&_e=kWUnEZ7kL3Bf6ELAm6Wxeri5KfgDgQx6JX2td7h_c6ypOSKZv_l4kLml-O2mSlYq5lDEDEMmTwAy4iBGTKkt1LSNLbsZ6KWDS1h39guSO6Br9Xrloyg1HQvmG86xGzjmUJcVm95KWDOc2h0ans28gdY493oU-0V1XeXDJAI8SOxEc80aeOGQA4YTKkpDmWURAkc6zhHFSExDzcEiuQU4HZP2iqpWz7o4puublCbG7_wabHj3Fm7gzFn787-ZyHRFUvdRZSmZE1BMm-l_I3CW1pmq0bwKzs4UW0mzH9rSq99DWqFxxYZETDr8dOZmXw7DNpSEiL4iVRHh6nhDXzqS8kdj_HmzsUcARAEeRzb4Dqp5N0qlp0POShOmmUmGFf_xGsbcf2i20n_7yMUwAw0cAtQq-uGLBCCVwS2naO_XUVc%3D)**

We all know that elections have consequences. Unfortunately for Senate Republicans, we drew the short straw in the last election. Now we're seeing first-hand the downside of being outspent in critical battleground races 3-1: **voting for bills passed in the House that Democrats will certainly block.**

The only way to get off the sidelines and back into the driver's seat is by winning back the majority. Fortunately for us, the map favors Republicans in the 2024 election. But just because we're favored doesn't mean we will win without putting up **a strong fight.**

We can't think of a single reason the IRS needs an additional $80 billion in funding; not now, not ever. Making hardworking Americans the target of government audits would be a mistake. That's why we need your help today. **[Chip in $2 right now to help us win back the Senate and put a stop to the lunacy in D.C.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e449cbc891149d3bf1abf757ee3c223&_e=kWUnEZ7kL3Bf6ELAm6Wxeri5KfgDgQx6JX2td7h_c6ypOSKZv_l4kLml-O2mSlYq5lDEDEMmTwAy4iBGTKkt1LSNLbsZ6KWDS1h39guSO6Br9Xrloyg1HQvmG86xGzjmUJcVm95KWDOc2h0ans28gdY493oU-0V1XeXDJAI8SOxEc80aeOGQA4YTKkpDmWURAkc6zhHFSExDzcEiuQU4HZP2iqpWz7o4puublCbG7_wabHj3Fm7gzFn787-ZyHRFUvdRZSmZE1BMm-l_I3CW1hpDUH1K4wZXQhkn1FFLqBa5Bv-6fSTbVjF7wszQ-Pm6jXu6V6GBQkjSoVsdaoGtvMxFN8lFybNgfpjb4Y4xXB5_G0sHyTyxHTW_3CsUyNuziZxmBDX_OkAFW_gCmhw7eGdI9Pw_aZiH2IXBabX5jAg%3D)**

Thank you,

NRSC Fundraising Division

[** CHIP IN $2 >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e449cbc891149d3bf1abf757ee3c223&_e=kWUnEZ7kL3Bf6ELAm6Wxeri5KfgDgQx6JX2td7h_c6ypOSKZv_l4kLml-O2mSlYq5lDEDEMmTwAy4iBGTKkt1LSNLbsZ6KWDS1h39guSO6Br9Xrloyg1HQvmG86xGzjmUJcVm95KWDOc2h0ans28gdY493oU-0V1XeXDJAI8SOxEc80aeOGQA4YTKkpDmWURAkc6zhHFSExDzcEiuQU4HZP2iqpWz7o4puublCbG7_wabHj3Fm7gzFn787-ZyHRFUgCDlcmH7uQ6CZe5ZS5_Dsg5YzW2AOoGCxHv_hKYgXYczOc3jUbjx4dPHGdRF5flUuMb0jOzFlu1GcV-5DCpaaG4vTviak-VOnmcy59Yfz2EmXCjpulMs_04TWO4RgTSmfXSeiR3Eg29PRDNiRjbQ-ZA9hnkyv8BbjVlEyjGdRoCXDJfbeZ1XQ8LDTC-NoT2)

The House will pass meaningful, fiscally responsible legislation; Senate Democrats will obstruct and nix it from becoming law. Rinse. Wash. Repeat. If you want to stop Biden and Senate Democrats from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then we need your help today. The only way we're going to stop harmful legislation from taking effect, like hiring 87,000 new IRS agents, is by taking control of the Senate. Winning back the Senate majority will take every one of us doing our part. Quite literally, we have no time to waste. | While House Republicans will deliver on their campaign promises to the American people, Senate Democrats will stand in the way of conservative victories every single time. That alone should be enough of a reason We all know that elections have consequences. Unfortunately for Senate Republicans, we drew the short straw in the last election. Now we're seeing first-hand the downside of being outspent in critical battleground races 3-1: voting for bills passed in the House that Democrats will certainly block. The only way to get off the sidelines and back into the driver's seat is by winning back the majority. Fortunately for us, the map favors Republicans in the 2024 election. But just because we're favored doesn't mean we will win without putting up a strong fight. We can't think of a single reason the IRS needs an additional $80 billion in funding; not now, not ever. Making hardworking Americans the target of government audits would be a mistake. That's why we need your help today. Thank you, NRSC Fundraising Division If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. clean_body: | | | | | | | Untitled Document Friend, The Democrats set a dangerous precedent \- one they will soon regret \- when they voted to release my tax returns. This decision was nothing more than a continuation of their vendetta against ME. They forget that before stepping into the political arena tosave our Country, I spent my entire life building one of the greatest companies in the world. In short, I have achieved theAmerican Dream beyond all imagination. Most politicians only know how to KILL jobs (re: Joe Biden) - I have actually CREATED them. In an outrageous but unsurprising abuse of power, the Radical Democrat Congress illegally obtained and leaked my tax returns - which only show that I’ve had tremendous success. The seizure of these confidential records was completely unconstitutional : there was NO legitimate legislative purpose for their action whatsoever. It is nothing but another deranged political witch hunt. I trust what YOU think, Friend, which is why I’m asking you to go on record by answering the quick poll below: The Radical Democrats’ behavior is a shame upon the U.S. Congress. This precedent must now be applied to the Corrupt Democrats themselves. The Washington Swamp is deep and unbelievably corrupt - which is why it is so determined to stop the one person (ME) who will clean up their corruption once and for all. When I am the 47th President of the United States, I promise you that we will EXPOSE the Washington cartel - and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Nancy Pelosi sold millions of dollars worth of stocks.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

According to the non-profit OpenSecrets, as of 2018 Nancy Pelosi had a net
worth of $114,662,521 — it’s absolutely shameful for an elected official
to have that much wealth — and just shows that she’s completely out of
touch with the vast majority of Americans.

Then, just a few days ago Nancy Pelosi sold millions of dollars worth of
stocks.🚨

Last year, she oversaw the process that ultimately killed the ban on stock
trading for all members of Congress. It’s quite interesting how that
worked out...

Corporate Democrats have proved over and over again that they care more
about personal interests than representing the 99%. We’re here to elect
Democrats of a different kind – progressives who we send to Congress fight
for life-saving policies, not their own wallets.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230118-27120&t=1001&akid=27120%2E1203867%2EbbY3ov ]Can we count on you to make a $3 contribution as we
recruit the next generation of Justice Democrats to run for Congress?
Every single contribution we receive makes a difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230118-27120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27120%2E1203867%2EbbY3ov ]Contribute $3

We’re still in the fight to transform the Democratic Party by electing
more everyday people like AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush who understand
and will fight for the American people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=27120%2E1203867%2EbbY3ov ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=27120%2E1203867%2EbbY3ov ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

| | | Peter,
---
Right now, the hour for America is dark.

Woke schools, skyrocketing debt, and “trendy” socialism are poisoning the next generation.

And with their Senate majority, far-Left Democrat leaders are stronger than EVER.

While things may seem bleak right now, [**Rick Scott has a plan to RESCUE AMERICA from the radical Left - and he wants YOU to be a part of it.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=397fd09cb4b44a32b3858029b4361b75&_e=QZSpdDhhG5QLUFj-aNRgeVkFcrJm7wT3WKIn4Y4sWrS0l1q3TL-iUnZXyyqF6SDZQ6EPgD2JjLLCxpy28av3er-0Id4pKNMia5p-gJRGFK_XgLpgJPPvi7h7IMahdut06SCbpsr_oREeA0jRFVnkwFYPGVCv4uCr80gZYbaP1cu0-wsRXGhnUcK4kYedFipjPqVmDrLg43VulCG_iaEe4XxC82lGVhjDbEZwHeyXC5m9WmVwuL5v-whxc7a6jbj1TqBbGIzijouzH7I72hxiKDfZJIcIYlwYlI8dBX95U8ItA90AAiTRiZjkMUqkvhJWRNAA-DjnljG7WXgr4G75FKdS_CWQ42WyE9v2VL6qFDvRmSB2aR2148100p4b-U0T)

I’ll warn you: this plan is not for the faint of heart. It doesn’t mince words, and it’s going to take guts.

---
Hey Peter, after two years of avoiding the crisis and ignoring the pleas of border states, Joe Biden has _finally_ visited the southern border. **But don’t be fooled. ** Joe Biden didn’t wake up one day and suddenly want to secure our border. **This is all a cover-up. **** ** **The Biden administration's incompetence and deliberate decisions: ** **❌ Endangered** American citizens and immigrants**❌ Allowed **deadly drugs to flood into our neighborhoods**❌ Essentially Relinquished** operational control of the border to the cartels **❌ Gave taxpayer money to NGOs** to help move illegal immigrants throughout America _(The extent of this NGO operation was first uncovered by The Heritage Foundation’s government oversight project)._
---
[**DEMAND ANSWERS AND SECURE BORDERS: $10**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ae1705dba8224001a1c882365647a007&_e=2QH_GZ3YY_wD8cwQJe6SOOPPVT9jpR1i2dz2nJ-oqd-ZrjZG7VkkdalL6LgSXK9ze_1tNQ0li07aR7TOnY47z5CXojEqJvbsuckJpvpDO9hzpZ8APeP-kR1d8YpyaUep0iaEAYOf8dXVPF_zUFiaYYdsHp354xUx45PA1j-W4JDA91J_Y8klTLDz7Wm-e2gTD81GIpOtpmFc-xWH8JUqx8Swv-Ir-nAuFAjdVl0YFjmWjkc3RtzMTH6lD5aNFrXbFG1WAzvMTkYTdghM0c0tBvty8Sc7EXsb-NInQAFPQ7gVQZv5qOWceU_jWin4zqzjCd_gLaV80ZtWFVGViOIxTNIYXiY0sqjEXHQqbWNXbYU2L6pFlpf70XQtLK7VuN0F)
---
While Biden plays theater at our border and makes the crisis even worse, we need our **NEW** conservative majority in the House to put forth a robust and aggressive border security agenda that includes... **➡️ Investigating** the Biden administration and the taxpayer-funded NGOs responsible for bring this crisis into every state in America **➡️ Impeaching** Secretary Mayorkas for dereliction of duty at the border. **➡️ Securing **our border with much-needed physical and technological infrastructure **[Peter, will you join Heritage Action’s effort to demand answers and secure borders by chipping in to fuel our movement?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ae1705dba8224001a1c882365647a007&_e=2QH_GZ3YY_wD8cwQJe6SOOPPVT9jpR1i2dz2nJ-oqd-ZrjZG7VkkdalL6LgSXK9ze_1tNQ0li07aR7TOnY47z5CXojEqJvbsuckJpvpDO9hzpZ8APeP-kR1d8YpyaUep0iaEAYOf8dXVPF_zUFiaYYdsHp354xUx45PA1j-W4JDA91J_Y8klTLDz7Wm-e2gTD81GIpOtpmFc-xWH8JUqx8Swv-Ir-nAuFAjdVl0YFjkwt0e6XO8NrF5GWmdKbj95pVwLpMvjOhsm0xs065fAyVS5prt59P-qccjshegkOk4Vspk5ujl11xW_bB0ZXCEmM8nXKFYiHYAiibCphrZAhFDAr3F34BpX-1HjZVhFEMw3Q4mx0XcoszuXcul4md8B)**
---
[**DEMAND ANSWERS AND SECURE BORDERS: $10**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ae1705dba8224001a1c882365647a007&_e=2QH_GZ3YY_wD8cwQJe6SOOPPVT9jpR1i2dz2nJ-oqd-ZrjZG7VkkdalL6LgSXK9ze_1tNQ0li07aR7TOnY47z5CXojEqJvbsuckJpvpDO9hzpZ8APeP-kR1d8YpyaUep0iaEAYOf8dXVPF_zUFiaYYdsHp354xUx45PA1j-W4JDA91J_Y8klTLDz7Wm-e2gTD81GIpOtpmFc-xWH8JUqx8Swv-Ir-nAuFAjdVl0YFjmTjKwUgcWCZaqjpOKvKgi7Y9tgWK3d-iX7MZykSsygGKX-KOKjTRslZh0pzgCebk3Tirww-pq862JofDEKkYjHWxOC1snOhCsLfE9lsxH0sG1W39BMZ6jcpmayRfwscE4zQWxzdbuBDcQvM_M06zRJ)
